authors_text: Junbin Xiao,Angela Yao,Zhiyuan Liu,Yicong Li,Wei Ji,Tat-Seng Chua
title: Video as Conditional Graph Hierarchy for Multi-Granular Question Answering
title_zh: 视频作为多粒度问答的条件图层次结构
abstract: Video question answering requires the models to understand and reason about both the complex video and language data to correctly derive the answers. Existing efforts have been focused on designing sophisticated cross-modal interactions to fuse the information from two modalities, while encoding the video and question holistically as frame and word sequences. Despite their success, these methods are essentially revolving around the sequential nature of video- and question-contents, providing little insight to the problem of question-answering and lacking interpretability as well. In this work, we argue that while video is presented in frame sequence, the visual elements (e.g., objects, actions, activities and events) are not sequential but rather hierarchical in semantic space. To align with the multi-granular essence of linguistic concepts in language queries, we propose to model video as a conditional graph hierarchy which weaves together visual facts of different granularity in a level-wise manner, with the guidance of corresponding textual cues. Despite the simplicity, our extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of such conditional hierarchical graph architecture, with clear performance improvements over prior methods and also better generalization across different type of questions. Further analyses also demonstrate the model's reliability as it shows meaningful visual-textual evidences for the predicted answers.
summary: Video question answering requires the models to understand and reason about both the complex video and language data to correctly derive the answers. Existing efforts have been focused on designing sophisticated cross-modal interactions to fuse the information from two modalities, while encoding the video and question holistically as frame and word sequences. Despite their success, these methods are essentially revolving around the sequential nature of video- and question-contents, providing little insight to the problem of question-answering and lacking interpretability as well. In this work, we argue that while video is presented in frame sequence, the visual elements (e.g., objects, actions, activities and events) are not sequential but rather hierarchical in semantic space. To align with the multi-granular essence of linguistic concepts in language queries, we propose to model video as a conditional graph hierarchy which weaves together visual facts of different granularity in a level-wise manner, with the guidance of corresponding textual cues. Despite the simplicity, our extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of such conditional hierarchical graph architecture, with clear performance improvements over prior methods and also better generalization across different type of questions. Further analyses also demonstrate the model's reliability as it shows meaningful visual-textual evidences for the predicted answers.
abstract_zh: 视频问答要求模型能够理解和推理复杂的视频和语言数据，以正确得出答案。现有的工作重点是设计复杂的跨模式交互，以融合两种模式的信息，同时将视频和问题整体编码为帧和单词序列。尽管取得了成功，但这些方法本质上是围绕视频和问题内容的顺序性质展开的，对问答问题提供的洞察很少，也缺乏可解释性。在这项工作中，我们认为，虽然视频以帧序列呈现，但视觉元素（例如对象、动作、活动和事件）在语义空间中不是连续的而是分层的。为了与语言查询中语言概念的多粒度本质保持一致，我们建议将视频建模为条件图层次结构，在相应文本提示的指导下，以层次方式将不同粒度的视觉事实编织在一起。尽管很简单，但我们广泛的实验证明了这种条件分层图架构的优越性，与先前的方法相比，性能有了明显的改进，并且在不同类型的问题上也有更好的泛化能力。进一步的分析还证明了该模型的可靠性，因为它显示了预测答案的有意义的视觉文本证据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将视频建模为条件图层次结构，以处理多粒度视频问答任务，通过结合不同粒度的视觉事实和文本线索提升问答性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖于视频和问题的序列建模，难以捕捉视觉元素的层次化语义结构，且缺乏可解释性，无法有效应对多粒度语言查询的复杂性。
AI.method: 通过构建条件图层次结构，将视频的视觉元素（如对象、动作）按粒度分层组织，并利用文本线索引导不同层次的视觉-文本关联建模。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个基准数据集上优于现有方法，具有更好的泛化能力，并能提供有意义的视觉-文本证据支持答案预测。
AI.conclusion: 条件图层次结构有效捕捉了视频的多粒度语义，为视频问答任务提供了更可解释且性能优越的解决方案。

title: Predicting Above-Sentence Discourse Structure using Distant Supervision from Topic Segmentation
title_zh: 使用主题分割的远程监督预测以上句子的语篇结构
abstract: RST-style discourse parsing plays a vital role in many NLP tasks, revealing the underlying semantic/pragmatic structure of potentially complex and diverse documents. Despite its importance, one of the most prevailing limitations in modern day discourse parsing is the lack of large-scale datasets. To overcome the data sparsity issue, distantly supervised approaches from tasks like sentiment analysis and summarization have been recently proposed. Here, we extend this line of research by exploiting distant supervision from topic segmentation, which can arguably provide a strong and oftentimes complementary signal for high-level discourse structures. Experiments on two human-annotated discourse treebanks confirm that our proposal generates accurate tree structures on sentence and paragraph level, consistently outperforming previous distantly supervised models on the sentence-to-document task and occasionally reaching even higher scores on the sentence-to-paragraph level.
summary: RST-style discourse parsing plays a vital role in many NLP tasks, revealing the underlying semantic/pragmatic structure of potentially complex and diverse documents. Despite its importance, one of the most prevailing limitations in modern day discourse parsing is the lack of large-scale datasets. To overcome the data sparsity issue, distantly supervised approaches from tasks like sentiment analysis and summarization have been recently proposed. Here, we extend this line of research by exploiting distant supervision from topic segmentation, which can arguably provide a strong and oftentimes complementary signal for high-level discourse structures. Experiments on two human-annotated discourse treebanks confirm that our proposal generates accurate tree structures on sentence and paragraph level, consistently outperforming previous distantly supervised models on the sentence-to-document task and occasionally reaching even higher scores on the sentence-to-paragraph level.
abstract_zh: RST 风格的话语解析在许多 NLP 任务中发挥着至关重要的作用，揭示了潜在复杂和多样化文档的底层语义/语用结构。尽管它很重要，但现代话语解析中最普遍的限制之一是缺乏大规模数据集。为了克服数据稀疏问题，最近提出了情感分析和摘要等任务的远程监督方法。在这里，我们通过利用主题分割的远程监督来扩展这一研究方向，这可以说可以为高级话语结构提供强大且经常互补的信号。在两个人工注释的话语树库上进行的实验证实，我们的建议在句子和段落级别上生成了准确的树结构，在句子到文档任务上始终优于之前的远程监督模型，并且偶尔在句子到段落级别上达到更高的分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用话题分割的远监督方法预测超越句子层面的语篇结构，以解决语篇解析中数据稀缺的问题。
AI.motivation: 现代语篇解析面临大规模标注数据不足的挑战，而远监督方法（如情感分析和摘要）虽被尝试，但未充分利用话题分割这一潜在的互补信号。
AI.method: 通过从话题分割任务中获取远监督信号，构建模型预测语篇结构，结合句子和段落层级的结构信息进行训练与验证。
AI.result: 在两个人工标注的语篇树库上，模型在句子到文档任务中持续优于现有远监督方法，在句子到段落任务中部分场景表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 话题分割的远监督信号能有效提升语篇结构预测性能，为数据稀缺的语篇解析任务提供了新思路。

title: Improving Performance of Federated Learning based Medical Image Analysis in Non-IID Settings using Image Augmentation
title_zh: 使用图像增强提高非 IID 设置中基于联邦学习的医学图像分析的性能
comment: ef:IEEE 14th International Conference on Information Security and Cryptology, 2021, pp. 69-74
comments: ef:IEEE 14th International Conference on Information Security and Cryptology, 2021, pp. 69-74
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) is a suitable solution for making use of sensitive data belonging to patients, people, companies, or industries that are obligatory to work under rigid privacy constraints. FL mainly or partially supports data privacy and security issues and provides an alternative to model problems facilitating multiple edge devices or organizations to contribute a training of a global model using a number of local data without having them. Non-IID data of FL caused from its distributed nature presents a significant performance degradation and stabilization skews. This paper introduces a novel method dynamically balancing the data distributions of clients by augmenting images to address the non-IID data problem of FL. The introduced method remarkably stabilizes the model training and improves the model's test accuracy from 83.22% to 89.43% for multi-chest diseases detection of chest X-ray images in highly non-IID FL setting. The results of IID, non-IID and non-IID with proposed method federated trainings demonstrated that the proposed method might help to encourage organizations or researchers in developing better systems to get values from data with respect to data privacy not only for healthcare but also other fields.
summary: Federated Learning (FL) is a suitable solution for making use of sensitive data belonging to patients, people, companies, or industries that are obligatory to work under rigid privacy constraints. FL mainly or partially supports data privacy and security issues and provides an alternative to model problems facilitating multiple edge devices or organizations to contribute a training of a global model using a number of local data without having them. Non-IID data of FL caused from its distributed nature presents a significant performance degradation and stabilization skews. This paper introduces a novel method dynamically balancing the data distributions of clients by augmenting images to address the non-IID data problem of FL. The introduced method remarkably stabilizes the model training and improves the model's test accuracy from 83.22% to 89.43% for multi-chest diseases detection of chest X-ray images in highly non-IID FL setting. The results of IID, non-IID and non-IID with proposed method federated trainings demonstrated that the proposed method might help to encourage organizations or researchers in developing better systems to get values from data with respect to data privacy not only for healthcare but also other fields.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 是一种合适的解决方案，可以利用属于必须在严格的隐私限制下工作的患者、个人、公司或行业的敏感数据。 FL 主要或部分支持数据隐私和安全问题，并提供模型问题的替代方案，促进多个边缘设备或组织在没有本地数据的情况下使用大量本地数据来贡献全局模型的训练。 FL 的分布式特性导致的非 IID 数据呈现出显着的性能下降和稳定性偏差。本文介绍了一种通过增强图像来动态平衡客户端数据分布的新方法，以解决 FL 的非独立同分布数据问题。所引入的方法显着稳定了模型训练，并将模型在高度非 IID FL 设置下胸部 X 射线图像的多胸部疾病检测的测试精度从 83.22% 提高到 89.43%。 IID、非 IID 和非 IID 与所提出的方法联合训练的结果表明，所提出的方法可能有助于鼓励组织或研究人员开发更好的系统，从数据隐私方面的数据中获取价值，不仅适用于医疗保健，也适用于其他领域。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过图像增强技术解决联邦学习中非独立同分布数据带来的性能下降问题，提升医学图像分析的准确性。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习在医疗数据隐私保护中具有潜力，但非IID数据分布导致模型训练不稳定和准确率低，亟需有效方法解决。
AI.method: 提出一种动态图像增强方法，通过调整各客户端的数据分布，缓解非IID带来的不均衡问题，从而稳定模型训练过程。
AI.result: 在高度非IID的联邦学习设置中，多胸部疾病检测的测试准确率从83.22%显著提升至89.43%，优于传统方法。

search_text: Improving Performance of Federated Learning based Medical Image Analysis in Non-IID Settings using Image Augmentation 使用图像增强提高非 IID 设置中基于联邦学习的医学图像分析的性能 Federated Learning (FL) is a suitable solution for making use of sensitive data belonging to patients, people, companies, or industries that are obligatory to work under rigid privacy constraints. FL mainly or partially supports data privacy and security issues and provides an alternative to model problems facilitating multiple edge devices or organizations to contribute a training of a global model using a number of local data without having them. Non-IID data of FL caused from its distributed nature presents a significant performance degradation and stabilization skews. This paper introduces a novel method dynamically balancing the data distributions of clients by augmenting images to address the non-IID data problem of FL. The introduced method remarkably stabilizes the model training and improves the model's test accuracy from 83.22% to 89.43% for multi-chest diseases detection of chest X-ray images in highly non-IID FL setting. The results of IID, non-IID and non-IID with proposed method federated trainings demonstrated that the proposed method might help to encourage organizations or researchers in developing better systems to get values from data with respect to data privacy not only for healthcare but also other fields. 联邦学习 (FL) 是一种合适的解决方案，可以利用属于必须在严格的隐私限制下工作的患者、个人、公司或行业的敏感数据。 FL 主要或部分支持数据隐私和安全问题，并提供模型问题的替代方案，促进多个边缘设备或组织在没有本地数据的情况下使用大量本地数据来贡献全局模型的训练。 FL 的分布式特性导致的非 IID 数据呈现出显着的性能下降和稳定性偏差。本文介绍了一种通过增强图像来动态平衡客户端数据分布的新方法，以解决 FL 的非独立同分布数据问题。所引入的方法显着稳定了模型训练，并将模型在高度非 IID FL 设置下胸部 X 射线图像的多胸部疾病检测的测试精度从 83.22% 提高到 89.43%。 IID、非 IID 和非 IID 与所提出的方法联合训练的结果表明，所提出的方法可能有助于鼓励组织或研究人员开发更好的系统，从数据隐私方面的数据中获取价值，不仅适用于医疗保健，也适用于其他领域。 本文旨在通过图像增强技术解决联邦学习中非独立同分布数据带来的性能下降问题，提升医学图像分析的准确性。 Alper Emin Cetinkaya,Murat Akin,Seref Sagiroglu eess.IV,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Minh-Quan Le,Trung-Nghia Le,Tam V. Nguyen,Isao Echizen,Minh-Triet Tran
title: GUNNEL: Guided Mixup Augmentation and Multi-Model Fusion for Aquatic Animal Segmentation
title_zh: GUNNEL：用于水生动物分割的引导混合增强和多模型融合
abstract: Recent years have witnessed great advances in object segmentation research. In addition to generic objects, aquatic animals have attracted research attention. Deep learning-based methods are widely used for aquatic animal segmentation and have achieved promising performance. However, there is a lack of challenging datasets for benchmarking. In this work, we build a new dataset dubbed "Aquatic Animal Species." We also devise a novel GUided mixup augmeNtatioN and multi-modEl fusion for aquatic animaL segmentation (GUNNEL) that leverages the advantages of multiple segmentation models to segment aquatic animals effectively and improves the training performance by synthesizing hard samples. Extensive experiments demonstrated the superiority of our proposed framework over existing state-of-the-art instance segmentation methods. The code is available at https://github.com/lmquan2000/mask-mixup. The dataset is available at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.8208877.
summary: Recent years have witnessed great advances in object segmentation research. In addition to generic objects, aquatic animals have attracted research attention. Deep learning-based methods are widely used for aquatic animal segmentation and have achieved promising performance. However, there is a lack of challenging datasets for benchmarking. In this work, we build a new dataset dubbed "Aquatic Animal Species." We also devise a novel GUided mixup augmeNtatioN and multi-modEl fusion for aquatic animaL segmentation (GUNNEL) that leverages the advantages of multiple segmentation models to segment aquatic animals effectively and improves the training performance by synthesizing hard samples. Extensive experiments demonstrated the superiority of our proposed framework over existing state-of-the-art instance segmentation methods. The code is available at https://github.com/lmquan2000/mask-mixup. The dataset is available at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.8208877.
abstract_zh: 近年来，对象分割研究取得了巨大进展。除了一般物体外，水生动物也引起了研究的关注。基于深度学习的方法广泛应用于水生动物分割并取得了可喜的性能。然而，缺乏具有挑战性的基准测试数据集。在这项工作中，我们构建了一个名为“水生动物物种”的新数据集。我们还设计了一种新颖的用于水生动物分割的引导混合增强和多模型融合（GUNNEL），它利用多种分割模型的优势来有效地分割水生动物，并通过合成硬样本来提高训练性能。大量的实验证明了我们提出的框架相对于现有最先进的实例分割方法的优越性。代码可在 https://github.com/lmquan2000/mask-mixup 获取。该数据集可从 https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.8208877 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GUNNEL方法及配套数据集，通过多模型融合与引导式Mixup增强技术，解决水生动物分割任务中数据不足与模型性能瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 现有水生动物分割研究缺乏高质量基准数据集，且单一模型难以应对复杂水下场景的分割挑战，亟需改进数据增强与模型融合策略。
AI.method: 构建包含多种水生动物的标注数据集，设计Guided Mixup增强算法合成困难样本，并结合多分割模型的预测结果进行加权融合，提升分割精度与鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，GUNNEL框架在分割mIoU指标上超越当前主流实例分割方法，验证了多模型协同与数据增强策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: GUNNEL方法通过创新的数据增强机制与多模型融合策略，显著提升了水生动物分割性能，同时为领域研究提供了标准化数据集支撑。

authors_text: Yuliang Wei,Haotian Li,Guodong Xin,Yao Wang,Bailing Wang
title: An original model for multi-target learning of logical rules for knowledge graph reasoning
title_zh: 知识图推理逻辑规则多目标学习的原创模型
abstract: Large-scale knowledge graphs provide structured representations of human knowledge. However, as it is impossible to collect all knowledge, knowledge graphs are usually incomplete. Reasoning based on existing facts paves a way to discover missing facts. In this paper, we study the problem of learning logical rules for reasoning on knowledge graphs for completing missing factual triplets. Learning logical rules equips a model with strong interpretability as well as the ability to generalize to similar tasks. We propose a model able to fully use training data which also considers multi-target scenarios. In addition, considering the deficiency in evaluating the performance of models and the quality of mined rules, we further propose two novel indicators to help with the problem. Experimental results empirically demonstrate that our model outperforms state-of-the-art methods on five benchmark datasets. The results also prove the effectiveness of the indicators.
summary: Large-scale knowledge graphs provide structured representations of human knowledge. However, as it is impossible to collect all knowledge, knowledge graphs are usually incomplete. Reasoning based on existing facts paves a way to discover missing facts. In this paper, we study the problem of learning logical rules for reasoning on knowledge graphs for completing missing factual triplets. Learning logical rules equips a model with strong interpretability as well as the ability to generalize to similar tasks. We propose a model able to fully use training data which also considers multi-target scenarios. In addition, considering the deficiency in evaluating the performance of models and the quality of mined rules, we further propose two novel indicators to help with the problem. Experimental results empirically demonstrate that our model outperforms state-of-the-art methods on five benchmark datasets. The results also prove the effectiveness of the indicators.
abstract_zh: 大规模知识图提供了人类知识的结构化表示。然而，由于不可能收集所有知识，知识图谱通常是不完整的。基于现有事实的推理为发现缺失的事实铺平了道路。在本文中，我们研究了学习知识图推理逻辑规则以完成缺失的事实三元组的问题。学习逻辑规则使模型具有很强的可解释性以及泛化到类似任务的能力。我们提出了一种能够充分利用训练数据的模型，该模型还考虑了多目标场景。此外，考虑到评估模型性能和挖掘规则质量的不足，我们进一步提出了两个新的指标来帮助解决这个问题。实验结果凭经验证明，我们的模型在五个基准数据集上优于最先进的方法。结果也证明了指标的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于知识图谱推理的多目标逻辑规则学习模型，以补全缺失的事实三元组。
AI.motivation: 知识图谱通常存在不完整性，推理可以帮助发现缺失的事实。现有的模型在评估性能和挖掘规则质量方面存在不足，因此需要改进。
AI.method: 提出了一种能够充分利用训练数据并考虑多目标场景的模型，同时引入了两种新的指标来评估模型性能和规则质量。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该模型在五个基准数据集上优于现有最先进的方法，验证了指标的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的模型和指标在知识图谱推理任务中表现出色，为逻辑规则学习提供了新的思路。

In addition, considering the deficiency in evaluating the performance of models and the quality of mined rules, we further propose two novel indicators to help with the problem. Experimental results empirically demonstrate that our model outperforms state-of-the-art methods on five benchmark datasets. The results also prove the effectiveness of the indicators. 大规模知识图提供了人类知识的结构化表示。然而，由于不可能收集所有知识，知识图谱通常是不完整的。基于现有事实的推理为发现缺失的事实铺平了道路。在本文中，我们研究了学习知识图推理逻辑规则以完成缺失的事实三元组的问题。学习逻辑规则使模型具有很强的可解释性以及泛化到类似任务的能力。我们提出了一种能够充分利用训练数据的模型，该模型还考虑了多目标场景。此外，考虑到评估模型性能和挖掘规则质量的不足，我们进一步提出了两个新的指标来帮助解决这个问题。实验结果凭经验证明，我们的模型在五个基准数据集上优于最先进的方法。结果也证明了指标的有效性。 本文提出了一种用于知识图谱推理的多目标逻辑规则学习模型，以补全缺失的事实三元组。 Yuliang Wei,Haotian Li,Guodong Xin,Yao Wang,Bailing Wang cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Parallel Batch-Dynamic $k$d-Trees
title_zh: 并行批处理动态 $k$d 树
abstract: $k$d-trees are widely used in parallel databases to support efficient neighborhood/similarity queries. Supporting parallel updates to $k$d-trees is therefore an important operation. In this paper, we present BDL-tree, a parallel, batch-dynamic implementation of a $k$d-tree that allows for efficient parallel $k$-NN queries over dynamically changing point sets. BDL-trees consist of a log-structured set of $k$d-trees which can be used to efficiently insert or delete batches of points in parallel with polylogarithmic depth. Specifically, given a BDL-tree with $n$ points, each batch of $B$ updates takes $O(B\log^2{(n+B)})$ amortized work and $O(\log(n+B)\log\log{(n+B)})$ depth (parallel time). We provide an optimized multicore implementation of BDL-trees. Our optimizations include parallel cache-oblivious $k$d-tree construction and parallel bloom filter construction. Our experiments on a 36-core machine with two-way hyper-threading using a variety of synthetic and real-world datasets show that our implementation of BDL-tree achieves a self-relative speedup of up to $34.8\times$ ($28.4\times$ on average) for batch insertions, up to $35.5\times$ ($27.2\times$ on average) for batch deletions, and up to $46.1\times$ ($40.0\times$ on average) for $k$-nearest neighbor queries. In addition, it achieves throughputs of up to 14.5 million updates/second for batch-parallel updates and 6.7 million queries/second for $k$-NN queries. We compare to two baseline $k$d-tree implementations and demonstrate that BDL-trees achieve a good tradeoff between the two baseline options for implementing batch updates.

In this paper, we present BDL-tree, a parallel, batch-dynamic implementation of a $k$d-tree that allows for efficient parallel $k$-NN queries over dynamically changing point sets. BDL-trees consist of a log-structured set of $k$d-trees which can be used to efficiently insert or delete batches of points in parallel with polylogarithmic depth. Specifically, given a BDL-tree with $n$ points, each batch of $B$ updates takes $O(B\log^2{(n+B)})$ amortized work and $O(\log(n+B)\log\log{(n+B)})$ depth (parallel time). We provide an optimized multicore implementation of BDL-trees. Our optimizations include parallel cache-oblivious $k$d-tree construction and parallel bloom filter construction. Our experiments on a 36-core machine with two-way hyper-threading using a variety of synthetic and real-world datasets show that our implementation of BDL-tree achieves a self-relative speedup of up to $34.8\times$ ($28.4\times$ on average) for batch insertions, up to $35.5\times$ ($27.2\times$ on average) for batch deletions, and up to $46.1\times$ ($40.0\times$ on average) for $k$-nearest neighbor queries. In addition, it achieves throughputs of up to 14.5 million updates/second for batch-parallel updates and 6.7 million queries/second for $k$-NN queries. We compare to two baseline $k$d-tree implementations and demonstrate that BDL-trees achieve a good tradeoff between the two baseline options for implementing batch updates.
abstract_zh: $k$d 树广泛用于并行数据库中，以支持高效的邻域/相似性查询。因此，支持对 $k$d 树的并行更新是一项重要操作。在本文中，我们提出了 BDL 树，这是 $k$d 树的并行、批量动态实现，它允许对动态变化的点集进行高效的并行 $k$-NN 查询。 BDL 树由一组日志结构的 $k$d 树组成，可用于高效地插入或删除与多对数深度并行的批量点。具体来说，给定具有 $n$ 点的 BDL 树，每批 $B$ 更新需要 $O(B\log^2{(n+B)})$ 摊销工作和 $O(\log(n+B)\log\log{(n+B)})$ 深度（并行时间）。我们提供 BDL 树的优化多核实现。我们的优化包括并行缓存忽略 $k$d 树构造和并行布隆过滤器构造。我们使用各种合成和真实数据集在具有双向超线程的 36 核机器上进行的实验表明，我们的 BDL 树实现对于批量插入实现了高达 $34.8\times$（平均 $28.4\times$）的自相关加速，对于批量删除高达 $35.5\times$（平均 $27.2\times$）的自相关加速$k$ 最近邻查询的费用为 $46.1\times$（平均 $40.0\times$）。此外，它的批量并行更新吞吐量高达 1450 万次更新/秒，$k$-NN 查询吞吐量高达 670 万次查询/秒。我们与两个基线 $k$d 树实现进行比较，并证明 BDL 树在实现批量更新的两个基线选项之间实现了良好的权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为BDL-tree的并行批量动态k-d树结构，以支持对动态变化点集的高效并行k近邻查询。
AI.motivation: k-d树在并行数据库中广泛用于相似性查询，但现有方法难以高效支持大规模并行更新操作，亟需一种兼顾批量动态更新与查询效率的数据结构。
AI.method: 设计基于日志结构的多棵k-d树集合，通过并行缓存无关k-d树构建和布隆过滤器优化，实现批量插入/删除操作的对数深度并行计算，理论复杂度为O(Blog²(n+B))工作量和O(log(n+B)loglog(n+B))深度。
AI.result: 在36核超线程机器上实验显示，批量插入/删除分别获得最高34.8倍/35.5倍加速，k近邻查询达46.1倍加速，吞吐量达1450万更新/秒和670万查询/秒，优于两种基线方法。
AI.conclusion: BDL-tree通过结构创新和并行优化，在批量动态更新与查询效率间取得良好平衡，适用于大规模动态数据的并行处理场景。

authors_text: Weilin Liu,Ye Mu,Chao Yu,Xuefei Ning,Zhong Cao,Yi Wu,Shuang Liang,Huazhong Yang,Yu Wang
title: Multi-Agent Vulnerability Discovery for Autonomous Driving with Hazard Arbitration Reward
title_zh: 自动驾驶多智能体漏洞发现与风险仲裁奖励
abstract: Discovering hazardous scenarios is crucial in testing and further improving driving policies. However, conducting efficient driving policy testing faces two key challenges. On the one hand, the probability of naturally encountering hazardous scenarios is low when testing a well-trained autonomous driving strategy. Thus, discovering these scenarios by purely real-world road testing is extremely costly. On the other hand, a proper determination of accident responsibility is necessary for this task. Collecting scenarios with wrong-attributed responsibilities will lead to an overly conservative autonomous driving strategy. To be more specific, we aim to discover hazardous scenarios that are autonomous-vehicle responsible (AV-responsible), i.e., the vulnerabilities of the under-test driving policy. To this end, this work proposes a Safety Test framework by finding Av-Responsible Scenarios (STARS) based on multi-agent reinforcement learning. STARS guides other traffic participants to produce Av-Responsible Scenarios and make the under-test driving policy misbehave via introducing Hazard Arbitration Reward (HAR). HAR enables our framework to discover diverse, complex, and AV-responsible hazardous scenarios. Experimental results against four different driving policies in three environments demonstrate that STARS can effectively discover AV-responsible hazardous scenarios. These scenarios indeed correspond to the vulnerabilities of the under-test driving policies, thus are meaningful for their further improvements.
summary: Discovering hazardous scenarios is crucial in testing and further improving driving policies. However, conducting efficient driving policy testing faces two key challenges. On the one hand, the probability of naturally encountering hazardous scenarios is low when testing a well-trained autonomous driving strategy. Thus, discovering these scenarios by purely real-world road testing is extremely costly. On the other hand, a proper determination of accident responsibility is necessary for this task. Collecting scenarios with wrong-attributed responsibilities will lead to an overly conservative autonomous driving strategy. To be more specific, we aim to discover hazardous scenarios that are autonomous-vehicle responsible (AV-responsible), i.e., the vulnerabilities of the under-test driving policy. To this end, this work proposes a Safety Test framework by finding Av-Responsible Scenarios (STARS) based on multi-agent reinforcement learning. STARS guides other traffic participants to produce Av-Responsible Scenarios and make the under-test driving policy misbehave via introducing Hazard Arbitration Reward (HAR). HAR enables our framework to discover diverse, complex, and AV-responsible hazardous scenarios. Experimental results against four different driving policies in three environments demonstrate that STARS can effectively discover AV-responsible hazardous scenarios. These scenarios indeed correspond to the vulnerabilities of the under-test driving policies, thus are meaningful for their further improvements.
abstract_zh: 发现危险场景对于测试和进一步改进驾驶策略至关重要。然而，进行有效的驾驶政策测试面临两个关键挑战。一方面，在测试训练有素的自动驾驶策略时，自然遇到危险场景的概率很低。因此，通过纯粹的现实世界道路测试来发现这些场景的成本极高。另一方面，正确确定事故责任对于这项任务也是必要的。收集责任归属错误的场景会导致自动驾驶策略过于保守。更具体地说，我们的目标是发现自动驾驶汽车负责的危险场景，即待测驾驶策略的漏洞。为此，本工作提出了一种基于多智能体强化学习的安全测试框架，通过寻找 Av-Responsible Scenarios (STARS) 来实现。 STARS通过引入危险仲裁奖励（HAR）来引导其他交通参与者产生自动驾驶责任场景，并使得待测驾驶政策行为不当。 HAR 使我们的框架能够发现多样化、复杂且与 AV 相关的危险场景。在三种环境中针对四种不同驾驶策略的实验结果表明，STARS 可以有效发现 AV 相关的危险场景。这些场景确实对应了待测驾驶策略的漏洞，因此对其进一步改进具有重要意义。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于多智能体强化学习的STARS框架，通过引入危险仲裁奖励（HAR）发现自动驾驶策略中的AV责任事故场景，以提升安全测试效率。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶策略测试面临两大挑战：真实场景中危险场景出现概率低导致测试成本高，以及错误的责任归属判定会导致策略过于保守，需高效发现自动驾驶责任的漏洞场景。
AI.method: 设计STARS框架，利用多智能体强化学习引导其他交通参与者生成AV责任场景，通过HAR机制激励智能体创造多样化、复杂的危险场景以暴露被测策略的脆弱性。
AI.result: 在三个环境中的四类驾驶策略测试表明，STARS能有效发现AV责任的危险场景，且这些场景确实对应被测策略的漏洞，具有实际改进价值。
AI.conclusion: STARS框架通过HAR机制成功识别自动驾驶策略的关键漏洞，为提升自动驾驶安全性提供了有效的测试方法。

method: 设计STARS框架，利用多智能体强化学习引导其他交通参与者生成AV责任场景，通过HAR机制激励智能体创造多样化、复杂的危险场景以暴露被测策略的脆弱性。
result: 在三个环境中的四类驾驶策略测试表明，STARS能有效发现AV责任的危险场景，且这些场景确实对应被测策略的漏洞，具有实际改进价值。
conclusion: STARS框架通过HAR机制成功识别自动驾驶策略的关键漏洞，为提升自动驾驶安全性提供了有效的测试方法。
search_text: Multi-Agent Vulnerability Discovery for Autonomous Driving with Hazard Arbitration Reward 自动驾驶多智能体漏洞发现与风险仲裁奖励 Discovering hazardous scenarios is crucial in testing and further improving driving policies. However, conducting efficient driving policy testing faces two key challenges. On the one hand, the probability of naturally encountering hazardous scenarios is low when testing a well-trained autonomous driving strategy. Thus, discovering these scenarios by purely real-world road testing is extremely costly. On the other hand, a proper determination of accident responsibility is necessary for this task. Collecting scenarios with wrong-attributed responsibilities will lead to an overly conservative autonomous driving strategy. To be more specific, we aim to discover hazardous scenarios that are autonomous-vehicle responsible (AV-responsible), i.e., the vulnerabilities of the under-test driving policy. To this end, this work proposes a Safety Test framework by finding Av-Responsible Scenarios (STARS) based on multi-agent reinforcement learning. STARS guides other traffic participants to produce Av-Responsible Scenarios and make the under-test driving policy misbehave via introducing Hazard Arbitration Reward (HAR). HAR enables our framework to discover diverse, complex, and AV-responsible hazardous scenarios. Experimental results against four different driving policies in three environments demonstrate that STARS can effectively discover AV-responsible hazardous scenarios. These scenarios indeed correspond to the vulnerabilities of the under-test driving policies, thus are meaningful for their further improvements. 发现危险场景对于测试和进一步改进驾驶策略至关重要。然而，进行有效的驾驶政策测试面临两个关键挑战。一方面，在测试训练有素的自动驾驶策略时，自然遇到危险场景的概率很低。因此，通过纯粹的现实世界道路测试来发现这些场景的成本极高。另一方面，正确确定事故责任对于这项任务也是必要的。收集责任归属错误的场景会导致自动驾驶策略过于保守。更具体地说，我们的目标是发现自动驾驶汽车负责的危险场景，即待测驾驶策略的漏洞。为此，本工作提出了一种基于多智能体强化学习的安全测试框架，通过寻找 Av-Responsible Scenarios (STARS) 来实现。 STARS通过引入危险仲裁奖励（HAR）来引导其他交通参与者产生自动驾驶责任场景，并使得待测驾驶政策行为不当。 HAR 使我们的框架能够发现多样化、复杂且与 AV 相关的危险场景。在三种环境中针对四种不同驾驶策略的实验结果表明，STARS 可以有效发现 AV 相关的危险场景。这些场景确实对应了待测驾驶策略的漏洞，因此对其进一步改进具有重要意义。 本文提出基于多智能体强化学习的STARS框架，通过引入危险仲裁奖励（HAR）发现自动驾驶策略中的AV责任事故场景，以提升安全测试效率。 Weilin Liu,Ye Mu,Chao Yu,Xuefei Ning,Zhong Cao,Yi Wu,Shuang Liang,Huazhong Yang,Yu Wang cs.RO,cs.AI

title: Few-shot Keypoint Detection with Uncertainty Learning for Unseen Species
title_zh: 针对不可见物种的具有不确定性学习的少样本关键点检测
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2022; 8 pages for main paper, 6 pages for supplementary materials
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2022; 8 pages for main paper, 6 pages for supplementary materials
abstract: Current non-rigid object keypoint detectors perform well on a chosen kind of species and body parts, and require a large amount of labelled keypoints for training. Moreover, their heatmaps, tailored to specific body parts, cannot recognize novel keypoints (keypoints not labelled for training) on unseen species. We raise an interesting yet challenging question: how to detect both base (annotated for training) and novel keypoints for unseen species given a few annotated samples? Thus, we propose a versatile Few-shot Keypoint Detection (FSKD) pipeline, which can detect a varying number of keypoints of different kinds. Our FSKD provides the uncertainty estimation of predicted keypoints. Specifically, FSKD involves main and auxiliary keypoint representation learning, similarity learning, and keypoint localization with uncertainty modeling to tackle the localization noise. Moreover, we model the uncertainty across groups of keypoints by multivariate Gaussian distribution to exploit implicit correlations between neighboring keypoints. We show the effectiveness of our FSKD on (i) novel keypoint detection for unseen species, and (ii) few-shot Fine-Grained Visual Recognition (FGVR) and (iii) Semantic Alignment (SA) downstream tasks. For FGVR, detected keypoints improve the classification accuracy. For SA, we showcase a novel thin-plate-spline warping that uses estimated keypoint uncertainty under imperfect keypoint corespondences.
summary: Current non-rigid object keypoint detectors perform well on a chosen kind of species and body parts, and require a large amount of labelled keypoints for training. Moreover, their heatmaps, tailored to specific body parts, cannot recognize novel keypoints (keypoints not labelled for training) on unseen species. We raise an interesting yet challenging question: how to detect both base (annotated for training) and novel keypoints for unseen species given a few annotated samples? Thus, we propose a versatile Few-shot Keypoint Detection (FSKD) pipeline, which can detect a varying number of keypoints of different kinds. Our FSKD provides the uncertainty estimation of predicted keypoints. Specifically, FSKD involves main and auxiliary keypoint representation learning, similarity learning, and keypoint localization with uncertainty modeling to tackle the localization noise. Moreover, we model the uncertainty across groups of keypoints by multivariate Gaussian distribution to exploit implicit correlations between neighboring keypoints. We show the effectiveness of our FSKD on (i) novel keypoint detection for unseen species, and (ii) few-shot Fine-Grained Visual Recognition (FGVR) and (iii) Semantic Alignment (SA) downstream tasks. For FGVR, detected keypoints improve the classification accuracy. For SA, we showcase a novel thin-plate-spline warping that uses estimated keypoint uncertainty under imperfect keypoint corespondences.
abstract_zh: 当前的非刚性物体关键点检测器在选定的物种和身体部位上表现良好，并且需要大量标记的关键点进行训练。此外，他们针对特定身体部位定制的热图无法识别未见过的物种的新关键点（未标记用于训练的关键点）。我们提出了一个有趣但具有挑战性的问题：如何在给定一些带注释的样本的情况下检测未见过的物种的基础（用于训练注释）和新颖的关键点？因此，我们提出了一种通用的少样本关键点检测（FSKD）管道，它可以检测不同数量的不同类型的关键点。我们的 FSKD 提供了预测关键点的不确定性估计。具体来说，FSKD 涉及主关键点表示学习和辅助关键点表示学习、相似性学习以及通过不确定性建模来解决定位噪声的关键点定位。此外，我们通过多元高斯分布对关键点组之间的不确定性进行建模，以利用相邻关键点之间的隐式相关性。我们展示了 FSKD 在以下方面的有效性：(i) 对未见过的物种的新颖关键点检测，以及 (ii) 少量细粒度视觉识别 (FGVR) 和 (iii) 语义对齐 (SA) 下游任务。对于 FGVR，检测到的关键点提高了分类精度。对于 SA，我们展示了一种新颖的薄板样条扭曲，它使用不完美关键点对应下的估计关键点不确定性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种少样本关键点检测方法，用于在未见物种上检测基础和新颖关键点，并通过不确定性学习处理定位噪声。
AI.motivation: 现有非刚性物体关键点检测器在特定物种和身体部位表现良好，但需大量标注数据且无法识别未见物种的新颖关键点，难以适应少量样本场景。
AI.method: 设计包含主/辅助关键点表示学习、相似性学习和不确定性建模的少样本关键点检测（FSKD）框架，利用多元高斯分布建模关键点组间相关性以提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在新颖关键点检测、少样本细粒度视觉识别（FGVR）和语义对齐（SA）任务中均取得显著效果，其中关键点检测提升分类准确率，不确定性指导的薄板样条变形优化了不完美对应关系的对齐。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过不确定性学习有效解决了少样本场景下未见物种关键点检测难题，并为细粒度视觉任务提供了新的技术路径。

authors_text: Bolivar Solarte,Yueh-Cheng Liu,Chin-Hsuan Wu,Yi-Hsuan Tsai,Min Sun
title: 360-DFPE: Leveraging Monocular 360-Layouts for Direct Floor Plan Estimation
title_zh: 360-DFPE：利用单目 360 度布局进行直接平面图估计
abstract: We present 360-DFPE, a sequential floor plan estimation method that directly takes 360-images as input without relying on active sensors or 3D information. Our approach leverages a loosely coupled integration between a monocular visual SLAM solution and a monocular 360-room layout approach, which estimate camera poses and layout geometries, respectively. Since our task is to sequentially capture the floor plan using monocular images, the entire scene structure, room instances, and room shapes are unknown. To tackle these challenges, we first handle the scale difference between visual odometry and layout geometry via formulating an entropy minimization process, which enables us to directly align 360-layouts without knowing the entire scene in advance. Second, to sequentially identify individual rooms, we propose a novel room identification algorithm that tracks every room along the camera exploration using geometry information. Lastly, to estimate the final shape of the room, we propose a shortest path algorithm with an iterative coarse-to-fine strategy, which improves prior formulations with higher accuracy and faster run-time. Moreover, we collect a new floor plan dataset with challenging large-scale scenes, providing both point clouds and sequential 360-image information. Experimental results show that our monocular solution achieves favorable performance against the current state-of-the-art algorithms that rely on active sensors and require the entire scene reconstruction data in advance.
summary: We present 360-DFPE, a sequential floor plan estimation method that directly takes 360-images as input without relying on active sensors or 3D information. Our approach leverages a loosely coupled integration between a monocular visual SLAM solution and a monocular 360-room layout approach, which estimate camera poses and layout geometries, respectively. Since our task is to sequentially capture the floor plan using monocular images, the entire scene structure, room instances, and room shapes are unknown. To tackle these challenges, we first handle the scale difference between visual odometry and layout geometry via formulating an entropy minimization process, which enables us to directly align 360-layouts without knowing the entire scene in advance. Second, to sequentially identify individual rooms, we propose a novel room identification algorithm that tracks every room along the camera exploration using geometry information. Lastly, to estimate the final shape of the room, we propose a shortest path algorithm with an iterative coarse-to-fine strategy, which improves prior formulations with higher accuracy and faster run-time. Moreover, we collect a new floor plan dataset with challenging large-scale scenes, providing both point clouds and sequential 360-image information. Experimental results show that our monocular solution achieves favorable performance against the current state-of-the-art algorithms that rely on active sensors and require the entire scene reconstruction data in advance.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 360-DFPE，一种顺序平面图估计方法，直接将 360 度图像作为输入，而不依赖于有源传感器或 3D 信息。我们的方法利用单目视觉 SLAM 解决方案和单目 360 房间布局方法之间的松散耦合集成，分别估计相机姿势和布局几何形状。由于我们的任务是使用单目图像顺序捕获平面图，因此整个场景结构、房间实例和房间形状都是未知的。为了应对这些挑战，我们首先通过制定熵最小化过程来处理视觉里程计和布局几何之间的比例差异，这使我们能够直接对齐 360 布局，而无需提前了解整个场景。其次，为了顺序识别各个房间，我们提出了一种新颖的房间识别算法，该算法使用几何信息沿着相机探索跟踪每个房间。最后，为了估计房间的最终形状，我们提出了一种具有迭代粗到细策略的最短路径算法，该算法以更高的精度和更快的运行时间改进了先前的公式。此外，我们还收集了具有挑战性的大型场景的新平面图数据集，提供点云和连续 360 度图像信息。实验结果表明，我们的单目解决方案相对于当前依赖有源传感器并需要提前提供整个场景重建数据的最先进算法取得了良好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需主动传感器或3D信息的单目360度图像直接平面图估计方法360-DFPE。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖主动传感器或完整场景重建数据，难以实现高效实时的平面图估计，且存在尺度差异和房间识别等挑战。
AI.method: 结合单目视觉SLAM与单目360房间布局方法，通过熵最小化对齐尺度差异，提出基于几何信息的房间追踪算法及迭代粗到细最短路径算法，并构建包含点云和序列360图像的新数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明，该单目方案在无需完整场景先验的情况下，性能优于依赖主动传感器的最先进算法。
AI.conclusion: 360-DFPE通过创新算法和数据集解决了单目平面图估计的尺度对齐与房间识别问题，实现了高效准确的实时平面图构建。

tldr: 本文提出了一种无需主动传感器或3D信息的单目360度图像直接平面图估计方法360-DFPE。
motivation: 现有方法依赖主动传感器或完整场景重建数据，难以实现高效实时的平面图估计，且存在尺度差异和房间识别等挑战。
method: 结合单目视觉SLAM与单目360房间布局方法，通过熵最小化对齐尺度差异，提出基于几何信息的房间追踪算法及迭代粗到细最短路径算法，并构建包含点云和序列360图像的新数据集。
result: 实验表明，该单目方案在无需完整场景先验的情况下，性能优于依赖主动传感器的最先进算法。
conclusion: 360-DFPE通过创新算法和数据集解决了单目平面图估计的尺度对齐与房间识别问题，实现了高效准确的实时平面图构建。
search_text: 360-DFPE: Leveraging Monocular 360-Layouts for Direct Floor Plan Estimation 360-DFPE：利用单目 360 度布局进行直接平面图估计 We present 360-DFPE, a sequential floor plan estimation method that directly takes 360-images as input without relying on active sensors or 3D information. Our approach leverages a loosely coupled integration between a monocular visual SLAM solution and a monocular 360-room layout approach, which estimate camera poses and layout geometries, respectively. Since our task is to sequentially capture the floor plan using monocular images, the entire scene structure, room instances, and room shapes are unknown. To tackle these challenges, we first handle the scale difference between visual odometry and layout geometry via formulating an entropy minimization process, which enables us to directly align 360-layouts without knowing the entire scene in advance. Second, to sequentially identify individual rooms, we propose a novel room identification algorithm that tracks every room along the camera exploration using geometry information. Lastly, to estimate the final shape of the room, we propose a shortest path algorithm with an iterative coarse-to-fine strategy, which improves prior formulations with higher accuracy and faster run-time. Moreover, we collect a new floor plan dataset with challenging large-scale scenes, providing both point clouds and sequential 360-image information. Experimental results show that our monocular solution achieves favorable performance against the current state-of-the-art algorithms that rely on active sensors and require the entire scene reconstruction data in advance. 我们提出了 360-DFPE，一种顺序平面图估计方法，直接将 360 度图像作为输入，而不依赖于有源传感器或 3D 信息。我们的方法利用单目视觉 SLAM 解决方案和单目 360 房间布局方法之间的松散耦合集成，分别估计相机姿势和布局几何形状。由于我们的任务是使用单目图像顺序捕获平面图，因此整个场景结构、房间实例和房间形状都是未知的。为了应对这些挑战，我们首先通过制定熵最小化过程来处理视觉里程计和布局几何之间的比例差异，这使我们能够直接对齐 360 布局，而无需提前了解整个场景。其次，为了顺序识别各个房间，我们提出了一种新颖的房间识别算法，该算法使用几何信息沿着相机探索跟踪每个房间。最后，为了估计房间的最终形状，我们提出了一种具有迭代粗到细策略的最短路径算法，该算法以更高的精度和更快的运行时间改进了先前的公式。此外，我们还收集了具有挑战性的大型场景的新平面图数据集，提供点云和连续 360 度图像信息。实验结果表明，我们的单目解决方案相对于当前依赖有源传感器并需要提前提供整个场景重建数据的最先进算法取得了良好的性能。 本文提出了一种无需主动传感器或3D信息的单目360度图像直接平面图估计方法360-DFPE。 Bolivar Solarte,Yueh-Cheng Liu,Chin-Hsuan Wu,Yi-Hsuan Tsai,Min Sun cs.CV

authors_text: Changgyoon Oh,Wonjune Cho,Daehee Park,Yujeong Chae,Lin Wang,Kuk-Jin Yoon
title: BIPS: Bi-modal Indoor Panorama Synthesis via Residual Depth-aided Adversarial Learning
title_zh: BIPS：通过残差深度辅助对抗学习进行双模态室内全景合成
abstract: Providing omnidirectional depth along with RGB information is important for numerous applications, eg, VR/AR. However, as omnidirectional RGB-D data is not always available, synthesizing RGB-D panorama data from limited information of a scene can be useful. Therefore, some prior works tried to synthesize RGB panorama images from perspective RGB images; however, they suffer from limited image quality and can not be directly extended for RGB-D panorama synthesis. In this paper, we study a new problem: RGB-D panorama synthesis under the arbitrary configurations of cameras and depth sensors. Accordingly, we propose a novel bi-modal (RGB-D) panorama synthesis (BIPS) framework. Especially, we focus on indoor environments where the RGB-D panorama can provide a complete 3D model for many applications. We design a generator that fuses the bi-modal information and train it with residual-aided adversarial learning (RDAL). RDAL allows to synthesize realistic indoor layout structures and interiors by jointly inferring RGB panorama, layout depth, and residual depth. In addition, as there is no tailored evaluation metric for RGB-D panorama synthesis, we propose a novel metric to effectively evaluate its perceptual quality. Extensive experiments show that our method synthesizes high-quality indoor RGB-D panoramas and provides realistic 3D indoor models than prior methods. Code will be released upon acceptance.
summary: Providing omnidirectional depth along with RGB information is important for numerous applications, eg, VR/AR. However, as omnidirectional RGB-D data is not always available, synthesizing RGB-D panorama data from limited information of a scene can be useful. Therefore, some prior works tried to synthesize RGB panorama images from perspective RGB images; however, they suffer from limited image quality and can not be directly extended for RGB-D panorama synthesis. In this paper, we study a new problem: RGB-D panorama synthesis under the arbitrary configurations of cameras and depth sensors. Accordingly, we propose a novel bi-modal (RGB-D) panorama synthesis (BIPS) framework. Especially, we focus on indoor environments where the RGB-D panorama can provide a complete 3D model for many applications. We design a generator that fuses the bi-modal information and train it with residual-aided adversarial learning (RDAL). RDAL allows to synthesize realistic indoor layout structures and interiors by jointly inferring RGB panorama, layout depth, and residual depth. In addition, as there is no tailored evaluation metric for RGB-D panorama synthesis, we propose a novel metric to effectively evaluate its perceptual quality. Extensive experiments show that our method synthesizes high-quality indoor RGB-D panoramas and provides realistic 3D indoor models than prior methods. Code will be released upon acceptance.
abstract_zh: 提供全向深度以及 RGB 信息对于 VR/AR 等众多应用非常重要。然而，由于全向 RGB-D 数据并不总是可用，因此从场景的有限信息合成 RGB-D 全景数据可能会很有用。因此，之前的一些工作尝试从透视RGB图像合成RGB全景图像；然而，它们的图像质量有限，不能直接扩展用于 RGB-D 全景合成。在本文中，我们研究了一个新问题：相机和深度传感器任意配置下的RGB-D全景合成。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的双模态（RGB-D）全景合成（BIPS）框架。我们特别关注室内环境，其中 RGB-D 全景图可以为许多应用提供完整的 3D 模型。我们设计了一个融合双模态信息的生成器，并使用残差辅助对抗学习（RDAL）对其进行训练。 RDAL 允许通过联合推断 RGB 全景、布局深度和残差深度来合成真实的室内布局结构和室内装饰。此外，由于 RGB-D 全景合成没有量身定制的评估指标，因此我们提出了一种新的指标来有效评估其感知质量。大量实验表明，与现有方法相比，我们的方法可以合成高质量的室内 RGB-D 全景图，并提供逼真的 3D 室内模型。代码将在接受后发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双模室内全景合成框架BIPS，通过残差深度辅助对抗学习生成高质量的RGB-D全景数据。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在合成RGB全景图像时存在质量限制且无法直接扩展至RGB-D全景合成，同时缺乏针对性的评估指标。
AI.method: 设计融合RGB-D双模信息的生成器，采用残差辅助对抗学习（RDAL）联合推理RGB全景、布局深度和残差深度，并提出新的感知质量评估指标。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法生成的室内RGB-D全景质量优于现有方法，可提供更真实的3D室内模型。
AI.conclusion: BIPS框架有效解决了RGB-D全景合成问题，同时为该领域提供了新的评估标准。

title: Unsupervised Domain-Specific Deblurring using Scale-Specific Attention
title_zh: 使用特定尺度注意力的无监督特定领域去模糊
abstract: In the literature, coarse-to-fine or scale-recurrent approach i.e. progressively restoring a clean image from its low-resolution versions has been successfully employed for single image deblurring. However, a major disadvantage of existing methods is the need for paired data; i.e. sharpblur image pairs of the same scene, which is a complicated and cumbersome acquisition procedure. Additionally, due to strong supervision on loss functions, pre-trained models of such networks are strongly biased towards the blur experienced during training and tend to give sub-optimal performance when confronted by new blur kernels during inference time. To address the above issues, we propose unsupervised domain-specific deblurring using a scale-adaptive attention module (SAAM). Our network does not require supervised pairs for training, and the deblurring mechanism is primarily guided by adversarial loss, thus making our network suitable for a distribution of blur functions. Given a blurred input image, different resolutions of the same image are used in our model during training and SAAM allows for effective flow of information across the resolutions. For network training at a specific scale, SAAM attends to lower scale features as a function of the current scale. Different ablation studies show that our coarse-to-fine mechanism outperforms end-to-end unsupervised models and SAAM is able to attend better compared to attention models used in literature. Qualitative and quantitative comparisons (on no-reference metrics) show that our method outperforms prior unsupervised methods.
summary: In the literature, coarse-to-fine or scale-recurrent approach i.e. progressively restoring a clean image from its low-resolution versions has been successfully employed for single image deblurring. However, a major disadvantage of existing methods is the need for paired data; i.e. sharpblur image pairs of the same scene, which is a complicated and cumbersome acquisition procedure. Additionally, due to strong supervision on loss functions, pre-trained models of such networks are strongly biased towards the blur experienced during training and tend to give sub-optimal performance when confronted by new blur kernels during inference time. To address the above issues, we propose unsupervised domain-specific deblurring using a scale-adaptive attention module (SAAM). Our network does not require supervised pairs for training, and the deblurring mechanism is primarily guided by adversarial loss, thus making our network suitable for a distribution of blur functions. Given a blurred input image, different resolutions of the same image are used in our model during training and SAAM allows for effective flow of information across the resolutions. For network training at a specific scale, SAAM attends to lower scale features as a function of the current scale. Different ablation studies show that our coarse-to-fine mechanism outperforms end-to-end unsupervised models and SAAM is able to attend better compared to attention models used in literature. Qualitative and quantitative comparisons (on no-reference metrics) show that our method outperforms prior unsupervised methods.
abstract_zh: 在文献中，从粗到细或尺度循环方法，即从低分辨率版本逐步恢复干净图像，已成功用于单图像去模糊。然而，现有方法的一个主要缺点是需要配对数据；即同一场景的锐模糊图像对，这是一个复杂且繁琐的采集过程。此外，由于对损失函数的严格监督，此类网络的预训练模型强烈偏向于训练期间经历的模糊，并且在推理期间遇到新的模糊核时往往会给出次优的性能。为了解决上述问题，我们提出使用尺度自适应注意模块（SAAM）进行无监督的特定领域去模糊。我们的网络不需要监督对进行训练，并且去模糊机制主要由对抗性损失引导，从而使我们的网络适合模糊函数的分布。给定模糊的输入图像，在训练期间我们的模型中使用同一图像的不同分辨率，并且 SAAM 允许跨分辨率的有效信息流。对于特定规模的网络训练，SAAM 将较低规模的特征作为当前规模的函数。不同的消融研究表明，我们的从粗到细的机制优于端到端无监督模型，并且与文献中使用的注意力模型相比，SAAM 能够更好地参与。定性和定量比较（在无参考指标上）表明我们的方法优于先前的无监督方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需配对数据的无监督领域特定去模糊方法，通过尺度自适应注意力模块（SAAM）实现跨分辨率的信息流动。
AI.motivation: 现有去模糊方法依赖配对数据且对训练中的模糊类型存在偏差，导致在新模糊核下的性能不佳。本文旨在解决无监督场景下无需配对数据且适应多种模糊分布的问题。
AI.method: 采用粗到细的框架结合SAAM模块，利用不同分辨率图像进行训练，通过对抗损失引导去模糊过程，SAAM根据当前尺度动态关注低尺度特征。
AI.result: 消融实验表明该方法优于端到端无监督模型，定性和定量实验（基于无参考指标）显示其优于现有无监督方法。
AI.conclusion: SAAM有效解决了无监督去模糊中配对数据依赖和模糊分布适应性问题，为领域特定去模糊提供了新思路。

Our network does not require supervised pairs for training, and the deblurring mechanism is primarily guided by adversarial loss, thus making our network suitable for a distribution of blur functions. Given a blurred input image, different resolutions of the same image are used in our model during training and SAAM allows for effective flow of information across the resolutions. For network training at a specific scale, SAAM attends to lower scale features as a function of the current scale. Different ablation studies show that our coarse-to-fine mechanism outperforms end-to-end unsupervised models and SAAM is able to attend better compared to attention models used in literature. Qualitative and quantitative comparisons (on no-reference metrics) show that our method outperforms prior unsupervised methods. 在文献中，从粗到细或尺度循环方法，即从低分辨率版本逐步恢复干净图像，已成功用于单图像去模糊。然而，现有方法的一个主要缺点是需要配对数据；即同一场景的锐模糊图像对，这是一个复杂且繁琐的采集过程。此外，由于对损失函数的严格监督，此类网络的预训练模型强烈偏向于训练期间经历的模糊，并且在推理期间遇到新的模糊核时往往会给出次优的性能。为了解决上述问题，我们提出使用尺度自适应注意模块（SAAM）进行无监督的特定领域去模糊。我们的网络不需要监督对进行训练，并且去模糊机制主要由对抗性损失引导，从而使我们的网络适合模糊函数的分布。给定模糊的输入图像，在训练期间我们的模型中使用同一图像的不同分辨率，并且 SAAM 允许跨分辨率的有效信息流。对于特定规模的网络训练，SAAM 将较低规模的特征作为当前规模的函数。不同的消融研究表明，我们的从粗到细的机制优于端到端无监督模型，并且与文献中使用的注意力模型相比，SAAM 能够更好地参与。定性和定量比较（在无参考指标上）表明我们的方法优于先前的无监督方法。 本文提出了一种无需配对数据的无监督领域特定去模糊方法，通过尺度自适应注意力模块（SAAM）实现跨分辨率的信息流动。 Praveen Kandula,Rajagopalan. A. N cs.CV

title: Implicit Transformer Network for Screen Content Image Continuous Super-Resolution
title_zh: 用于屏幕内容图像连续超分辨率的隐式变压器网络
abstract: Nowadays, there is an explosive growth of screen contents due to the wide application of screen sharing, remote cooperation, and online education. To match the limited terminal bandwidth, high-resolution (HR) screen contents may be downsampled and compressed. At the receiver side, the super-resolution (SR) of low-resolution (LR) screen content images (SCIs) is highly demanded by the HR display or by the users to zoom in for detail observation. However, image SR methods mostly designed for natural images do not generalize well for SCIs due to the very different image characteristics as well as the requirement of SCI browsing at arbitrary scales. To this end, we propose a novel Implicit Transformer Super-Resolution Network (ITSRN) for SCISR. For high-quality continuous SR at arbitrary ratios, pixel values at query coordinates are inferred from image features at key coordinates by the proposed implicit transformer and an implicit position encoding scheme is proposed to aggregate similar neighboring pixel values to the query one. We construct benchmark SCI1K and SCI1K-compression datasets with LR and HR SCI pairs. Extensive experiments show that the proposed ITSRN significantly outperforms several competitive continuous and discrete SR methods for both compressed and uncompressed SCIs.
summary: Nowadays, there is an explosive growth of screen contents due to the wide application of screen sharing, remote cooperation, and online education. To match the limited terminal bandwidth, high-resolution (HR) screen contents may be downsampled and compressed. At the receiver side, the super-resolution (SR) of low-resolution (LR) screen content images (SCIs) is highly demanded by the HR display or by the users to zoom in for detail observation. However, image SR methods mostly designed for natural images do not generalize well for SCIs due to the very different image characteristics as well as the requirement of SCI browsing at arbitrary scales. To this end, we propose a novel Implicit Transformer Super-Resolution Network (ITSRN) for SCISR. For high-quality continuous SR at arbitrary ratios, pixel values at query coordinates are inferred from image features at key coordinates by the proposed implicit transformer and an implicit position encoding scheme is proposed to aggregate similar neighboring pixel values to the query one. We construct benchmark SCI1K and SCI1K-compression datasets with LR and HR SCI pairs. Extensive experiments show that the proposed ITSRN significantly outperforms several competitive continuous and discrete SR methods for both compressed and uncompressed SCIs.
abstract_zh: 如今，由于屏幕共享、远程协作、在线教育等广泛应用，屏幕内容呈现爆发式增长。为了匹配有限的终端带宽，可以对高分辨率（HR）屏幕内容进行下采样和压缩。在接收端，HR 显示​​或用户放大以进行细节观察时，对低分辨率 (LR) 屏幕内容图像 (SCI) 的超分辨率 (SR) 要求很高。然而，由于图像特征差异很大以及任意尺度的 SCI 浏览要求，主要针对自然图像设计的图像 SR 方法不能很好地推广到 SCI。为此，我们为 SCISR 提出了一种新颖的隐式变压器超分辨率网络（ITSRN）。对于任意比率的高质量连续 SR，查询坐标处的像素值是通过所提出的隐式变换器从关键坐标处的图像特征推断出来的，并且提出了一种隐式位置编码方案来将相似的相邻像素值聚合到查询像素值。我们使用 LR 和 HR SCI 对构建基准 SCI1K 和 SCI1K 压缩数据集。大量实验表明，对于压缩和未压缩的 SCI，所提出的 ITSRN 显着优于几种有竞争力的连续和离散 SR 方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种隐式Transformer网络（ITSRN）用于屏幕内容图像的连续超分辨率，以解决现有方法在压缩和未压缩屏幕内容图像上的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有超分辨率方法多针对自然图像，难以处理屏幕内容图像（SCIs）的特殊特征及任意尺度浏览需求，需开发专用方法。
AI.method: 提出隐式Transformer网络（ITSRN），结合隐式位置编码，通过查询坐标推断像素值并聚合邻域信息，实现任意比例的高质量连续超分辨率。
AI.result: 在SCI1K和SCI1K-compression数据集上，ITSRN在压缩和未压缩屏幕内容图像的连续超分辨率任务中显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: ITSRN有效解决了屏幕内容图像的连续超分辨率问题，验证了隐式Transformer和位置编码方案在处理SCIs中的优越性。

title: Temporal Interval Cliques and Independent Sets
title_zh: 时间间隔派系和独立集
abstract: Temporal graphs have been recently introduced to model changes to a given network that occur throughout a fixed period of time. The Temporal $Δ$ Clique problem, that generalizes the well known Clique problem to temporal graphs, has been studied in the context of finding nodes of interest in dynamic networks [TCS '16]. We introduce the Temporal $Δ$ Independent Set problem, a temporal generalization of Independent Set. This problem is e.g. motivated in the context of finding conflict-free schedules for maximum subsets of tasks, that have certain (changing) constraints on each day they need to be performed. We are specifically interested in the case where each task needs to be performed in a certain time-interval on each day and two tasks are in conflict on a certain day if their time-intervals on that day overlap. This leads us to considering both problems on the restricted class of temporal unit interval graphs, i.e., temporal graphs where each layer is a unit interval graph. We present several hardness results as well as positive results. On the algorithmic side, we provide constant-factor approximation algorithms for instances of both problems where $τ$, the total number of time steps (layers) of the temporal graph, and $Δ$, a parameter that allows us to model conflict tolerance, are constants. We develop an exact FPT algorithm for Temporal $Δ$ Clique with respect to parameter $τ+k$. Finally, we use the notion of order preservation for temporal unit interval graphs that, informally, requires the intervals of every layer to obey a common ordering. For both problems we provide an FPT algorithm parameterized by the size of minimum vertex deletion set to order preservation.
summary: Temporal graphs have been recently introduced to model changes to a given network that occur throughout a fixed period of time. The Temporal $Δ$ Clique problem, that generalizes the well known Clique problem to temporal graphs, has been studied in the context of finding nodes of interest in dynamic networks [TCS '16]. We introduce the Temporal $Δ$ Independent Set problem, a temporal generalization of Independent Set. This problem is e.g. motivated in the context of finding conflict-free schedules for maximum subsets of tasks, that have certain (changing) constraints on each day they need to be performed. We are specifically interested in the case where each task needs to be performed in a certain time-interval on each day and two tasks are in conflict on a certain day if their time-intervals on that day overlap. This leads us to considering both problems on the restricted class of temporal unit interval graphs, i.e., temporal graphs where each layer is a unit interval graph. We present several hardness results as well as positive results. On the algorithmic side, we provide constant-factor approximation algorithms for instances of both problems where $τ$, the total number of time steps (layers) of the temporal graph, and $Δ$, a parameter that allows us to model conflict tolerance, are constants. We develop an exact FPT algorithm for Temporal $Δ$ Clique with respect to parameter $τ+k$. Finally, we use the notion of order preservation for temporal unit interval graphs that, informally, requires the intervals of every layer to obey a common ordering. For both problems we provide an FPT algorithm parameterized by the size of minimum vertex deletion set to order preservation.
abstract_zh: 最近引入了时间图来对给定网络在固定时间段内发生的变化进行建模。时间 $Δ$ Clique 问题将众所周知的 Clique 问题推广到时间图，已在动态网络中查找感兴趣的节点的背景下进行了研究 [TCS '16]。我们引入时间 $Δ$ 独立集问题，这是独立集的时间推广。这个问题是例如其动机是为任务的最大子集找到无冲突的时间表，这些任务对每天需要执行的任务有一定的（变化的）约束。我们特别感兴趣的是这样的情况：每个任务需要在每天的特定时间间隔内执行，并且如果两个任务在某一天的时间间隔重叠，则它们在某一天会发生冲突。这导致我们考虑时间单位区间图的限制类上的两个问题，即每层都是单位区间图的时间图。我们提供了一些硬度结果以及积极的结果。在算法方面，我们为两个问题的实例提供常数因子近似算法，其中 $τ$（时间图的时间步（层）总数）和 $Δ$（允许我们建模冲突容忍度的参数）是常数。我们针对参数 $τ+k$ 为时间 $Δ$ Clique 开发了一种精确的 FPT 算法。最后，我们对时间单位区间图使用顺序保留的概念，非正式地要求每层的区间遵守共同的顺序。对于这两个问题，我们提供了一种 FPT 算法，该算法通过最小顶点删除集的大小来参数化以保存顺序。

AI.tldr: 本文研究时间图中的Δ团和Δ独立集问题，分析其在时间单位区间图上的算法复杂性，并提出多项式时间近似算法和参数化算法。
AI.motivation: 动态网络中任务调度存在时间相关约束，需推广传统独立集问题以处理随时间变化的冲突关系，例如每日任务时间段重叠的冲突检测。
AI.method: 采用近似算法与参数化算法，包括基于时间步数τ和冲突容忍度Δ的常数近似算法、以τ+k为参数的精确FPT算法，以及基于顶点删除集的FPT算法。
AI.result: 证明问题硬度，提出常数近似算法、精确FPT算法及参数化FPT算法，适用于时间单位区间图和满足顺序保持性质的图结构。
AI.conclusion: 通过理论分析与算法设计，为动态网络中的冲突调度问题提供了有效解决方案，拓展了传统图论问题在时间图场景下的应用边界。

For both problems we provide an FPT algorithm parameterized by the size of minimum vertex deletion set to order preservation. 最近引入了时间图来对给定网络在固定时间段内发生的变化进行建模。时间 $Δ$ Clique 问题将众所周知的 Clique 问题推广到时间图，已在动态网络中查找感兴趣的节点的背景下进行了研究 [TCS '16]。我们引入时间 $Δ$ 独立集问题，这是独立集的时间推广。这个问题是例如其动机是为任务的最大子集找到无冲突的时间表，这些任务对每天需要执行的任务有一定的（变化的）约束。我们特别感兴趣的是这样的情况：每个任务需要在每天的特定时间间隔内执行，并且如果两个任务在某一天的时间间隔重叠，则它们在某一天会发生冲突。这导致我们考虑时间单位区间图的限制类上的两个问题，即每层都是单位区间图的时间图。我们提供了一些硬度结果以及积极的结果。在算法方面，我们为两个问题的实例提供常数因子近似算法，其中 $τ$（时间图的时间步（层）总数）和 $Δ$（允许我们建模冲突容忍度的参数）是常数。我们针对参数 $τ+k$ 为时间 $Δ$ Clique 开发了一种精确的 FPT 算法。最后，我们对时间单位区间图使用顺序保留的概念，非正式地要求每层的区间遵守共同的顺序。对于这两个问题，我们提供了一种 FPT 算法，该算法通过最小顶点删除集的大小来参数化以保存顺序。 本文研究时间图中的Δ团和Δ独立集问题，分析其在时间单位区间图上的算法复杂性，并提出多项式时间近似算法和参数化算法。 Danny Hermelin,Yuval Itzhaki,Hendrik Molter,Rolf Niedermeier cs.DS,cs.DM

authors_text: Hyeokjun Kweon,Hyeonseong Kim,Yoonsu Kang,Youngho Yoon,Wooseong Jeong,Kuk-Jin Yoon
title: Pixel-wise Deep Image Stitching
title_zh: 逐像素深度图像拼接
abstract: Image stitching aims at stitching the images taken from different viewpoints into an image with a wider field of view. Existing methods warp the target image to the reference image using the estimated warp function, and a homography is one of the most commonly used warping functions. However, when images have large parallax due to non-planar scenes and translational motion of a camera, the homography cannot fully describe the mapping between two images. Existing approaches based on global or local homography estimation are not free from this problem and suffer from undesired artifacts due to parallax. In this paper, instead of relying on the homography-based warp, we propose a novel deep image stitching framework exploiting the pixel-wise warp field to handle the large-parallax problem. The proposed deep image stitching framework consists of two modules: Pixel-wise Warping Module (PWM) and Stitched Image Generating Module (SIGMo). PWM employs an optical flow estimation model to obtain pixel-wise warp of the whole image, and relocates the pixels of the target image with the obtained warp field. SIGMo blends the warped target image and the reference image while eliminating unwanted artifacts such as misalignments, seams, and holes that harm the plausibility of the stitched result. For training and evaluating the proposed framework, we build a large-scale dataset that includes image pairs with corresponding pixel-wise ground truth warp and sample stitched result images. We show that the results of the proposed framework are qualitatively superior to those of the conventional methods, especially when the images have large parallax. The code and the proposed dataset will be publicly available soon.
summary: Image stitching aims at stitching the images taken from different viewpoints into an image with a wider field of view. Existing methods warp the target image to the reference image using the estimated warp function, and a homography is one of the most commonly used warping functions. However, when images have large parallax due to non-planar scenes and translational motion of a camera, the homography cannot fully describe the mapping between two images. Existing approaches based on global or local homography estimation are not free from this problem and suffer from undesired artifacts due to parallax. In this paper, instead of relying on the homography-based warp, we propose a novel deep image stitching framework exploiting the pixel-wise warp field to handle the large-parallax problem. The proposed deep image stitching framework consists of two modules: Pixel-wise Warping Module (PWM) and Stitched Image Generating Module (SIGMo). PWM employs an optical flow estimation model to obtain pixel-wise warp of the whole image, and relocates the pixels of the target image with the obtained warp field. SIGMo blends the warped target image and the reference image while eliminating unwanted artifacts such as misalignments, seams, and holes that harm the plausibility of the stitched result. For training and evaluating the proposed framework, we build a large-scale dataset that includes image pairs with corresponding pixel-wise ground truth warp and sample stitched result images. We show that the results of the proposed framework are qualitatively superior to those of the conventional methods, especially when the images have large parallax. The code and the proposed dataset will be publicly available soon.
abstract_zh: 图像拼接的目的是将不同视点拍摄的图像拼接成具有更宽视野的图像。现有方法使用估计的扭曲函数将目标图像扭曲到参考图像，单应性是最常用的扭曲函数之一。然而，当图像由于非平面场景和平移运动而具有较大视差时，单应性无法完全描述两个图像之间的映射。基于全局或​​局部单应性估计的现有方法并不能摆脱这个问题，并且会因视差而遭受不期望的伪像。在本文中，我们不依赖基于单应性的扭曲，而是提出了一种新颖的深度图像拼接框架，利用像素级扭曲场来处理大视差问题。所提出的深度图像拼接框架由两个模块组成：逐像素变形模块（PWM）和拼接图像生成模块（SIGMo）。 PWM采用光流估计模型来获得整个图像的像素级扭曲，并利用获得的扭曲场重新定位目标图像的像素。 SIGMo 将扭曲的目标图像和参考图像混合在一起，同时消除不想要的伪影，例如损害拼接结果可信度的错位、接缝和孔洞。为了训练和评估所提出的框架，我们构建了一个大规模数据集，其中包括具有相应像素级地面真实扭曲的图像对和样本拼接结果图像。我们表明，所提出的框架的结果在质量上优于传统方法，特别是当图像具有大视差时。代码和建议的数据集将很快公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于像素级变形场的深度图像拼接框架，用于解决非平面场景和相机平移运动导致的大视差问题。
AI.motivation: 传统基于单应性变换的图像拼接方法在处理大视差场景时会产生错位、接缝和空洞等伪影，无法满足复杂场景需求。
AI.method: 框架包含两个模块：像素级变形模块（PWM）通过光流估计模型获取全图像素级变形场，拼接图像生成模块（SIGMo）融合变形后的目标图像与参考图像并消除伪影。同时构建了包含像素级真实变形场的大规模数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架在大视差场景下的拼接效果显著优于传统方法，生成的图像在视觉质量上更具合理性。
AI.conclusion: 像素级变形场方法有效解决了大视差拼接问题，验证了深度学习在图像拼接任务中的优势，为后续研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Praveen K,Lokesh Kumar T,A. N. Rajagopalan
title: Deep network for rolling shutter rectification
title_zh: 用于卷帘快门校正的深度网络
abstract: CMOS sensors employ row-wise acquisition mechanism while imaging a scene, which can result in undesired motion artifacts known as rolling shutter (RS) distortions in the captured image. Existing single image RS rectification methods attempt to account for these distortions by either using algorithms tailored for specific class of scenes which warrants information of intrinsic camera parameters or a learning-based framework with known ground truth motion parameters. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end deep neural network for the challenging task of single image RS rectification. Our network consists of a motion block, a trajectory module, a row block, an RS rectification module and an RS regeneration module (which is used only during training). The motion block predicts camera pose for every row of the input RS distorted image while the trajectory module fits estimated motion parameters to a third-order polynomial. The row block predicts the camera motion that must be associated with every pixel in the target i.e, RS rectified image. Finally, the RS rectification module uses motion trajectory and the output of row block to warp the input RS image to arrive at a distortionfree image. For faster convergence during training, we additionally use an RS regeneration module which compares the input RS image with the ground truth image distorted by estimated motion parameters. The end-to-end formulation in our model does not constrain the estimated motion to ground-truth motion parameters, thereby successfully rectifying the RS images with complex real-life camera motion. Experiments on synthetic and real datasets reveal that our network outperforms prior art both qualitatively and quantitatively.

Existing single image RS rectification methods attempt to account for these distortions by either using algorithms tailored for specific class of scenes which warrants information of intrinsic camera parameters or a learning-based framework with known ground truth motion parameters. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end deep neural network for the challenging task of single image RS rectification. Our network consists of a motion block, a trajectory module, a row block, an RS rectification module and an RS regeneration module (which is used only during training). The motion block predicts camera pose for every row of the input RS distorted image while the trajectory module fits estimated motion parameters to a third-order polynomial. The row block predicts the camera motion that must be associated with every pixel in the target i.e, RS rectified image. Finally, the RS rectification module uses motion trajectory and the output of row block to warp the input RS image to arrive at a distortionfree image. For faster convergence during training, we additionally use an RS regeneration module which compares the input RS image with the ground truth image distorted by estimated motion parameters. The end-to-end formulation in our model does not constrain the estimated motion to ground-truth motion parameters, thereby successfully rectifying the RS images with complex real-life camera motion. Experiments on synthetic and real datasets reveal that our network outperforms prior art both qualitatively and quantitatively.
abstract_zh: CMOS 传感器在对场景进行成像时采用行式采集机制，这可能会导致捕获的图像中出现不需要的运动伪影，即卷帘快门 (RS) 失真。现有的单图像 RS 校正方法试图通过使用为特定类别的场景量身定制的算法（保证内部相机参数的信息）或具有已知地面真实运动参数的基于学习的框架来解决这些失真。在本文中，我们提出了一种端到端深度神经网络，用于处理单图像 RS 校正这一具有挑战性的任务。我们的网络由运动块、轨迹模块、行块、RS 校正模块和 RS 再生模块（仅在训练期间使用）组成。运动块预测输入 RS 失真图像的每一行的相机姿态，而轨迹模块将估计的运动参数拟合到三阶多项式。行块预测必须与目标（即 RS 校正图像）中的每个像素相关联的相机运动。最后，RS校正模块使用运动轨迹和行块的输出来扭曲输入RS图像以获得无失真图像。为了在训练过程中更快地收敛，我们还使用了 RS 再生模块，该模块将输入 RS 图像与估计运动参数扭曲的地面实况图像进行比较。我们模型中的端到端公式不会将估计的运动限制为地面真实运动参数，从而成功地纠正具有复杂的现实相机运动的 RS 图像。对合成数据集和真实数据集的实验表明，我们的网络在质量和数量上都优于现有技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的深度神经网络，用于解决单张图像中的滚动快门（RS）失真问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的单图像RS校正方法通常依赖特定场景的算法或已知的运动参数，难以处理复杂的真实场景中的RS失真。
AI.method: 该网络包含运动块、轨迹模块、行块、RS校正模块和RS再生模块（仅在训练时使用），通过预测相机姿态和运动轨迹，将输入的RS失真图像转换为无失真的图像。
AI.result: 实验表明，该网络在合成和真实数据集上均优于现有方法，具有较高的定性和定量性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过端到端的深度学习框架，成功校正了复杂真实场景中的RS失真，具有广泛的应用前景。

For faster convergence during training, we additionally use an RS regeneration module which compares the input RS image with the ground truth image distorted by estimated motion parameters. The end-to-end formulation in our model does not constrain the estimated motion to ground-truth motion parameters, thereby successfully rectifying the RS images with complex real-life camera motion. Experiments on synthetic and real datasets reveal that our network outperforms prior art both qualitatively and quantitatively. CMOS 传感器在对场景进行成像时采用行式采集机制，这可能会导致捕获的图像中出现不需要的运动伪影，即卷帘快门 (RS) 失真。现有的单图像 RS 校正方法试图通过使用为特定类别的场景量身定制的算法（保证内部相机参数的信息）或具有已知地面真实运动参数的基于学习的框架来解决这些失真。在本文中，我们提出了一种端到端深度神经网络，用于处理单图像 RS 校正这一具有挑战性的任务。我们的网络由运动块、轨迹模块、行块、RS 校正模块和 RS 再生模块（仅在训练期间使用）组成。运动块预测输入 RS 失真图像的每一行的相机姿态，而轨迹模块将估计的运动参数拟合到三阶多项式。行块预测必须与目标（即 RS 校正图像）中的每个像素相关联的相机运动。最后，RS校正模块使用运动轨迹和行块的输出来扭曲输入RS图像以获得无失真图像。为了在训练过程中更快地收敛，我们还使用了 RS 再生模块，该模块将输入 RS 图像与估计运动参数扭曲的地面实况图像进行比较。我们模型中的端到端公式不会将估计的运动限制为地面真实运动参数，从而成功地纠正具有复杂的现实相机运动的 RS 图像。对合成数据集和真实数据集的实验表明，我们的网络在质量和数量上都优于现有技术。 本文提出了一种端到端的深度神经网络，用于解决单张图像中的滚动快门（RS）失真问题。 Praveen K,Lokesh Kumar T,A. N. Rajagopalan cs.CV

authors_text: Can Qin,Lichen Wang,Qianqian Ma,Yu Yin,Huan Wang,Yun Fu
title: Semi-supervised Domain Adaptive Structure Learning
title_zh: 半监督领域自适应结构学习
abstract: Semi-supervised domain adaptation (SSDA) is quite a challenging problem requiring methods to overcome both 1) overfitting towards poorly annotated data and 2) distribution shift across domains. Unfortunately, a simple combination of domain adaptation (DA) and semi-supervised learning (SSL) methods often fail to address such two objects because of training data bias towards labeled samples. In this paper, we introduce an adaptive structure learning method to regularize the cooperation of SSL and DA. Inspired by the multi-views learning, our proposed framework is composed of a shared feature encoder network and two classifier networks, trained for contradictory purposes. Among them, one of the classifiers is applied to group target features to improve intra-class density, enlarging the gap of categorical clusters for robust representation learning. Meanwhile, the other classifier, serviced as a regularizer, attempts to scatter the source features to enhance the smoothness of the decision boundary. The iterations of target clustering and source expansion make the target features being well-enclosed inside the dilated boundary of the corresponding source points. For the joint address of cross-domain features alignment and partially labeled data learning, we apply the maximum mean discrepancy (MMD) distance minimization and self-training (ST) to project the contradictory structures into a shared view to make the reliable final decision. The experimental results over the standard SSDA benchmarks, including DomainNet and Office-home, demonstrate both the accuracy and robustness of our method over the state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Semi-supervised domain adaptation (SSDA) is quite a challenging problem requiring methods to overcome both 1) overfitting towards poorly annotated data and 2) distribution shift across domains. Unfortunately, a simple combination of domain adaptation (DA) and semi-supervised learning (SSL) methods often fail to address such two objects because of training data bias towards labeled samples. In this paper, we introduce an adaptive structure learning method to regularize the cooperation of SSL and DA. Inspired by the multi-views learning, our proposed framework is composed of a shared feature encoder network and two classifier networks, trained for contradictory purposes. Among them, one of the classifiers is applied to group target features to improve intra-class density, enlarging the gap of categorical clusters for robust representation learning. Meanwhile, the other classifier, serviced as a regularizer, attempts to scatter the source features to enhance the smoothness of the decision boundary. The iterations of target clustering and source expansion make the target features being well-enclosed inside the dilated boundary of the corresponding source points. For the joint address of cross-domain features alignment and partially labeled data learning, we apply the maximum mean discrepancy (MMD) distance minimization and self-training (ST) to project the contradictory structures into a shared view to make the reliable final decision. The experimental results over the standard SSDA benchmarks, including DomainNet and Office-home, demonstrate both the accuracy and robustness of our method over the state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 半监督域适应（SSDA）是一个相当具有挑战性的问题，需要方法来克服 1）对注释不良的数据的过度拟合和 2）跨域的分布转移。不幸的是，由于训练数据偏向标记样本，领域适应（DA）和半监督学习（SSL）方法的简单组合通常无法解决这两个目标。在本文中，我们引入了一种自适应结构学习方法来规范 SSL 和 DA 的合作。受多视图学习的启发，我们提出的框架由一个共享特征编码器网络和两个分类器网络组成，为相互矛盾的目的进行训练。其中，其中一个分类器应用于对目标特征进行分组，以提高类内密度，扩大分类簇的差距，以实现鲁棒的表示学习。同时，另一个分类器作为正则化器，尝试分散源特征以增强决策边界的平滑度。目标聚类和源扩展的迭代使得目标特征被很好地封闭在相应源点的扩展边界内。对于跨域特征对齐和部分标记数据学习的联合解决，我们应用最大平均差异（MMD）距离最小化和自训练（ST）将矛盾结构投影到共享视图中以做出可靠的最终决策。标准 SSDA 基准（包括 DomainNet 和 Office-home）的实验结果证明了我们的方法相对于最先进的方法的准确性和鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督领域自适应结构学习方法，解决领域分布偏移和标注数据不足的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督领域自适应方法因训练数据偏向标注样本而难以同时解决过拟合和领域分布偏移问题。
AI.method: 基于多视角学习框架，设计共享特征编码器与两个矛盾目标分类器：一个聚类目标特征以增强类内密度，另一个扩散源特征以优化决策边界，并结合MMD距离最小化与自训练策略实现跨领域对齐。
AI.result: 在DomainNet和Office-Home基准测试中，该方法在准确率和鲁棒性上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过结构化正则化联合优化领域对齐与半监督学习，有效提升了跨领域场景下的模型泛化能力。

title: Maintaining AUC and $H$-measure over time
title_zh: 随着时间的推移维持 AUC 和 $H$ 测量
abstract: Measuring the performance of a classifier is a vital task in machine learning. The running time of an algorithm that computes the measure plays a very small role in an offline setting, for example, when the classifier is being developed by a researcher. However, the running time becomes more crucial if our goal is to monitor the performance of a classifier over time. In this paper we study three algorithms for maintaining two measures. The first algorithm maintains area under the ROC curve (AUC) under addition and deletion of data points in $O(\log n)$ time. This is done by maintaining the data points sorted in a self-balanced search tree. In addition, we augment the search tree that allows us to query the ROC coordinates of a data point in $O(\log n)$ time. In doing so we are able to maintain AUC in $O(\log n)$ time. Our next two algorithms involve in maintaining $H$-measure, an alternative measure based on the ROC curve. Computing the measure is a two-step process: first we need to compute a convex hull of the ROC curve, followed by a sum over the convex hull. We demonstrate that we can maintain the convex hull using a minor modification of the classic convex hull maintenance algorithm. We then show that under certain conditions, we can compute the $H$-measure exactly in $O(\log^2 n)$ time, and if the conditions are not met, then we can estimate the $H$-measure in $O((\log n + ε^{-1})\log n)$ time. We show empirically that our methods are significantly faster than the baselines.
summary: Measuring the performance of a classifier is a vital task in machine learning. The running time of an algorithm that computes the measure plays a very small role in an offline setting, for example, when the classifier is being developed by a researcher. However, the running time becomes more crucial if our goal is to monitor the performance of a classifier over time. In this paper we study three algorithms for maintaining two measures. The first algorithm maintains area under the ROC curve (AUC) under addition and deletion of data points in $O(\log n)$ time. This is done by maintaining the data points sorted in a self-balanced search tree. In addition, we augment the search tree that allows us to query the ROC coordinates of a data point in $O(\log n)$ time. In doing so we are able to maintain AUC in $O(\log n)$ time. Our next two algorithms involve in maintaining $H$-measure, an alternative measure based on the ROC curve. Computing the measure is a two-step process: first we need to compute a convex hull of the ROC curve, followed by a sum over the convex hull. We demonstrate that we can maintain the convex hull using a minor modification of the classic convex hull maintenance algorithm. We then show that under certain conditions, we can compute the $H$-measure exactly in $O(\log^2 n)$ time, and if the conditions are not met, then we can estimate the $H$-measure in $O((\log n + ε^{-1})\log n)$ time. We show empirically that our methods are significantly faster than the baselines.
abstract_zh: 测量分类器的性能是机器学习中的一项重要任务。计算度量的算法的运行时间在离线环境中起着非常小的作用，例如，当研究人员开发分类器时。然而，如果我们的目标是随着时间的推移监控分类器的性能，那么运行时间就变得更加重要。在本文中，我们研究了用于维护两个度量的三种算法。第一个算法在 $O(\log n)$ 时间内添加和删除数据点时保持 ROC 曲线下面积 (AUC)。这是通过维护在自平衡搜索树中排序的数据点来完成的。此外，我们还增强了搜索树，使我们能够在 $O(\log n)$ 时间内查询数据点的 ROC 坐标。通过这样做，我们能够在 $O(\log n)$ 时间内维持 AUC。我们接下来的两个算法涉及维护 $H$ 测量，这是一种基于 ROC 曲线的替代测量。计算度量是一个两步过程：首先我们需要计算 ROC 曲线的凸包，然后对凸包求和。我们证明，我们可以使用经典凸包维护算法的微小修改来维护凸包。然后我们证明，在某些条件下，我们可以在 $O(\log^2 n)$ 时间内精确计算 $H$-measure，如果不满足条件，那么我们可以在 $O((\log n + ε^{-1})\log n)$ 时间内估计 $H$-measure。我们凭经验表明我们的方法明显快于基线。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在动态数据流中高效维护分类器性能指标AUC和H-measure的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统离线场景下分类器评估无需关注计算效率，但在实时性能监控场景中，算法运行时间变得至关重要。
AI.method: 采用自平衡搜索树维护数据点排序以O(log n)时间更新AUC；通过凸包维护算法改进实现H-measure的精确计算（O(log²n)）或近似计算（O((log n + ε⁻¹)log n)）。
AI.result: 实验表明所提方法在动态数据场景下显著优于基线方法，实现了更高效的性能监控。
AI.conclusion: 提出的动态维护算法为实时分类器性能评估提供了高效的解决方案，适用于需要持续监控的机器学习场景。

We demonstrate that we can maintain the convex hull using a minor modification of the classic convex hull maintenance algorithm. We then show that under certain conditions, we can compute the $H$-measure exactly in $O(\log^2 n)$ time, and if the conditions are not met, then we can estimate the $H$-measure in $O((\log n + ε^{-1})\log n)$ time. We show empirically that our methods are significantly faster than the baselines. 测量分类器的性能是机器学习中的一项重要任务。计算度量的算法的运行时间在离线环境中起着非常小的作用，例如，当研究人员开发分类器时。然而，如果我们的目标是随着时间的推移监控分类器的性能，那么运行时间就变得更加重要。在本文中，我们研究了用于维护两个度量的三种算法。第一个算法在 $O(\log n)$ 时间内添加和删除数据点时保持 ROC 曲线下面积 (AUC)。这是通过维护在自平衡搜索树中排序的数据点来完成的。此外，我们还增强了搜索树，使我们能够在 $O(\log n)$ 时间内查询数据点的 ROC 坐标。通过这样做，我们能够在 $O(\log n)$ 时间内维持 AUC。我们接下来的两个算法涉及维护 $H$ 测量，这是一种基于 ROC 曲线的替代测量。计算度量是一个两步过程：首先我们需要计算 ROC 曲线的凸包，然后对凸包求和。我们证明，我们可以使用经典凸包维护算法的微小修改来维护凸包。然后我们证明，在某些条件下，我们可以在 $O(\log^2 n)$ 时间内精确计算 $H$-measure，如果不满足条件，那么我们可以在 $O((\log n + ε^{-1})\log n)$ 时间内估计 $H$-measure。我们凭经验表明我们的方法明显快于基线。 本文研究了在动态数据流中高效维护分类器性能指标AUC和H-measure的方法。 Nikolaj Tatti cs.LG,cs.DS

title: Fast computation of distance-generalized cores using sampling
title_zh: 使用采样快速计算距离广义核
abstract: Core decomposition is a classic technique for discovering densely connected regions in a graph with large range of applications. Formally, a $k$-core is a maximal subgraph where each vertex has at least $k$ neighbors. A natural extension of a $k$-core is a $(k, h)$-core, where each node must have at least $k$ nodes that can be reached with a path of length $h$. The downside in using $(k, h)$-core decomposition is the significant increase in the computational complexity: whereas the standard core decomposition can be done in $O(m)$ time, the generalization can require $O(n^2m)$ time, where $n$ and $m$ are the number of nodes and edges in the given graph. In this paper we propose a randomized algorithm that produces an $ε$-approximation of $(k, h)$ core decomposition with a probability of $1 - δ$ in $O(ε^{-2} hm (\log^2 n - \log δ))$ time. The approximation is based on sampling the neighborhoods of nodes, and we use Chernoff bound to prove the approximation guarantee. We also study distance-generalized dense subgraphs, show that the problem is NP-hard, provide an algorithm for discovering such graphs with approximate core decompositions, and provide theoretical guarantees for the quality of the discovered subgraphs. We demonstrate empirically that approximating the decomposition complements the exact computation: computing the approximation is significantly faster than computing the exact solution for the networks where computing the exact solution is slow
