Formally, a $k$-core is a maximal subgraph where each vertex has at least $k$ neighbors. A natural extension of a $k$-core is a $(k, h)$-core, where each node must have at least $k$ nodes that can be reached with a path of length $h$. The downside in using $(k, h)$-core decomposition is the significant increase in the computational complexity: whereas the standard core decomposition can be done in $O(m)$ time, the generalization can require $O(n^2m)$ time, where $n$ and $m$ are the number of nodes and edges in the given graph. In this paper we propose a randomized algorithm that produces an $ε$-approximation of $(k, h)$ core decomposition with a probability of $1 - δ$ in $O(ε^{-2} hm (\log^2 n - \log δ))$ time. The approximation is based on sampling the neighborhoods of nodes, and we use Chernoff bound to prove the approximation guarantee. We also study distance-generalized dense subgraphs, show that the problem is NP-hard, provide an algorithm for discovering such graphs with approximate core decompositions, and provide theoretical guarantees for the quality of the discovered subgraphs. We demonstrate empirically that approximating the decomposition complements the exact computation: computing the approximation is significantly faster than computing the exact solution for the networks where computing the exact solution is slow
abstract_zh: 核心分解是一种用于发现图中密集连接区域的经典技术，具有广泛的应用范围。形式上，$k$-核心是一个最大子图，其中每个顶点至少有 $k$ 个邻居。 $k$-核心的自然扩展是 $(k, h)$-核心，其中每个节点必须至少有 $k$ 个节点，这些节点可以通过长度为 $h$ 的路径到达。使用 $(k, h)$ 核心分解的缺点是计算复杂度显着增加：虽然标准核心分解可以在 $O(m)$ 时间内完成，但泛化可能需要 $O(n^2m)$ 时间，其中 $n$ 和 $m$ 是给定图中的节点和边的数量。在本文中，我们提出了一种随机算法，可在 $O(ε^{-2} hm (\log^2 n - \log δ))$ 时间内以 $1 - δ$ 的概率生成 $ε$ 近似的 $(k, h)$ 核心分解。该近似基于对节点邻域的采样，并且我们使用切尔诺夫界来证明近似保证。我们还研究了距离广义稠密子图，证明该问题是NP困难的，提供了一种用近似核心分解来发现此类图的算法，并为发现的子图的质量提供了理论保证。我们凭经验证明，近似分解可以补充精确计算：对于计算精确解速度较慢的网络，计算近似值明显快于计算精确解

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于采样的随机算法，用于快速近似计算距离泛化核心分解，降低计算复杂度。
AI.motivation: 传统(k, h)-core分解计算复杂度高达O(n²m)，难以处理大规模网络，需更高效的近似方法。
AI.method: 通过节点邻域采样和切比雪夫界证明近似保证，设计时间复杂度为O(ε⁻²hm(log²n - logδ))的随机算法。
AI.result: 算法在保证近似精度(1-δ)的前提下显著提升计算速度，且理论证明了距离泛化密集子图的NP难性及近似算法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 近似分解方法在保持结果质量的同时大幅降低计算开销，为大规模网络分析提供了可行方案。

title: Deep Translation Prior: Test-time Training for Photorealistic Style Transfer
title_zh: 深度翻译先验：真实感风格迁移的测试时训练
comment: Accepted to AAAI 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/sunshower76/Deep_Trainslation_Prior
comments: Accepted to AAAI 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/sunshower76/Deep_Trainslation_Prior
abstract: Recent techniques to solve photorealistic style transfer within deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs) generally require intensive training from large-scale datasets, thus having limited applicability and poor generalization ability to unseen images or styles. To overcome this, we propose a novel framework, dubbed Deep Translation Prior (DTP), to accomplish photorealistic style transfer through test-time training on given input image pair with untrained networks, which learns an image pair-specific translation prior and thus yields better performance and generalization. Tailored for such test-time training for style transfer, we present novel network architectures, with two sub-modules of correspondence and generation modules, and loss functions consisting of contrastive content, style, and cycle consistency losses. Our framework does not require offline training phase for style transfer, which has been one of the main challenges in existing methods, but the networks are to be solely learned during test-time. Experimental results prove that our framework has a better generalization ability to unseen image pairs and even outperforms the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Recent techniques to solve photorealistic style transfer within deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs) generally require intensive training from large-scale datasets, thus having limited applicability and poor generalization ability to unseen images or styles. To overcome this, we propose a novel framework, dubbed Deep Translation Prior (DTP), to accomplish photorealistic style transfer through test-time training on given input image pair with untrained networks, which learns an image pair-specific translation prior and thus yields better performance and generalization. Tailored for such test-time training for style transfer, we present novel network architectures, with two sub-modules of correspondence and generation modules, and loss functions consisting of contrastive content, style, and cycle consistency losses. Our framework does not require offline training phase for style transfer, which has been one of the main challenges in existing methods, but the networks are to be solely learned during test-time. Experimental results prove that our framework has a better generalization ability to unseen image pairs and even outperforms the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 最近在深度卷积神经网络（CNN）中解决照片级真实感风格迁移的技术通常需要对大规模数据集进行强化训练，因此适用性有限，并且对未见过的图像或风格的泛化能力较差。为了克服这个问题，我们提出了一种称为深度翻译先验（DTP）的新颖框架，通过使用未经训练的网络对给定输入图像对进行测试时训练来实现照片级真实风格转换，该网络学习图像对特定的翻译先验，从而产生更好的性能和泛化能力。针对风格迁移的测试时训练，我们提出了新颖的网络架构，具有对应和生成模块两个子模块，以及由对比内容、风格和循环一致性损失组成的损失函数。我们的框架不需要离线训练阶段来进行风格迁移，这是现有方法的主要挑战之一，但网络只能在测试时学习。实验结果证明，我们的框架对未见过的图像对具有更好的泛化能力，甚至优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需预训练的深度翻译先验框架（DTP），通过测试时训练实现光感真实风格迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有风格迁移方法依赖大规模数据集预训练，导致泛化能力差且难以适应新图像或风格。
AI.method: 设计包含对应模块和生成模块的网络架构，结合对比内容损失、风格损失和循环一致性损失，在测试时训练模型学习图像对特定的翻译先验。
AI.result: 实验表明框架对未见图像对具有更强泛化能力，性能优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过测试时训练消除了预训练依赖，为实时风格迁移提供了更灵活的解决方案。

authors_text: Yaofang Liu,Xinyue Zhang,Wenlong Wan,Shaoyu Liu,Yingdi Liu,Hu Liu,Xueying Zeng,Qing Zhang
title: Two New Stenosis Detection Methods of Coronary Angiograms
title_zh: 两种新的冠状动脉造影狭窄检测方法
comment: We submitted the paper due to an operational error. This paper is a modified version of the original paper Two New Stenoses Detection Methods of Coronary Angiograms (arXiv:2108.01516). And we will update the revised paper to the original paper later
comments: We submitted the paper due to an operational error. This paper is a modified version of the original paper Two New Stenoses Detection Methods of Coronary Angiograms (arXiv:2108.01516). And we will update the revised paper to the original paper later
abstract: Coronary angiography is the "gold standard" for diagnosing coronary artery disease (CAD). At present, the methods for detecting and evaluating coronary artery stenosis cannot satisfy the clinical needs, e.g., there is no prior study of detecting stenoses in prespecified vessel segments, which is necessary in clinical practice. Two vascular stenosis detection methods are proposed to assist the diagnosis. The first one is an automatic method, which can automatically extract the entire coronary artery tree and mark all the possible stenoses. The second one is an interactive method. With this method, the user can choose any vessel segment to do further analysis of its stenoses. Experiments show that the proposed methods are robust for angiograms with various vessel structures. The precision, sensitivity, and $F_1$ score of the automatic stenosis detection method are 0.821, 0.757, and 0.788, respectively. Further investigation proves that the interactive method can provide a more precise outcome of stenosis detection, and our quantitative analysis is closer to reality. The proposed automatic method and interactive method are effective and can complement each other in clinical practice. The first method can be used for preliminary screening, and the second method can be used for further quantitative analysis. We believe the proposed solution is more suitable for the clinical diagnosis of CAD.
summary: Coronary angiography is the "gold standard" for diagnosing coronary artery disease (CAD). At present, the methods for detecting and evaluating coronary artery stenosis cannot satisfy the clinical needs, e.g., there is no prior study of detecting stenoses in prespecified vessel segments, which is necessary in clinical practice. Two vascular stenosis detection methods are proposed to assist the diagnosis. The first one is an automatic method, which can automatically extract the entire coronary artery tree and mark all the possible stenoses. The second one is an interactive method. With this method, the user can choose any vessel segment to do further analysis of its stenoses. Experiments show that the proposed methods are robust for angiograms with various vessel structures. The precision, sensitivity, and $F_1$ score of the automatic stenosis detection method are 0.821, 0.757, and 0.788, respectively. Further investigation proves that the interactive method can provide a more precise outcome of stenosis detection, and our quantitative analysis is closer to reality. The proposed automatic method and interactive method are effective and can complement each other in clinical practice. The first method can be used for preliminary screening, and the second method can be used for further quantitative analysis. We believe the proposed solution is more suitable for the clinical diagnosis of CAD.
abstract_zh: 冠状动脉造影是诊断冠状动脉疾病（CAD）的“金标准”。目前，检测和评估冠状动脉狭窄的方法还不能满足临床需要，例如，没有对临床实践中所需要的预先指定的血管段的狭窄进行检测的研究。提出了两种血管狭窄检测方法来辅助诊断。第一种是自动方法，可以自动提取整个冠状动脉树并标记所有可能的狭窄。第二种是互动方式。通过这种方法，用户可以选择任何血管段来对其狭窄进行进一步分析。实验表明，所提出的方法对于具有各种血管结构的血管造影是稳健的。自动狭窄检测方法的精度、灵敏度和$F_1$评分分别为0.821、0.757和0.788。进一步的研究证明，交互式方法可​​以提供更精确的狭窄检测结果，并且我们的定量分析更接近现实。所提出的自动方法和交互式方法是有效的，并且可以在临床实践中相互补充。第一种方法可用于初步筛选，第二种方法可用于进一步定量分析。我们相信所提出的解决方案更适合CAD的临床诊断。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种新的冠状动脉造影狭窄检测方法，用于辅助冠状动脉疾病诊断。
AI.motivation: 现有冠状动脉狭窄检测方法无法满足临床需求，尤其缺乏针对预定义血管段的检测技术。
AI.method: 第一种为自动方法，可提取完整冠状动脉树并标记所有可能狭窄；第二种为交互方法，允许用户选择特定血管段进行深入分析。
AI.result: 自动方法的精确度、灵敏度和F1分数分别为0.821、0.757和0.788；交互方法能提供更精确的检测结果，定量分析更接近实际。
AI.conclusion: 两种方法在临床实践中可互补使用，自动方法适用于初步筛查，交互方法适用于定量分析，整体方案更适合CAD临床诊断。

authors_text: Lin Wan,Qianyan Jing,Zongyuan Sun,Chuang Zhang,Zhihang Li,Yehansen Chen
title: Self-Supervised Modality-Aware Multiple Granularity Pre-Training for RGB-Infrared Person Re-Identification
title_zh: 用于 RGB 红外人员重新识别的自监督模态感知多粒度预训练
abstract: RGB-Infrared person re-identification (RGB-IR ReID) aims to associate people across disjoint RGB and IR camera views. Currently, state-of-the-art performance of RGB-IR ReID is not as impressive as that of conventional ReID. Much of that is due to the notorious modality bias training issue brought by the single-modality ImageNet pre-training, which might yield RGB-biased representations that severely hinder the cross-modality image retrieval. This paper makes first attempt to tackle the task from a pre-training perspective. We propose a self-supervised pre-training solution, named Modality-Aware Multiple Granularity Learning (MMGL), which directly trains models from scratch only on multi-modal ReID datasets, but achieving competitive results against ImageNet pre-training, without using any external data or sophisticated tuning tricks. First, we develop a simple-but-effective 'permutation recovery' pretext task that globally maps shuffled RGB-IR images into a shared latent permutation space, providing modality-invariant global representations for downstream ReID tasks. Second, we present a part-aware cycle-contrastive (PCC) learning strategy that utilizes cross-modality cycle-consistency to maximize agreement between semantically similar RGB-IR image patches. This enables contrastive learning for the unpaired multi-modal scenarios, further improving the discriminability of local features without laborious instance augmentation. Based on these designs, MMGL effectively alleviates the modality bias training problem. Extensive experiments demonstrate that it learns better representations (+8.03% Rank-1 accuracy) with faster training speed (converge only in few hours) and higher data efficiency (<5% data size) than ImageNet pre-training. The results also suggest it generalizes well to various existing models, losses and has promising transferability across datasets. The code will be released.
summary: RGB-Infrared person re-identification (RGB-IR ReID) aims to associate people across disjoint RGB and IR camera views. Currently, state-of-the-art performance of RGB-IR ReID is not as impressive as that of conventional ReID. Much of that is due to the notorious modality bias training issue brought by the single-modality ImageNet pre-training, which might yield RGB-biased representations that severely hinder the cross-modality image retrieval. This paper makes first attempt to tackle the task from a pre-training perspective. We propose a self-supervised pre-training solution, named Modality-Aware Multiple Granularity Learning (MMGL), which directly trains models from scratch only on multi-modal ReID datasets, but achieving competitive results against ImageNet pre-training, without using any external data or sophisticated tuning tricks. First, we develop a simple-but-effective 'permutation recovery' pretext task that globally maps shuffled RGB-IR images into a shared latent permutation space, providing modality-invariant global representations for downstream ReID tasks. Second, we present a part-aware cycle-contrastive (PCC) learning strategy that utilizes cross-modality cycle-consistency to maximize agreement between semantically similar RGB-IR image patches. This enables contrastive learning for the unpaired multi-modal scenarios, further improving the discriminability of local features without laborious instance augmentation. Based on these designs, MMGL effectively alleviates the modality bias training problem. Extensive experiments demonstrate that it learns better representations (+8.03% Rank-1 accuracy) with faster training speed (converge only in few hours) and higher data efficiency (<5% data size) than ImageNet pre-training. The results also suggest it generalizes well to various existing models, losses and has promising transferability across datasets. The code will be released.
abstract_zh: RGB-红外人员重新识别 (RGB-IR ReID) 旨在将不相交的 RGB 和红外摄像机视图中的人员关联起来。目前，RGB-IR ReID 的最先进性能并不如传统 ReID 那样令人印象深刻。这很大程度上是由于单模态 ImageNet 预训练带来的臭名昭著的模态偏差训练问题，这可能会产生 RGB 偏差表示，严重阻碍跨模态图像检索。本文首次尝试从预训练的角度来解决该任务。我们提出了一种自我监督的预训练解决方案，名为模态感知多粒度学习（MMGL），它仅在多模态 ReID 数据集上直接从头开始训练模型，但在不使用任何外部数据或复杂的调整技巧的情况下，获得了与 ImageNet 预训练竞争的结果。首先，我们开发了一个简单但有效的“排列恢复”借口任务，将打乱的 RGB-IR 图像全局映射到共享的潜在排列空间，为下游 ReID 任务提供模态不变的全局表示。其次，我们提出了一种部分感知循环对比（PCC）学习策略，该策略利用跨模态循环一致性来最大化语义相似的 RGB-IR 图像块之间的一致性。这使得能够对不配对的多模态场景进行对比学习，进一步提高局部特征的可辨别性，而无需费力的实例增强。基于这些设计，MMGL有效缓解了模态偏差训练问题。大量实验表明，与 ImageNet 预训练相比，它可以学习更好的表示（+8.03% Rank-1 准确率）、更快的训练速度（仅在几个小时内收敛）和更高的数据效率（<5% 数据大小）。结果还表明，它可以很好地推广到各种现有模型、损失，并且具有跨数据集的可迁移性。代码将被发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自监督的多粒度预训练方法MMGL，用于解决RGB-红外跨模态行人重识别中的模态偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有RGB-IR ReID方法依赖ImageNet预训练导致模态偏差，影响跨模态检索效果，需直接利用多模态数据进行预训练以消除偏差。
AI.method: 设计了排列恢复预训练任务和部分感知循环对比学习策略，通过跨模态循环一致性学习全局和局部特征表示，无需外部数据或复杂增强。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实现Rank-1准确率提升8.03%，训练速度更快（数小时收敛），数据效率更高（<5%数据量），且具有良好的模型泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: MMGL有效缓解模态偏差问题，在准确性、效率和泛化性上优于ImageNet预训练，为跨模态ReID提供高效预训练方案。

authors_text: Zhihua Hu,Bo Duan,Yanfeng Zhang,Mingwei Sun,Jingwei Huang
title: MVLayoutNet:3D layout reconstruction with multi-view panoramas
title_zh: MVLayoutNet：多视图全景的 3D 布局重建
abstract: We present MVLayoutNet, an end-to-end network for holistic 3D reconstruction from multi-view panoramas. Our core contribution is to seamlessly combine learned monocular layout estimation and multi-view stereo (MVS) for accurate layout reconstruction in both 3D and image space. We jointly train a layout module to produce an initial layout and a novel MVS module to obtain accurate layout geometry. Unlike standard MVSNet [33], our MVS module takes a newly-proposed layout cost volume, which aggregates multi-view costs at the same depth layer into corresponding layout elements. We additionally provide an attention-based scheme that guides the MVS module to focus on structural regions. Such a design considers both local pixel-level costs and global holistic information for better reconstruction. Experiments show that our method outperforms state-of-the-arts in terms of depth rmse by 21.7% and 20.6% on the 2D-3D-S [1] and ZInD [5] datasets. Finally, our method leads to coherent layout geometry that enables the reconstruction of an entire scene.
summary: We present MVLayoutNet, an end-to-end network for holistic 3D reconstruction from multi-view panoramas. Our core contribution is to seamlessly combine learned monocular layout estimation and multi-view stereo (MVS) for accurate layout reconstruction in both 3D and image space. We jointly train a layout module to produce an initial layout and a novel MVS module to obtain accurate layout geometry. Unlike standard MVSNet [33], our MVS module takes a newly-proposed layout cost volume, which aggregates multi-view costs at the same depth layer into corresponding layout elements. We additionally provide an attention-based scheme that guides the MVS module to focus on structural regions. Such a design considers both local pixel-level costs and global holistic information for better reconstruction. Experiments show that our method outperforms state-of-the-arts in terms of depth rmse by 21.7% and 20.6% on the 2D-3D-S [1] and ZInD [5] datasets. Finally, our method leads to coherent layout geometry that enables the reconstruction of an entire scene.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 MVLayoutNet，这是一种用于从多视图全景图进行整体 3D 重建的端到端网络。我们的核心贡献是将学习​​的单目布局估计和多视图立体 (MVS) 无缝结合，以在 3D 和图像空间中实现精确的布局重建。我们联合训练一个布局模块来生成初始布局，并联合训练一个新颖的 MVS 模块来获得准确的布局几何形状。与标准 MVSNet [33] 不同，我们的 MVS 模块采用新提出的布局成本量，它将同一深度层的多视图成本聚合到相应的布局元素中。我们还提供了一个基于注意力的方案，引导 MVS 模块关注结构区域。这样的设计既考虑了局部像素级成本，又考虑了全局整体信息，以实现更好的重建。实验表明，我们的方法在 2D-3D-S [1] 和 ZInD [5] 数据集上的深度 rmse 优于最先进的方法 21.7% 和 20.6%。最后，我们的方法产生了连贯的布局几何形状，从而能够重建整个场景。

AI.motivation: 现有MVS方法在深度估计和结构重建中存在误差累积与全局结构信息不足的问题，需结合单目布局估计与多视角几何优势。
AI.method: 联合训练布局模块生成初始布局与改进的MVS模块，引入布局成本体积聚合多视角深度层成本，并采用注意力机制引导结构区域优化。
AI.result: 在2D-3D-S和ZInD数据集上深度RMSE分别降低21.7%和20.6%，实现连贯场景级布局重建。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合单目布局与MVS优势，MVLayoutNet在精度与全局结构一致性上优于现有方法，推动全景图驱动的3D重建发展。

title: Periodic Residual Learning for Crowd Flow Forecasting
title_zh: 人流预测的定期残差学习
abstract: Crowd flow forecasting, which aims to predict the crowds entering or leaving certain regions, is a fundamental task in smart cities. One of the key properties of crowd flow data is periodicity: a pattern that occurs at regular time intervals, such as a weekly pattern. To capture such periodicity, existing studies either fuse the periodic hidden states into channels for networks to learn or apply extra periodic strategies to the network architecture. In this paper, we devise a novel periodic residual learning network (PRNet) for a better modeling of periodicity in crowd flow data. Unlike existing methods, PRNet frames the crowd flow forecasting as a periodic residual learning problem by modeling the variation between the inputs (the previous time period) and the outputs (the future time period). Compared to directly predicting crowd flows that are highly dynamic, learning more stationary deviation is much easier, which thus facilitates the model training. Besides, the learned variation enables the network to produce the residual between future conditions and its corresponding weekly observations at each time interval, and therefore contributes to substantially more accurate multi-step ahead predictions. Extensive experiments show that PRNet can be easily integrated into existing models to enhance their predictive performance.
summary: Crowd flow forecasting, which aims to predict the crowds entering or leaving certain regions, is a fundamental task in smart cities. One of the key properties of crowd flow data is periodicity: a pattern that occurs at regular time intervals, such as a weekly pattern. To capture such periodicity, existing studies either fuse the periodic hidden states into channels for networks to learn or apply extra periodic strategies to the network architecture. In this paper, we devise a novel periodic residual learning network (PRNet) for a better modeling of periodicity in crowd flow data. Unlike existing methods, PRNet frames the crowd flow forecasting as a periodic residual learning problem by modeling the variation between the inputs (the previous time period) and the outputs (the future time period). Compared to directly predicting crowd flows that are highly dynamic, learning more stationary deviation is much easier, which thus facilitates the model training. Besides, the learned variation enables the network to produce the residual between future conditions and its corresponding weekly observations at each time interval, and therefore contributes to substantially more accurate multi-step ahead predictions. Extensive experiments show that PRNet can be easily integrated into existing models to enhance their predictive performance.
abstract_zh: 人流预测是智慧城市的一项基本任务，旨在预测进入或离开特定区域的人群。人群流量数据的关键属性之一是周期性：以固定时间间隔发生的模式，例如每周模式。为了捕获这种周期性，现有的研究要么将周期性隐藏状态融合到网络学习的通道中，要么将额外的周期性策略应用于网络架构。在本文中，我们设计了一种新颖的周期性残差学习网络（PRNet），以更好地建模人群流数据的周期性。与现有方法不同，PRNet 通过对输入（前一时间段）和输出（未来时间段）之间的变化进行建模，将人群流量预测构建为周期性残差学习问题。与直接预测高度动态的人群流量相比，学习更多的平稳偏差要容易得多，从而有利于模型训练。此外，学习到的变化使网络能够在每个时间间隔产生未来条件与其相应的每周观察值之间的残差，因此有助于更准确的多步提前预测。大量实验表明，PRNet 可以轻松集成到现有模型中，以增强其预测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种周期残差学习网络（PRNet），用于更准确地预测城市人群流动情况。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在建模人群流动数据的周期性时存在不足，要么通过通道融合周期性隐藏状态，要么采用额外的周期性策略，难以有效捕捉周期性特征。
AI.method: 将人群流动预测建模为周期残差学习问题，通过建模输入（过去时段）与输出（未来时段）之间的差异，学习更稳定的偏差而非直接预测动态人群流。
AI.result: 实验表明PRNet可轻松集成到现有模型中，显著提升多步预测的准确性。
AI.conclusion: PRNet通过周期性残差学习有效捕捉人群流动的周期性特征，为智能城市中的流量预测提供了新思路。

title: Online Adaptation of Neural Network Models by Modified Extended Kalman Filter for Customizable and Transferable Driving Behavior Prediction
title_zh: 通过改进的扩展卡尔曼滤波器在线适应神经网络模型，以实现可定制和可转移的驾驶行为预测
comment: Accepted by the 2022 AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (HCSSL Workshop). This article follows arXiv:2111.00788
comments: Accepted by the 2022 AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (HCSSL Workshop). This article follows arXiv:2111.00788
abstract: High fidelity behavior prediction of human drivers is crucial for efficient and safe deployment of autonomous vehicles, which is challenging due to the stochasticity, heterogeneity, and time-varying nature of human behaviors. On one hand, the trained prediction model can only capture the motion pattern in an average sense, while the nuances among individuals can hardly be reflected. On the other hand, the prediction model trained on the training set may not generalize to the testing set which may be in a different scenario or data distribution, resulting in low transferability and generalizability. In this paper, we applied a $τ$-step modified Extended Kalman Filter parameter adaptation algorithm (MEKF$_λ$) to the driving behavior prediction task, which has not been studied before in literature. With the feedback of the observed trajectory, the algorithm is applied to neural-network-based models to improve the performance of driving behavior predictions across different human subjects and scenarios. A new set of metrics is proposed for systematic evaluation of online adaptation performance in reducing the prediction error for different individuals and scenarios. Empirical studies on the best layer in the model and steps of observation to adapt are also provided.
summary: High fidelity behavior prediction of human drivers is crucial for efficient and safe deployment of autonomous vehicles, which is challenging due to the stochasticity, heterogeneity, and time-varying nature of human behaviors. On one hand, the trained prediction model can only capture the motion pattern in an average sense, while the nuances among individuals can hardly be reflected. On the other hand, the prediction model trained on the training set may not generalize to the testing set which may be in a different scenario or data distribution, resulting in low transferability and generalizability. In this paper, we applied a $τ$-step modified Extended Kalman Filter parameter adaptation algorithm (MEKF$_λ$) to the driving behavior prediction task, which has not been studied before in literature. With the feedback of the observed trajectory, the algorithm is applied to neural-network-based models to improve the performance of driving behavior predictions across different human subjects and scenarios. A new set of metrics is proposed for systematic evaluation of online adaptation performance in reducing the prediction error for different individuals and scenarios. Empirical studies on the best layer in the model and steps of observation to adapt are also provided.
abstract_zh: 人类驾驶员的高保真行为预测对于自动驾驶汽车的高效、安全部署至关重要，但由于人类行为的随机性、异质性和时变性，这具有挑战性。一方面，经过训练的预测模型只能捕获平均意义上的运动模式，而很难反映个体之间的细微差别。另一方面，在训练集上训练的预测模型可能无法推广到可能处于不同场景或数据分布的测试集，导致可迁移性和泛化性较低。在本文中，我们将$τ$步改进的扩展卡尔曼滤波器参数自适应算法（MEKF$_λ$）应用于驾驶行为预测任务，这在文献中尚未被研究过。通过观察轨迹的反馈，该算法应用于基于神经网络的模型，以提高跨不同人类主体和场景的驾驶行为预测的性能。提出了一组新的指标，用于系统评估在线适应性能，以减少不同个体和场景的预测误差。还提供了模型中最佳层的实证研究以及适应的观察步骤。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于改进扩展卡尔曼滤波器（MEKFλ）的在线参数适应算法，用于提升神经网络在不同驾驶者和场景下的行为预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有驾驶行为预测模型难以捕捉个体差异且跨场景泛化能力差，需解决预测误差大和模型适应性不足的问题。
AI.method: 将τ步改进扩展卡尔曼滤波器（MEKFλ）与神经网络结合，利用观测轨迹反馈实现在线参数调整，并设计新指标评估适应效果。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法有效降低不同个体和场景下的预测误差，验证了模型层选择和观测步长优化的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MEKFλ算法能显著提升驾驶行为预测的可定制性和跨场景迁移能力，为自动驾驶提供更鲁棒的预测方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于改进扩展卡尔曼滤波器（MEKFλ）的在线参数适应算法，用于提升神经网络在不同驾驶者和场景下的行为预测性能。

ai_content.method: 将τ步改进扩展卡尔曼滤波器（MEKFλ）与神经网络结合，利用观测轨迹反馈实现在线参数调整，并设计新指标评估适应效果。

search_text: Online Adaptation of Neural Network Models by Modified Extended Kalman Filter for Customizable and Transferable Driving Behavior Prediction 通过改进的扩展卡尔曼滤波器在线适应神经网络模型，以实现可定制和可转移的驾驶行为预测 High fidelity behavior prediction of human drivers is crucial for efficient and safe deployment of autonomous vehicles, which is challenging due to the stochasticity, heterogeneity, and time-varying nature of human behaviors. On one hand, the trained prediction model can only capture the motion pattern in an average sense, while the nuances among individuals can hardly be reflected. On the other hand, the prediction model trained on the training set may not generalize to the testing set which may be in a different scenario or data distribution, resulting in low transferability and generalizability. In this paper, we applied a $τ$-step modified Extended Kalman Filter parameter adaptation algorithm (MEKF$_λ$) to the driving behavior prediction task, which has not been studied before in literature. With the feedback of the observed trajectory, the algorithm is applied to neural-network-based models to improve the performance of driving behavior predictions across different human subjects and scenarios. A new set of metrics is proposed for systematic evaluation of online adaptation performance in reducing the prediction error for different individuals and scenarios. Empirical studies on the best layer in the model and steps of observation to adapt are also provided. 人类驾驶员的高保真行为预测对于自动驾驶汽车的高效、安全部署至关重要，但由于人类行为的随机性、异质性和时变性，这具有挑战性。一方面，经过训练的预测模型只能捕获平均意义上的运动模式，而很难反映个体之间的细微差别。另一方面，在训练集上训练的预测模型可能无法推广到可能处于不同场景或数据分布的测试集，导致可迁移性和泛化性较低。在本文中，我们将$τ$步改进的扩展卡尔曼滤波器参数自适应算法（MEKF$_λ$）应用于驾驶行为预测任务，这在文献中尚未被研究过。通过观察轨迹的反馈，该算法应用于基于神经网络的模型，以提高跨不同人类主体和场景的驾驶行为预测的性能。提出了一组新的指标，用于系统评估在线适应性能，以减少不同个体和场景的预测误差。还提供了模型中最佳层的实证研究以及适应的观察步骤。 本文提出一种基于改进扩展卡尔曼滤波器（MEKFλ）的在线参数适应算法，用于提升神经网络在不同驾驶者和场景下的行为预测性能。 Letian Wang,Yeping Hu,Changliu Liu cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Real-world challenges for multi-agent reinforcement learning in grid-interactive buildings
title_zh: 网格交互式建筑中多智能体强化学习的现实挑战
abstract: Building upon prior research that highlighted the need for standardizing environments for building control research, and inspired by recently introduced challenges for real life reinforcement learning control, here we propose a non-exhaustive set of nine real world challenges for reinforcement learning control in grid-interactive buildings. We argue that research in this area should be expressed in this framework in addition to providing a standardized environment for repeatability. Advanced controllers such as model predictive control and reinforcement learning (RL) control have both advantages and disadvantages that prevent them from being implemented in real world problems. Comparisons between the two are rare, and often biased. By focusing on the challenges, we can investigate the performance of the controllers under a variety of situations and generate a fair comparison. As a demonstration, we implement the offline learning challenge in CityLearn and study the impact of different levels of domain knowledge and complexity of RL algorithms. We show that the sequence of operations utilized in a rule based controller (RBC) used for offline training affects the performance of the RL agents when evaluated on a set of four energy flexibility metrics. Longer offline learning from an optimized RBC leads to improved performance in the long run. RL agents that learn from a simplified RBC risk poorer performance as the offline learning period increases. We also observe no impact on performance from information sharing amongst agents. We call for a more interdisciplinary effort of the research community to address the real world challenges, and unlock the potential of grid-interactive building
summary: Building upon prior research that highlighted the need for standardizing environments for building control research, and inspired by recently introduced challenges for real life reinforcement learning control, here we propose a non-exhaustive set of nine real world challenges for reinforcement learning control in grid-interactive buildings. We argue that research in this area should be expressed in this framework in addition to providing a standardized environment for repeatability. Advanced controllers such as model predictive control and reinforcement learning (RL) control have both advantages and disadvantages that prevent them from being implemented in real world problems. Comparisons between the two are rare, and often biased. By focusing on the challenges, we can investigate the performance of the controllers under a variety of situations and generate a fair comparison. As a demonstration, we implement the offline learning challenge in CityLearn and study the impact of different levels of domain knowledge and complexity of RL algorithms. We show that the sequence of operations utilized in a rule based controller (RBC) used for offline training affects the performance of the RL agents when evaluated on a set of four energy flexibility metrics. Longer offline learning from an optimized RBC leads to improved performance in the long run. RL agents that learn from a simplified RBC risk poorer performance as the offline learning period increases. We also observe no impact on performance from information sharing amongst agents. We call for a more interdisciplinary effort of the research community to address the real world challenges, and unlock the potential of grid-interactive building
abstract_zh: 先前的研究强调了建筑控制研究标准化环境的必要性，并受到最近引入的现实生活强化学习控制挑战的启发，在此我们提出了网格交互式建筑中强化学习控制的一组非详尽的九个现实世界挑战。我们认为，除了提供可重复性的标准化环境之外，该领域的研究还应该在该框架中表达。模型预测控制和强化学习（RL）控制等先进控制器既有优点也有缺点，这使得它们无法在现实世界的问题中得到应用。两者之间的比较很少，而且常常带有偏见。通过关注挑战，我们可以研究控制器在各种情况下的性能并进行公平的比较。作为演示，我们在 CityLearn 中实现离线学习挑战，并研究不同级别的领域知识和 RL 算法复杂性的影响。我们表明，当根据一组四个能量灵活性指标进行评估时，用于离线训练的基于规则的控制器 (RBC) 中使用的操作顺序会影响 RL 代理的性能。从优化的 RBC 中进行更长时间的离线学习从长远来看可以提高性能。随着离线学习时间的增加，从简化的 RBC 中学习的 RL 代理可能会面临性能较差的风险。我们还观察到代理之间的信息共享对性能没有影响。我们呼吁研究界采取更多跨学科的努力来应对现实世界的挑战，并释放网格交互式建筑的潜力

AI.tldr: 本文提出九个现实世界挑战，探讨强化学习在电网交互建筑中的控制问题，并通过CityLearn平台验证不同离线学习策略对代理性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏标准化环境和公平比较框架，导致模型预测控制与强化学习的优劣难以客观评估，需针对实际应用场景提出系统性挑战。
AI.method: 基于CityLearn平台实施离线学习挑战，对比不同领域知识水平和RL算法复杂度的影响，通过四维能源灵活性指标评估规则控制器与RL代理的性能差异。
AI.result: 优化规则控制器的长期离线学习提升RL性能，简化规则控制器则随学习时间增加性能下降；代理间信息共享未显著影响结果。
AI.conclusion: 需跨学科协作解决现实挑战，通过标准化框架推动电网交互建筑控制技术的实际应用与优化。

title: Extending AdamW by Leveraging Its Second Moment and Magnitude
title_zh: 利用其二阶矩和幅度来扩展 AdamW
abstract: Recent work [4] analyses the local convergence of Adam in a neighbourhood of an optimal solution for a twice-differentiable function. It is found that the learning rate has to be sufficiently small to ensure local stability of the optimal solution. The above convergence results also hold for AdamW. In this work, we propose a new adaptive optimisation method by extending AdamW in two aspects with the purpose to relax the requirement on small learning rate for local stability, which we refer to as Aida. Firstly, we consider tracking the 2nd moment r_t of the pth power of the gradient-magnitudes. r_t reduces to v_t of AdamW when p=2. Suppose {m_t} is the first moment of AdamW. It is known that the update direction m_{t+1}/(v_{t+1}+epsilon)^0.5 (or m_{t+1}/(v_{t+1}^0.5+epsilon) of AdamW (or Adam) can be decomposed as the sign vector sign(m_{t+1}) multiplied elementwise by a vector of magnitudes |m_{t+1}|/(v_{t+1}+epsilon)^0.5 (or |m_{t+1}|/(v_{t+1}^0.5+epsilon)). Aida is designed to compute the qth power of the magnitude in the form of |m_{t+1}|^q/(r_{t+1}+epsilon)^(q/p) (or |m_{t+1}|^q/((r_{t+1})^(q/p)+epsilon)), which reduces to that of AdamW when (p,q)=(2,1). Suppose the origin 0 is a local optimal solution of a twice-differentiable function. It is found theoretically that when q>1 and p>1 in Aida, the origin 0 is locally stable only when the weight-decay is non-zero. Experiments are conducted for solving ten toy optimisation problems and training Transformer and Swin-Transformer for two deep learning (DL) tasks. The empirical study demonstrates that in a number of scenarios (including the two DL tasks), Aida with particular setups of (p,q) not equal to (2,1) outperforms the setup (p,q)=(2,1) of AdamW.
summary: Recent work [4] analyses the local convergence of Adam in a neighbourhood of an optimal solution for a twice-differentiable function. It is found that the learning rate has to be sufficiently small to ensure local stability of the optimal solution. The above convergence results also hold for AdamW. In this work, we propose a new adaptive optimisation method by extending AdamW in two aspects with the purpose to relax the requirement on small learning rate for local stability, which we refer to as Aida. Firstly, we consider tracking the 2nd moment r_t of the pth power of the gradient-magnitudes. r_t reduces to v_t of AdamW when p=2. Suppose {m_t} is the first moment of AdamW. It is known that the update direction m_{t+1}/(v_{t+1}+epsilon)^0.5 (or m_{t+1}/(v_{t+1}^0.5+epsilon) of AdamW (or Adam) can be decomposed as the sign vector sign(m_{t+1}) multiplied elementwise by a vector of magnitudes |m_{t+1}|/(v_{t+1}+epsilon)^0.5 (or |m_{t+1}|/(v_{t+1}^0.5+epsilon)). Aida is designed to compute the qth power of the magnitude in the form of |m_{t+1}|^q/(r_{t+1}+epsilon)^(q/p) (or |m_{t+1}|^q/((r_{t+1})^(q/p)+epsilon)), which reduces to that of AdamW when (p,q)=(2,1). Suppose the origin 0 is a local optimal solution of a twice-differentiable function. It is found theoretically that when q>1 and p>1 in Aida, the origin 0 is locally stable only when the weight-decay is non-zero. Experiments are conducted for solving ten toy optimisation problems and training Transformer and Swin-Transformer for two deep learning (DL) tasks. The empirical study demonstrates that in a number of scenarios (including the two DL tasks), Aida with particular setups of (p,q) not equal to (2,1) outperforms the setup (p,q)=(2,1) of AdamW.
abstract_zh: 最近的工作 [4] 分析了 Adam 在二次可微函数最优解邻域中的局部收敛性。研究发现，学习率必须足够小才能保证最优解的局部稳定性。上述收敛结果对于 AdamW 也成立。在这项工作中，我们通过在两个方面扩展 AdamW 提出了一种新的自适应优化方法，目的是放宽对局部稳定性的小学习率的要求，我们将其称为 Aida。首先，我们考虑跟踪梯度幅值的 p 次方的二阶矩 r_t。当 p=2 时，r_t 减少为 AdamW 的 v_t。假设{m_t}是AdamW的一阶矩。已知AdamW（或Adam）的更新方向m_{t+1}/(v_{t+1}+epsilon)^0.5（或m_{t+1}/(v_{t+1}^0.5+epsilon)）可以分解为符号向量sign(m_{t+1})逐元素乘以幅度向量|m_{t+1}|/(v_{t+1}+epsilon)^0.5（或 |m_{t+1}|/(v_{t+1}^0.5+epsilon)）），Aida 旨在以 |m_{t+1}|^q/(r_{t+1}+epsilon)^(q/p) 的形式计算幅度的 q 次幂（或|m_{t+1}|^q/((r_{t+1})^(q/p)+epsilon))，当(p,q)=(2,1)时，假设原点0是二次可微函数的局部最优解，理论上发现，当Aida中q>1且p>1时，只有当权重衰减非零时，原点0才局部稳定。玩具优化问题以及为两个深度学习 (DL) 任务训练 Transformer 和 Swin-Transformer 实证研究表明，在许多场景（包括两个 DL 任务）中，具有 (p,q) 不等于 (2,1) 的特定设置的 Aida 优于 AdamW 的设置 (p,q)=(2,1)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Aida的自适应优化方法，通过扩展AdamW的二阶矩和梯度幅度来放松对学习率的要求。
AI.motivation: 现有AdamW优化器在局部稳定性要求下需要较小的学习率，限制了训练效果，因此需要改进以放宽这一限制。
AI.method: 通过引入梯度幅度的p次方二阶矩跟踪，并调整更新方向中的幅度计算方式，使用参数(p, q)控制，当(p, q)=(2,1)时退化为AdamW。
AI.result: 在10个玩具优化问题及Transformer/Swin-Transformer任务中，特定(p, q)设置的Aida表现优于AdamW。
AI.conclusion: Aida通过调整(p, q)参数可提升部分场景性能，但需非零权重衰减确保稳定性。

search_text: Extending AdamW by Leveraging Its Second Moment and Magnitude 利用其二阶矩和幅度来扩展 AdamW Recent work [4] analyses the local convergence of Adam in a neighbourhood of an optimal solution for a twice-differentiable function. It is found that the learning rate has to be sufficiently small to ensure local stability of the optimal solution. The above convergence results also hold for AdamW. In this work, we propose a new adaptive optimisation method by extending AdamW in two aspects with the purpose to relax the requirement on small learning rate for local stability, which we refer to as Aida. Firstly, we consider tracking the 2nd moment r_t of the pth power of the gradient-magnitudes. r_t reduces to v_t of AdamW when p=2. Suppose {m_t} is the first moment of AdamW. It is known that the update direction m_{t+1}/(v_{t+1}+epsilon)^0.5 (or m_{t+1}/(v_{t+1}^0.5+epsilon) of AdamW (or Adam) can be decomposed as the sign vector sign(m_{t+1}) multiplied elementwise by a vector of magnitudes |m_{t+1}|/(v_{t+1}+epsilon)^0.5 (or |m_{t+1}|/(v_{t+1}^0.5+epsilon)). Aida is designed to compute the qth power of the magnitude in the form of |m_{t+1}|^q/(r_{t+1}+epsilon)^(q/p) (or |m_{t+1}|^q/((r_{t+1})^(q/p)+epsilon)), which reduces to that of AdamW when (p,q)=(2,1). Suppose the origin 0 is a local optimal solution of a twice-differentiable function. It is found theoretically that when q>1 and p>1 in Aida, the origin 0 is locally stable only when the weight-decay is non-zero. Experiments are conducted for solving ten toy optimisation problems and training Transformer and Swin-Transformer for two deep learning (DL) tasks. The empirical study demonstrates that in a number of scenarios (including the two DL tasks), Aida with particular setups of (p,q) not equal to (2,1) outperforms the setup (p,q)=(2,1) of AdamW. 最近的工作 [4] 分析了 Adam 在二次可微函数最优解邻域中的局部收敛性。研究发现，学习率必须足够小才能保证最优解的局部稳定性。上述收敛结果对于 AdamW 也成立。在这项工作中，我们通过在两个方面扩展 AdamW 提出了一种新的自适应优化方法，目的是放宽对局部稳定性的小学习率的要求，我们将其称为 Aida。首先，我们考虑跟踪梯度幅值的 p 次方的二阶矩 r_t。当 p=2 时，r_t 减少为 AdamW 的 v_t。假设{m_t}是AdamW的一阶矩。已知AdamW（或Adam）的更新方向m_{t+1}/(v_{t+1}+epsilon)^0.5（或m_{t+1}/(v_{t+1}^0.5+epsilon)）可以分解为符号向量sign(m_{t+1})逐元素乘以幅度向量|m_{t+1}|/(v_{t+1}+epsilon)^0.5（或 |m_{t+1}|/(v_{t+1}^0.5+epsilon)）），Aida 旨在以 |m_{t+1}|^q/(r_{t+1}+epsilon)^(q/p) 的形式计算幅度的 q 次幂（或|m_{t+1}|^q/((r_{t+1})^(q/p)+epsilon))，当(p,q)=(2,1)时，假设原点0是二次可微函数的局部最优解，理论上发现，当Aida中q>1且p>1时，只有当权重衰减非零时，原点0才局部稳定。玩具优化问题以及为两个深度学习 (DL) 任务训练 Transformer 和 Swin-Transformer 实证研究表明，在许多场景（包括两个 DL 任务）中，具有 (p,q) 不等于 (2,1) 的特定设置的 Aida 优于 AdamW 的设置 (p,q)=(2,1)。 本文提出了一种名为Aida的自适应优化方法，通过扩展AdamW的二阶矩和梯度幅度来放松对学习率的要求。 Guoqiang Zhang,Niwa Kenta,W. Bastiaan Kleijn cs.LG,cs.AI,math.OC

authors_text: Claudio Santos,Maryam Hosseini,João Rulff,Nivan Ferreira,Luc Wilson,Fabio Miranda,Claudio Silva,Marcos Lage
title: A Visual Analytics System for Profiling Urban Land Use Evolution
title_zh: 用于描绘城市土地利用演变的可视化分析系统
comment: The open-source system can be found at https://github.com/Prograf-UFF/urban-chronicles
comments: The open-source system can be found at https://github.com/Prograf-UFF/urban-chronicles
abstract: The growth of cities calls for regulations on how urban space is used and zoning resolutions define how and for what purpose each piece of land is going to be used. Tracking land use and zoning evolution can reveal a wealth of information about urban development. For that matter, cities have been releasing data sets describing the historical evolution of both the shape and the attributes of land units. The complex nature of zoning code and land-use data, however, makes the analysis of such data quite challenging and often time-consuming. We address these challenges by introducing Urban Chronicles, an open-source web-based visual analytics system that enables interactive exploration of changes in land use patterns. Using New York City's Primary Land Use Tax Lot Output (PLUTO) as an example, we show the capabilities of the system by exploring the data over several years at different scales. Urban Chronicles supports on-the-fly aggregation and filtering operations by using a tree-based data structure that leverages the hierarchical nature of the data set to index the shape and attributes of geographical regions that change over time. We demonstrate the utility of our system through a set of case studies that analyze the impact of Hurricane Sandy on land use attributes, as well as the effects of proposed rezoning plans in Downtown Brooklyn.
summary: The growth of cities calls for regulations on how urban space is used and zoning resolutions define how and for what purpose each piece of land is going to be used. Tracking land use and zoning evolution can reveal a wealth of information about urban development. For that matter, cities have been releasing data sets describing the historical evolution of both the shape and the attributes of land units. The complex nature of zoning code and land-use data, however, makes the analysis of such data quite challenging and often time-consuming. We address these challenges by introducing Urban Chronicles, an open-source web-based visual analytics system that enables interactive exploration of changes in land use patterns. Using New York City's Primary Land Use Tax Lot Output (PLUTO) as an example, we show the capabilities of the system by exploring the data over several years at different scales. Urban Chronicles supports on-the-fly aggregation and filtering operations by using a tree-based data structure that leverages the hierarchical nature of the data set to index the shape and attributes of geographical regions that change over time. We demonstrate the utility of our system through a set of case studies that analyze the impact of Hurricane Sandy on land use attributes, as well as the effects of proposed rezoning plans in Downtown Brooklyn.
abstract_zh: 城市的发展需要对城市空间的使用方式进行监管，而分区决议则需要定义每块土地的使用方式和用途。跟踪土地利用和分区演变可以揭示有关城市发展的大量信息。为此，城市一直在发布描述土地单位形状和属性历史演变的数据集。然而，分区代码和土地利用数据的复杂性使得此类数据的分析非常具有挑战性并且通常非常耗时。我们通过引入 Urban Chronicles 来应对这些挑战，这是一个基于网络的开源可视化分析系统，可以交互式探索土地利用模式的变化。以纽约市的主要土地使用税地输出 (PLUTO) 为例，我们通过探索几年来不同规模的数据来展示该系统的功能。 Urban Chronicles 通过使用基于树的数据结构来支持即时聚合和过滤操作，该数据结构利用数据集的分层性质来索引随时间变化的地理区域的形状和属性。我们通过一系列案例研究展示了我们系统的实用性，这些案例研究分析了飓风桑迪对土地利用属性的影响，以及拟议的布鲁克林市中心重新分区计划的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Urban Chronicles的开源网络可视化分析系统，用于交互式探索城市土地利用模式的变化。
AI.motivation: 城市土地利用和分区数据的复杂性使得分析工作耗时且具有挑战性，亟需一种高效工具来支持动态数据探索。
AI.method: 基于树形数据结构构建系统，利用数据集的层级特性对地理区域的形状和属性进行索引，支持实时聚合与过滤操作。
AI.result: 通过纽约市PLUTO数据集的案例研究，验证了系统在分析飓风桑迪影响及布鲁克林市中心重新规划效果中的实用性。
AI.conclusion: Urban Chronicles有效解决了土地利用数据动态分析的难题，为城市规划和政策制定提供了可视化支持工具。

title: Magnifying Networks for Images with Billions of Pixels
title_zh: 数十亿像素图像的放大网络
abstract: The shift towards end-to-end deep learning has brought unprecedented advances in many areas of computer vision. However, deep neural networks are trained on images with resolutions that rarely exceed $1,000 \times 1,000$ pixels. The growing use of scanners that create images with extremely high resolutions (average can be $100,000 \times 100,000$ pixels) thereby presents novel challenges to the field. Most of the published methods preprocess high-resolution images into a set of smaller patches, imposing an a priori belief on the best properties of the extracted patches (magnification, field of view, location, etc.). Herein, we introduce Magnifying Networks (MagNets) as an alternative deep learning solution for gigapixel image analysis that does not rely on a preprocessing stage nor requires the processing of billions of pixels. MagNets can learn to dynamically retrieve any part of a gigapixel image, at any magnification level and field of view, in an end-to-end fashion with minimal ground truth (a single global, slide-level label). Our results on the publicly available Camelyon16 and Camelyon17 datasets corroborate to the effectiveness and efficiency of MagNets and the proposed optimization framework for whole slide image classification. Importantly, MagNets process far less patches from each slide than any of the existing approaches ($10$ to $300$ times less).
summary: The shift towards end-to-end deep learning has brought unprecedented advances in many areas of computer vision. However, deep neural networks are trained on images with resolutions that rarely exceed $1,000 \times 1,000$ pixels. The growing use of scanners that create images with extremely high resolutions (average can be $100,000 \times 100,000$ pixels) thereby presents novel challenges to the field. Most of the published methods preprocess high-resolution images into a set of smaller patches, imposing an a priori belief on the best properties of the extracted patches (magnification, field of view, location, etc.). Herein, we introduce Magnifying Networks (MagNets) as an alternative deep learning solution for gigapixel image analysis that does not rely on a preprocessing stage nor requires the processing of billions of pixels. MagNets can learn to dynamically retrieve any part of a gigapixel image, at any magnification level and field of view, in an end-to-end fashion with minimal ground truth (a single global, slide-level label). Our results on the publicly available Camelyon16 and Camelyon17 datasets corroborate to the effectiveness and efficiency of MagNets and the proposed optimization framework for whole slide image classification. Importantly, MagNets process far less patches from each slide than any of the existing approaches ($10$ to $300$ times less).
abstract_zh: 向端到端深度学习的转变为计算机视觉的许多领域带来了前所未有的进步。然而，深度神经网络是在分辨率很少超过 1,000 美元× 1,000 像素的图像上进行训练的。因此，越来越多地使用扫描仪来创建具有极高分辨率（平均可达 100,000 美元×100,000 像素）图像的扫描仪，从而对该领域提出了新的挑战。大多数已发表的方法将高分辨率图像预处理为一组较小的块，对提取的块的最佳属性（放大率、视野、位置等）施加先验信念。在这里，我们引入放大网络（MagNets）作为十亿像素图像分析的替代深度学习解决方案，它不依赖于预处理阶段，也不需要处理数十亿像素。 MagNet 可以学习在任何放大级别和视野下以端对端的方式动态检索十亿像素图像的任何部分，并具有最小的基本事实（单个全局、幻灯片级标签）。我们在公开的 Camelyon16 和 Camelyon17 数据集上的结果证实了 MagNet 的有效性和效率以及所提出的整个幻灯片图像分类的优化框架。重要的是，MagNets 从每张幻灯片上处理的补丁比任何现有方法都要少得多（少 10 美元到 300 美元）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Magnifying Networks (MagNets)的深度学习方法，用于处理高分辨率（吉帕像素）图像的分类任务，无需传统预处理步骤。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过将高分辨率图像分割为小块进行处理，但此过程需要大量计算资源且依赖预设的图像分割参数，难以适应极高分辨率图像的分析需求。
AI.method: MagNets通过动态检索图像任意区域和放大倍数的特征，结合单个全局标签进行端到端训练，避免了对图像进行预分割和处理所有像素的需求。
AI.result: 在Camelyon16和Camelyon17数据集上的实验表明，MagNets相比现有方法减少了10至300倍的图像块处理量，同时保持了分类效果。
AI.conclusion: MagNets为高分辨率图像分析提供了高效解决方案，通过动态特征检索和简化预处理流程显著降低了计算负担。

ai_content_json.conclusion: MagNets为高分辨率图像分析提供了高效解决方案，通过动态特征检索和简化预处理流程显著降低了计算负担。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Magnifying Networks (MagNets)的深度学习方法，用于处理高分辨率（吉帕像素）图像的分类任务，无需传统预处理步骤。
motivation: 现有方法通过将高分辨率图像分割为小块进行处理，但此过程需要大量计算资源且依赖预设的图像分割参数，难以适应极高分辨率图像的分析需求。
method: MagNets通过动态检索图像任意区域和放大倍数的特征，结合单个全局标签进行端到端训练，避免了对图像进行预分割和处理所有像素的需求。
result: 在Camelyon16和Camelyon17数据集上的实验表明，MagNets相比现有方法减少了10至300倍的图像块处理量，同时保持了分类效果。
conclusion: MagNets为高分辨率图像分析提供了高效解决方案，通过动态特征检索和简化预处理流程显著降低了计算负担。
search_text: Magnifying Networks for Images with Billions of Pixels 数十亿像素图像的放大网络 The shift towards end-to-end deep learning has brought unprecedented advances in many areas of computer vision. However, deep neural networks are trained on images with resolutions that rarely exceed $1,000 \times 1,000$ pixels. The growing use of scanners that create images with extremely high resolutions (average can be $100,000 \times 100,000$ pixels) thereby presents novel challenges to the field. Most of the published methods preprocess high-resolution images into a set of smaller patches, imposing an a priori belief on the best properties of the extracted patches (magnification, field of view, location, etc.). Herein, we introduce Magnifying Networks (MagNets) as an alternative deep learning solution for gigapixel image analysis that does not rely on a preprocessing stage nor requires the processing of billions of pixels. MagNets can learn to dynamically retrieve any part of a gigapixel image, at any magnification level and field of view, in an end-to-end fashion with minimal ground truth (a single global, slide-level label). Our results on the publicly available Camelyon16 and Camelyon17 datasets corroborate to the effectiveness and efficiency of MagNets and the proposed optimization framework for whole slide image classification. Importantly, MagNets process far less patches from each slide than any of the existing approaches ($10$ to $300$ times less). 向端到端深度学习的转变为计算机视觉的许多领域带来了前所未有的进步。然而，深度神经网络是在分辨率很少超过 1,000 美元× 1,000 像素的图像上进行训练的。因此，越来越多地使用扫描仪来创建具有极高分辨率（平均可达 100,000 美元×100,000 像素）图像的扫描仪，从而对该领域提出了新的挑战。大多数已发表的方法将高分辨率图像预处理为一组较小的块，对提取的块的最佳属性（放大率、视野、位置等）施加先验信念。在这里，我们引入放大网络（MagNets）作为十亿像素图像分析的替代深度学习解决方案，它不依赖于预处理阶段，也不需要处理数十亿像素。 MagNet 可以学习在任何放大级别和视野下以端对端的方式动态检索十亿像素图像的任何部分，并具有最小的基本事实（单个全局、幻灯片级标签）。我们在公开的 Camelyon16 和 Camelyon17 数据集上的结果证实了 MagNet 的有效性和效率以及所提出的整个幻灯片图像分类的优化框架。重要的是，MagNets 从每张幻灯片上处理的补丁比任何现有方法都要少得多（少 10 美元到 300 美元）。 本文提出了一种名为Magnifying Networks (MagNets)的深度学习方法，用于处理高分辨率（吉帕像素）图像的分类任务，无需传统预处理步骤。 Neofytos Dimitriou,Ognjen Arandjelovic cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Maryam Hosseini,Iago B. Araujo,Hamed Yazdanpanah,Eric K. Tokuda,Fabio Miranda,Claudio T. Silva,Roberto M. Cesar Jr
title: Sidewalk Measurements from Satellite Images: Preliminary Findings
title_zh: 卫星图像的人行道测量：初步发现
abstract: Large-scale analysis of pedestrian infrastructures, particularly sidewalks, is critical to human-centric urban planning and design. Benefiting from the rich data set of planimetric features and high-resolution orthoimages provided through the New York City Open Data portal, we train a computer vision model to detect sidewalks, roads, and buildings from remote-sensing imagery and achieve 83% mIoU over held-out test set. We apply shape analysis techniques to study different attributes of the extracted sidewalks. More specifically, we do a tile-wise analysis of the width, angle, and curvature of sidewalks, which aside from their general impacts on walkability and accessibility of urban areas, are known to have significant roles in the mobility of wheelchair users. The preliminary results are promising, glimpsing the potential of the proposed approach to be adopted in different cities, enabling researchers and practitioners to have a more vivid picture of the pedestrian realm.
summary: Large-scale analysis of pedestrian infrastructures, particularly sidewalks, is critical to human-centric urban planning and design. Benefiting from the rich data set of planimetric features and high-resolution orthoimages provided through the New York City Open Data portal, we train a computer vision model to detect sidewalks, roads, and buildings from remote-sensing imagery and achieve 83% mIoU over held-out test set. We apply shape analysis techniques to study different attributes of the extracted sidewalks. More specifically, we do a tile-wise analysis of the width, angle, and curvature of sidewalks, which aside from their general impacts on walkability and accessibility of urban areas, are known to have significant roles in the mobility of wheelchair users. The preliminary results are promising, glimpsing the potential of the proposed approach to be adopted in different cities, enabling researchers and practitioners to have a more vivid picture of the pedestrian realm.
abstract_zh: 对行人基础设施（特别是人行道）的大规模分析对于以人为本的城市规划和设计至关重要。受益于纽约市开放数据门户提供的丰富的平面特征和高分辨率正射影像数据集，我们训练计算机视觉模型来从遥感图像中检测人行道、道路和建筑物，并在测试集上实现 83% mIoU。我们应用形状分析技术来研究提取的人行道的不同属性。更具体地说，我们对人行道的宽度、角度和曲率进行了逐块分析，除了对城市地区的步行性和可达性的一般影响外，众所周知，这些分析对轮椅使用者的行动能力也具有重要作用。初步结果令人鼓舞，展示了所提出的方法在不同城市采用的潜力，使研究人员和从业者能够更生动地了解步行领域。

AI.tldr: 该论文利用卫星图像和计算机视觉技术检测并分析城市人行道的宽度、角度和曲率等属性，以支持以人为本的城市规划。
AI.motivation: 大规模分析人行道等行人基础设施对城市规划至关重要，尤其需要关注轮椅使用者等特殊群体的移动需求。
AI.method: 基于纽约市开放数据训练计算机视觉模型检测道路和建筑，并通过形状分析技术研究人行道的几何特征。
AI.result: 在测试集上实现83%的mIoU，初步验证了方法在不同城市应用的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为研究人员和规划者提供了更直观的行人空间分析工具，有望推广至其他城市。

authors_text: Zachary Berger,Parth Agrawal,Tian Yu Liu,Stefano Soatto,Alex Wong
title: Stereoscopic Universal Perturbations across Different Architectures and Datasets
title_zh: 不同架构和数据集的立体普遍扰动
abstract: We study the effect of adversarial perturbations of images on deep stereo matching networks for the disparity estimation task. We present a method to craft a single set of perturbations that, when added to any stereo image pair in a dataset, can fool a stereo network to significantly alter the perceived scene geometry. Our perturbation images are "universal" in that they not only corrupt estimates of the network on the dataset they are optimized for, but also generalize to different architectures trained on different datasets. We evaluate our approach on multiple benchmark datasets where our perturbations can increase the D1-error (akin to fooling rate) of state-of-the-art stereo networks from 1% to as much as 87%. We investigate the effect of perturbations on the estimated scene geometry and identify object classes that are most vulnerable. Our analysis on the activations of registered points between left and right images led us to find architectural components that can increase robustness against adversaries. By simply designing networks with such components, one can reduce the effect of adversaries by up to 60.5%, which rivals the robustness of networks fine-tuned with costly adversarial data augmentation. Our design principle also improves their robustness against common image corruptions by an average of 70%.
summary: We study the effect of adversarial perturbations of images on deep stereo matching networks for the disparity estimation task. We present a method to craft a single set of perturbations that, when added to any stereo image pair in a dataset, can fool a stereo network to significantly alter the perceived scene geometry. Our perturbation images are "universal" in that they not only corrupt estimates of the network on the dataset they are optimized for, but also generalize to different architectures trained on different datasets. We evaluate our approach on multiple benchmark datasets where our perturbations can increase the D1-error (akin to fooling rate) of state-of-the-art stereo networks from 1% to as much as 87%. We investigate the effect of perturbations on the estimated scene geometry and identify object classes that are most vulnerable. Our analysis on the activations of registered points between left and right images led us to find architectural components that can increase robustness against adversaries. By simply designing networks with such components, one can reduce the effect of adversaries by up to 60.5%, which rivals the robustness of networks fine-tuned with costly adversarial data augmentation. Our design principle also improves their robustness against common image corruptions by an average of 70%.
abstract_zh: 我们研究图像的对抗性扰动对视差估计任务的深度立体匹配网络的影响。我们提出了一种方法来制作一组扰动，当将其添加到数据集中的任何立体图像对时，可以欺骗立体网络以显着改变感知的场景几何形状。我们的扰动图像是“通用的”，因为它们不仅破坏了对其优化的数据集上的网络估计，而且还泛化到在不同数据集上训练的不同架构。我们在多个基准数据集上评估我们的方法，其中我们的扰动可以将最先进的立体声网络的 D1 错误（类似于愚弄率）从 1% 增加到高达 87%。我们研究扰动对估计场景几何形状的影响，并确定最容易受到攻击的对象类别。我们对左右图像之间注册点激活的分析使我们找到了可以提高针对对手的鲁棒性的架构组件。通过简单地设计具有此类组件的网络，可以将对手的影响降低高达 60.5%，这与通过昂贵的对抗性数据增强进行微调的网络的鲁棒性相媲美。我们的设计原则还将其针对常见图像损坏的鲁棒性平均提高了 70%。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究针对深度立体匹配网络的对抗性扰动，提出一种能跨不同架构和数据集通用的扰动方法，显著改变场景几何感知。
AI.motivation: 现有立体匹配网络在面对对抗性扰动时存在严重漏洞，且缺乏跨架构和数据集的鲁棒性分析，需探索通用扰动方法及增强网络鲁棒性的设计原则。
AI.method: 通过优化生成单一样本扰动，添加到立体图像对中以欺骗网络；分析激活特征定位关键架构组件，提出改进设计提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，扰动使SOTA立体网络D1误差从1%提升至87%；通过架构改进可减少60.5%的对抗影响，并提升70%的常见图像损坏鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 提出有效跨架构的通用扰动方法，并验证了特定网络设计原则在提升立体网络安全性与鲁棒性方面的潜力。

Our design principle also improves their robustness against common image corruptions by an average of 70%. 我们研究图像的对抗性扰动对视差估计任务的深度立体匹配网络的影响。我们提出了一种方法来制作一组扰动，当将其添加到数据集中的任何立体图像对时，可以欺骗立体网络以显着改变感知的场景几何形状。我们的扰动图像是“通用的”，因为它们不仅破坏了对其优化的数据集上的网络估计，而且还泛化到在不同数据集上训练的不同架构。我们在多个基准数据集上评估我们的方法，其中我们的扰动可以将最先进的立体声网络的 D1 错误（类似于愚弄率）从 1% 增加到高达 87%。我们研究扰动对估计场景几何形状的影响，并确定最容易受到攻击的对象类别。我们对左右图像之间注册点激活的分析使我们找到了可以提高针对对手的鲁棒性的架构组件。通过简单地设计具有此类组件的网络，可以将对手的影响降低高达 60.5%，这与通过昂贵的对抗性数据增强进行微调的网络的鲁棒性相媲美。我们的设计原则还将其针对常见图像损坏的鲁棒性平均提高了 70%。 该论文研究针对深度立体匹配网络的对抗性扰动，提出一种能跨不同架构和数据集通用的扰动方法，显著改变场景几何感知。 Zachary Berger,Parth Agrawal,Tian Yu Liu,Stefano Soatto,Alex Wong cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Yizhou Zhao,Liang Qiu,Pan Lu,Feng Shi,Tian Han,Song-Chun Zhu
title: Learning from the Tangram to Solve Mini Visual Tasks
title_zh: 学习七巧板来解决小型视觉任务
abstract: Current pre-training methods in computer vision focus on natural images in the daily-life context. However, abstract diagrams such as icons and symbols are common and important in the real world. This work is inspired by Tangram, a game that requires replicating an abstract pattern from seven dissected shapes. By recording human experience in solving tangram puzzles, we present the Tangram dataset and show that a pre-trained neural model on the Tangram helps solve some mini visual tasks based on low-resolution vision. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed method generates intelligent solutions for aesthetic tasks such as folding clothes and evaluating room layouts. The pre-trained feature extractor can facilitate the convergence of few-shot learning tasks on human handwriting and improve the accuracy in identifying icons by their contours. The Tangram dataset is available at https://github.com/yizhouzhao/Tangram.
summary: Current pre-training methods in computer vision focus on natural images in the daily-life context. However, abstract diagrams such as icons and symbols are common and important in the real world. This work is inspired by Tangram, a game that requires replicating an abstract pattern from seven dissected shapes. By recording human experience in solving tangram puzzles, we present the Tangram dataset and show that a pre-trained neural model on the Tangram helps solve some mini visual tasks based on low-resolution vision. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed method generates intelligent solutions for aesthetic tasks such as folding clothes and evaluating room layouts. The pre-trained feature extractor can facilitate the convergence of few-shot learning tasks on human handwriting and improve the accuracy in identifying icons by their contours. The Tangram dataset is available at https://github.com/yizhouzhao/Tangram.
abstract_zh: 目前计算机视觉的预训练方法主要关注日常生活中的自然图像。然而，诸如图标和符号之类的抽象图表在现实世界中是常见且重要的。这项工作的灵感来自七巧板，这是一款需要从七个解剖形状复制抽象图案的游戏。通过记录人类解决七巧板谜题的经验，我们提出了七巧板数据集，并表明七巧板上的预训练神经模型有助于解决一些基于低分辨率视觉的小型视觉任务。大量的实验表明，我们提出的方法可以为折叠衣服和评估房间布局等美学任务生成智能解决方案。预训练的特征提取器可以促进人类笔迹上的小样本学习任务的收敛，并提高通过轮廓识别图标的准确性。 Tangram 数据集可在 https://github.com/yizhouzhao/Tangram 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过学习七巧板拼图任务，训练神经网络模型以解决低分辨率下的小型视觉任务。
AI.motivation: 现有计算机视觉预训练方法主要针对自然图像，但现实中的图标、符号等抽象图形同样重要，需探索新方法提升模型对抽象图形的理解能力。
AI.method: 基于七巧板游戏设计数据集，记录人类解题过程，通过预训练神经网络模型学习抽象图形重组规律，并迁移到折叠衣物、房间布局评估等任务中。
AI.result: 预训练模型在低分辨率视觉任务中表现优异，提升了手写体few-shot学习收敛速度和图标轮廓识别准确率。
AI.conclusion: 抽象图形预训练能有效增强模型对结构化视觉任务的处理能力，为小样本学习和低分辨率场景提供新思路。

title: 3D LiDAR Aided GNSS NLOS Mitigation in Urban Canyons
title_zh: 3D LiDAR 辅助城市峡谷中的 GNSS NLOS 缓解
abstract: In this paper, we propose a 3D LiDAR aided global navigation satellite system (GNSS) non-line-of-sight (NLOS) mitigation method caused by both static buildings and dynamic objects. A sliding window map describing the surrounding of the ego-vehicle is first generated, based on real-time 3D point clouds from a 3D LiDAR sensor. Then, NLOS receptions are detected based on the sliding window map using a proposed fast searching method which is free of the initial guess of the position of the GNSS receiver. Instead of directly excluding the detected NLOS satellites from further positioning estimation, this paper rectifies the pseudorange measurement model by (1) correcting the pseudorange measurements if the reflecting point of NLOS signals is detected inside the sliding window map, and (2) remodeling the uncertainty of the NLOS pseudorange measurement using a novel weighting scheme. We evaluated the performance of the proposed method in several typical urban canyons in Hong Kong using an automobile-level GNSS receiver. Moreover, we also evaluate the potential of the proposed NLOS mitigation method in GNSS and inertial navigation systems integration via factor graph optimization.
summary: In this paper, we propose a 3D LiDAR aided global navigation satellite system (GNSS) non-line-of-sight (NLOS) mitigation method caused by both static buildings and dynamic objects. A sliding window map describing the surrounding of the ego-vehicle is first generated, based on real-time 3D point clouds from a 3D LiDAR sensor. Then, NLOS receptions are detected based on the sliding window map using a proposed fast searching method which is free of the initial guess of the position of the GNSS receiver. Instead of directly excluding the detected NLOS satellites from further positioning estimation, this paper rectifies the pseudorange measurement model by (1) correcting the pseudorange measurements if the reflecting point of NLOS signals is detected inside the sliding window map, and (2) remodeling the uncertainty of the NLOS pseudorange measurement using a novel weighting scheme. We evaluated the performance of the proposed method in several typical urban canyons in Hong Kong using an automobile-level GNSS receiver. Moreover, we also evaluate the potential of the proposed NLOS mitigation method in GNSS and inertial navigation systems integration via factor graph optimization.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种 3D LiDAR 辅助全球导航卫星系统 (GNSS) 非视距 (NLOS) 缓解方法，以缓解由静态建筑物和动态物体引起的非视距 (NLOS)。首先根据 3D LiDAR 传感器的实时 3D 点云生成描述自我车辆周围环境的滑动窗口地图。然后，使用所提出的快速搜索方法基于滑动窗口图检测非视距接收，该方法无需对 GNSS 接收器位置进行初始猜测。本文没有直接将检测到的非视距卫星排除在进一步的定位估计之外，而是通过以下方式纠正伪距测量模型：（1）如果在滑动窗口地图内检测到非视距信号的反射点，则校正伪距测量；（2）使用新颖的加权方案重新建模非视距伪距测量的不确定性。我们使用汽车级 GNSS 接收器在香港几个典型的城市峡谷中评估了所提出方法的性能。此外，我们还通过因子图优化评估了所提出的 NLOS 缓解方法在 GNSS 和惯性导航系统集成中的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合3D激光雷达的GNSS非视距(NLOS)信号抑制方法，用于缓解城市峡谷环境中静态建筑和动态物体引起的定位误差。
AI.motivation: 城市峡谷中GNSS信号因建筑物和动态物体遮挡导致NLOS误差，严重影响定位精度，传统方法依赖初始位置猜测且效率低下。
AI.method: 基于实时3D激光雷达点云生成滑动窗口地图，通过快速搜索算法检测NLOS信号；若检测到反射点则修正伪距测量，并采用新型加权方案重构NLOS测量不确定性。
AI.result: 在香港典型城市峡谷场景中验证了方法有效性，并评估了其与惯性导航系统融合的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需初始位置猜测即可有效抑制NLOS误差，提升了GNSS在复杂城市环境中的定位性能，且适用于多传感器融合系统。

title: Controlled-rearing studies of newborn chicks and deep neural networks
title_zh: 新生雏鸡和深度神经网络的控制饲养研究
comment: NeurIPS 2021 Workshop on Shared Visual Representations in Human & Machine Intelligence
comments: NeurIPS 2021 Workshop on Shared Visual Representations in Human & Machine Intelligence
abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) can now achieve human-level performance on challenging object recognition tasks. CNNs are also the leading quantitative models in terms of predicting neural and behavioral responses in visual recognition tasks. However, there is a widely accepted critique of CNN models: unlike newborn animals, which learn rapidly and efficiently, CNNs are thought to be "data hungry," requiring massive amounts of training data to develop accurate models for object recognition. This critique challenges the promise of using CNNs as models of visual development. Here, we directly examined whether CNNs are more data hungry than newborn animals by performing parallel controlled-rearing experiments on newborn chicks and CNNs. We raised newborn chicks in strictly controlled visual environments, then simulated the training data available in that environment by constructing a virtual animal chamber in a video game engine. We recorded the visual images acquired by an agent moving through the virtual chamber and used those images to train CNNs. When CNNs received similar visual training data as chicks, the CNNs successfully solved the same challenging view-invariant object recognition tasks as the chicks. Thus, the CNNs were not more data hungry than animals: both CNNs and chicks successfully developed robust object models from training data of a single object.
summary: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) can now achieve human-level performance on challenging object recognition tasks. CNNs are also the leading quantitative models in terms of predicting neural and behavioral responses in visual recognition tasks. However, there is a widely accepted critique of CNN models: unlike newborn animals, which learn rapidly and efficiently, CNNs are thought to be "data hungry," requiring massive amounts of training data to develop accurate models for object recognition. This critique challenges the promise of using CNNs as models of visual development. Here, we directly examined whether CNNs are more data hungry than newborn animals by performing parallel controlled-rearing experiments on newborn chicks and CNNs. We raised newborn chicks in strictly controlled visual environments, then simulated the training data available in that environment by constructing a virtual animal chamber in a video game engine. We recorded the visual images acquired by an agent moving through the virtual chamber and used those images to train CNNs. When CNNs received similar visual training data as chicks, the CNNs successfully solved the same challenging view-invariant object recognition tasks as the chicks. Thus, the CNNs were not more data hungry than animals: both CNNs and chicks successfully developed robust object models from training data of a single object.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 现在可以在具有挑战性的物体识别任务上达到人类水平的性能。 CNN 在预测视觉识别任务中的神经和行为反应方面也是领先的定量模型。然而，对 CNN 模型有一个广泛接受的批评：与快速高效学习的新生动物不同，CNN 被认为“需要大量数据”，需要大量训练数据来开发准确的物体识别模型。这一批评挑战了使用 CNN 作为视觉发育模型的承诺。在这里，我们通过对新生小鸡和 CNN 进行并行控制饲养实验，直接检验 CNN 是否比新生动物更需要数据。我们在严格控制的视觉环境中饲养新生小鸡，然后通过在视频游戏引擎中构建虚拟动物室来模拟该环境中可用的训练数据。我们记录了代理在虚拟室中移动时获取的视觉图像，并使用这些图像来训练 CNN。当 CNN 接收到与小鸡相似的视觉训练数据时，CNN 成功地解决了与小鸡相同的具有挑战性的视图不变对象识别任务。因此，CNN 并不比动物更需要数据：CNN 和小鸡都成功地从单个对象的训练数据中开发出了强大的对象模型。

AI.tldr: 通过对比新生雏鸡和卷积神经网络（CNN）在受控环境下的学习过程，研究CNN是否比动物更依赖大量数据。
AI.motivation: 尽管CNN在视觉任务中表现优异，但其需要大量训练数据的特性被认为与动物快速学习的能力不符，因此需验证CNN是否真的比动物更'数据饥渴'。
AI.method: 在严格控制的视觉环境中饲养雏鸡，同时构建虚拟环境模拟相同视觉输入，利用该环境中的图像训练CNN，并比较两者的学习效果。
AI.result: 当CNN接受与雏鸡相同的视觉训练数据时，两者均能成功完成不变视角的物体识别任务，表明CNN并不比动物更依赖大量数据。
AI.conclusion: CNN和雏鸡均可通过单一物体的训练数据建立稳健的物体模型，推翻了CNN因'数据饥渴'而无法模拟视觉发育的质疑。

search_text: Controlled-rearing studies of newborn chicks and deep neural networks 新生雏鸡和深度神经网络的控制饲养研究 Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) can now achieve human-level performance on challenging object recognition tasks. CNNs are also the leading quantitative models in terms of predicting neural and behavioral responses in visual recognition tasks. However, there is a widely accepted critique of CNN models: unlike newborn animals, which learn rapidly and efficiently, CNNs are thought to be "data hungry," requiring massive amounts of training data to develop accurate models for object recognition. This critique challenges the promise of using CNNs as models of visual development. Here, we directly examined whether CNNs are more data hungry than newborn animals by performing parallel controlled-rearing experiments on newborn chicks and CNNs. We raised newborn chicks in strictly controlled visual environments, then simulated the training data available in that environment by constructing a virtual animal chamber in a video game engine. We recorded the visual images acquired by an agent moving through the virtual chamber and used those images to train CNNs. When CNNs received similar visual training data as chicks, the CNNs successfully solved the same challenging view-invariant object recognition tasks as the chicks. Thus, the CNNs were not more data hungry than animals: both CNNs and chicks successfully developed robust object models from training data of a single object. 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 现在可以在具有挑战性的物体识别任务上达到人类水平的性能。 CNN 在预测视觉识别任务中的神经和行为反应方面也是领先的定量模型。然而，对 CNN 模型有一个广泛接受的批评：与快速高效学习的新生动物不同，CNN 被认为“需要大量数据”，需要大量训练数据来开发准确的物体识别模型。这一批评挑战了使用 CNN 作为视觉发育模型的承诺。在这里，我们通过对新生小鸡和 CNN 进行并行控制饲养实验，直接检验 CNN 是否比新生动物更需要数据。我们在严格控制的视觉环境中饲养新生小鸡，然后通过在视频游戏引擎中构建虚拟动物室来模拟该环境中可用的训练数据。我们记录了代理在虚拟室中移动时获取的视觉图像，并使用这些图像来训练 CNN。当 CNN 接收到与小鸡相似的视觉训练数据时，CNN 成功地解决了与小鸡相同的具有挑战性的视图不变对象识别任务。因此，CNN 并不比动物更需要数据：CNN 和小鸡都成功地从单个对象的训练数据中开发出了强大的对象模型。 通过对比新生雏鸡和卷积神经网络（CNN）在受控环境下的学习过程，研究CNN是否比动物更依赖大量数据。 Donsuk Lee,Pranav Gujarathi,Justin N. authors_text: Zekun Li,Runyu Guan,Qianmu Yu,Yao-Yi Chiang,Craig A. Knoblock
title: Synthetic Map Generation to Provide Unlimited Training Data for Historical Map Text Detection
title_zh: 合成地图生成为历史地图文本检测提供无限训练数据
abstract: Many historical map sheets are publicly available for studies that require long-term historical geographic data. The cartographic design of these maps includes a combination of map symbols and text labels. Automatically reading text labels from map images could greatly speed up the map interpretation and helps generate rich metadata describing the map content. Many text detection algorithms have been proposed to locate text regions in map images automatically, but most of the algorithms are trained on out-ofdomain datasets (e.g., scenic images). Training data determines the quality of machine learning models, and manually annotating text regions in map images is labor-extensive and time-consuming. On the other hand, existing geographic data sources, such as Open- StreetMap (OSM), contain machine-readable map layers, which allow us to separate out the text layer and obtain text label annotations easily. However, the cartographic styles between OSM map tiles and historical maps are significantly different. This paper proposes a method to automatically generate an unlimited amount of annotated historical map images for training text detection models. We use a style transfer model to convert contemporary map images into historical style and place text labels upon them. We show that the state-of-the-art text detection models (e.g., PSENet) can benefit from the synthetic historical maps and achieve significant improvement for historical map text detection.
summary: Many historical map sheets are publicly available for studies that require long-term historical geographic data. The cartographic design of these maps includes a combination of map symbols and text labels. Automatically reading text labels from map images could greatly speed up the map interpretation and helps generate rich metadata describing the map content. Many text detection algorithms have been proposed to locate text regions in map images automatically, but most of the algorithms are trained on out-ofdomain datasets (e.g., scenic images). Training data determines the quality of machine learning models, and manually annotating text regions in map images is labor-extensive and time-consuming. On the other hand, existing geographic data sources, such as Open- StreetMap (OSM), contain machine-readable map layers, which allow us to separate out the text layer and obtain text label annotations easily. However, the cartographic styles between OSM map tiles and historical maps are significantly different. This paper proposes a method to automatically generate an unlimited amount of annotated historical map images for training text detection models. We use a style transfer model to convert contemporary map images into historical style and place text labels upon them. We show that the state-of-the-art text detection models (e.g., PSENet) can benefit from the synthetic historical maps and achieve significant improvement for historical map text detection.
abstract_zh: 许多历史地图都是公开的，可用于需要长期历史地理数据的研究。这些地图的制图设计包括地图符号和文本标签的组合。自动从地图图像中读取文本标签可以大大加快地图解释速度，并有助于生成描述地图内容的丰富元数据。已经提出了许多文本检测算法来自动定位地图图像中的文本区域，但大多数算法都是在域外数据集（例如风景图像）上进行训练的。训练数据决定了机器学习模型的质量，手动注释地图图像中的文本区域既费力又耗时。另一方面，现有的地理数据源，例如OpenStreetMap（OSM），包含机器可读的地图图层，这使我们能够分离出文本图层并轻松获取文本标签注释。然而，OSM 地图图块和历史地图之间的制图样式有显着不同。本文提出了一种自动生成无限量带注释的历史地图图像以用于训练文本检测模型的方法。我们使用风格转换模型将当代地图图像转换为历史风格，并在其上放置文本标签。我们表明，最先进的文本检测模型（例如 PSENet）可以从合成历史地图中受益，并实现历史地图文本检测的显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自动生成无限量标注历史地图图像的方法，用于训练历史地图文字检测模型。
AI.motivation: 现有文字检测算法依赖于非历史领域数据集（如风景图像）训练，而手动标注历史地图文字区域耗时耗力，且现代地图数据（如OpenStreetMap）与历史地图风格差异显著。
AI.method: 利用风格迁移模型将现代地图转换为历史风格，并叠加文本标签生成合成历史地图图像。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用合成历史地图训练的先进文字检测模型（如PSENet）在历史地图文字检测任务中性能显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了历史地图文字检测数据不足的问题，通过风格迁移生成的合成数据可替代人工标注，提升模型性能。

title: Improving Vision Transformers for Incremental Learning
title_zh: 改进渐进学习的视觉转换器
comment: Add experiments on CIFAR-100, comparison with DER
comments: Add experiments on CIFAR-100, comparison with DER
abstract: This paper proposes a working recipe of using Vision Transformer (ViT) in class incremental learning. Although this recipe only combines existing techniques, developing the combination is not trivial. Firstly, naive application of ViT to replace convolutional neural networks (CNNs) in incremental learning results in serious performance degradation. Secondly, we nail down three issues of naively using ViT: (a) ViT has very slow convergence when the number of classes is small, (b) more bias towards new classes is observed in ViT than CNN-based architectures, and (c) the conventional learning rate of ViT is too low to learn a good classifier layer. Finally, our solution, named ViTIL (ViT for Incremental Learning) achieves new state-of-the-art on both CIFAR and ImageNet datasets for all three class incremental learning setups by a clear margin. We believe this advances the knowledge of transformer in the incremental learning community. Code will be publicly released.
summary: This paper proposes a working recipe of using Vision Transformer (ViT) in class incremental learning. Although this recipe only combines existing techniques, developing the combination is not trivial. Firstly, naive application of ViT to replace convolutional neural networks (CNNs) in incremental learning results in serious performance degradation. Secondly, we nail down three issues of naively using ViT: (a) ViT has very slow convergence when the number of classes is small, (b) more bias towards new classes is observed in ViT than CNN-based architectures, and (c) the conventional learning rate of ViT is too low to learn a good classifier layer. Finally, our solution, named ViTIL (ViT for Incremental Learning) achieves new state-of-the-art on both CIFAR and ImageNet datasets for all three class incremental learning setups by a clear margin. We believe this advances the knowledge of transformer in the incremental learning community. Code will be publicly released.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了在课堂增量学习中使用 Vision Transformer (ViT) 的工作方案。尽管这个配方仅结合了现有技术，但开发这种组合并非易事。首先，在增量学习中简单地应用 ViT 来替代卷积神经网络（CNN）会导致性能严重下降。其次，我们明确了单纯使用 ViT 的三个问题：(a) 当类别数量较少时，ViT 的收敛速度非常慢；(b) 与基于 CNN 的架构相比，ViT 中对新类别的偏见更大；(c) ViT 的传统学习率太低，无法学习良好的分类器层。最后，我们的解决方案名为 ViTIL（ViT 增量学习），在所有三类增量学习设置的 CIFAR 和 ImageNet 数据集上都实现了新的最先进水平。我们相信这会提高增量学习社区中关于 Transformer 的知识。代码将公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进视觉变换器（ViT）以适应增量学习的方法，解决其在类别增量学习中的性能退化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有ViT在增量学习中存在收敛速度慢、新类偏向性高及分类器学习不足的问题，需优化以提升性能。
AI.method: 通过结合现有技术，解决ViT在增量学习中的三个关键问题：优化收敛速度、减少新类偏向性及调整学习率以增强分类器学习。
AI.result: ViTIL方法在CIFAR和ImageNet数据集的三种增量学习设置中均达到新的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 该方法推动了Transformer在增量学习领域的应用，为后续研究提供了有效方案。
