search_text: Improving Vision Transformers for Incremental Learning 改进渐进学习的视觉转换器 This paper proposes a working recipe of using Vision Transformer (ViT) in class incremental learning. Although this recipe only combines existing techniques, developing the combination is not trivial. Firstly, naive application of ViT to replace convolutional neural networks (CNNs) in incremental learning results in serious performance degradation. Secondly, we nail down three issues of naively using ViT: (a) ViT has very slow convergence when the number of classes is small, (b) more bias towards new classes is observed in ViT than CNN-based architectures, and (c) the conventional learning rate of ViT is too low to learn a good classifier layer. Finally, our solution, named ViTIL (ViT for Incremental Learning) achieves new state-of-the-art on both CIFAR and ImageNet datasets for all three class incremental learning setups by a clear margin. We believe this advances the knowledge of transformer in the incremental learning community. Code will be publicly released. 本文提出了在课堂增量学习中使用 Vision Transformer (ViT) 的工作方案。尽管这个配方仅结合了现有技术，但开发这种组合并非易事。首先，在增量学习中简单地应用 ViT 来替代卷积神经网络（CNN）会导致性能严重下降。其次，我们明确了单纯使用 ViT 的三个问题：(a) 当类别数量较少时，ViT 的收敛速度非常慢；(b) 与基于 CNN 的架构相比，ViT 中对新类别的偏见更大；(c) ViT 的传统学习率太低，无法学习良好的分类器层。最后，我们的解决方案名为 ViTIL（ViT 增量学习），在所有三类增量学习设置的 CIFAR 和 ImageNet 数据集上都实现了新的最先进水平。我们相信这会提高增量学习社区中关于 Transformer 的知识。代码将公开发布。 本文提出了一种改进视觉变换器（ViT）以适应增量学习的方法，解决其在类别增量学习中的性能退化问题。 Pei Yu,Yinpeng Chen,Ying Jin,Zicheng Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Pedro Machado,Joao Filipe Ferreira,Andreas Oikonomou,T. M. McGinnity
title: NeuroHSMD: Neuromorphic Hybrid Spiking Motion Detector
title_zh: NeuroHSMD：神经形态混合尖峰运动探测器
abstract: Vertebrate retinas are highly-efficient in processing trivial visual tasks such as detecting moving objects, yet a complex challenges for modern computers. In vertebrates, the detection of object motion is performed by specialised retinal cells named Object Motion Sensitive Ganglion Cells (OMS-GC). OMS-GC process continuous visual signals and generate spike patterns that are post-processed by the Visual Cortex. Our previous Hybrid Sensitive Motion Detector (HSMD) algorithm was the first hybrid algorithm to enhance Background subtraction (BS) algorithms with a customised 3-layer Spiking Neural Network (SNN) that generates OMS-GC spiking-like responses. In this work, we present a Neuromorphic Hybrid Sensitive Motion Detector (NeuroHSMD) algorithm that accelerates our HSMD algorithm using Field-Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs). The NeuroHSMD was compared against the HSMD algorithm, using the same 2012 Change Detection (CDnet2012) and 2014 Change Detection (CDnet2014) benchmark datasets. When tested against the CDnet2012 and CDnet2014 datasets, NeuroHSMD performs object motion detection at 720x480 at 28.06 Frames Per Second (fps) and 720x480 at 28.71 fps, respectively, with no degradation of quality. Moreover, the NeuroHSMD proposed in this paper was completely implemented in Open Computer Language (OpenCL) and therefore is easily replicated in other devices such as Graphical Processing Units (GPUs) and clusters of Central Processing Units (CPUs).
summary: Vertebrate retinas are highly-efficient in processing trivial visual tasks such as detecting moving objects, yet a complex challenges for modern computers. In vertebrates, the detection of object motion is performed by specialised retinal cells named Object Motion Sensitive Ganglion Cells (OMS-GC). OMS-GC process continuous visual signals and generate spike patterns that are post-processed by the Visual Cortex. Our previous Hybrid Sensitive Motion Detector (HSMD) algorithm was the first hybrid algorithm to enhance Background subtraction (BS) algorithms with a customised 3-layer Spiking Neural Network (SNN) that generates OMS-GC spiking-like responses. In this work, we present a Neuromorphic Hybrid Sensitive Motion Detector (NeuroHSMD) algorithm that accelerates our HSMD algorithm using Field-Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs). The NeuroHSMD was compared against the HSMD algorithm, using the same 2012 Change Detection (CDnet2012) and 2014 Change Detection (CDnet2014) benchmark datasets. When tested against the CDnet2012 and CDnet2014 datasets, NeuroHSMD performs object motion detection at 720x480 at 28.06 Frames Per Second (fps) and 720x480 at 28.71 fps, respectively, with no degradation of quality. Moreover, the NeuroHSMD proposed in this paper was completely implemented in Open Computer Language (OpenCL) and therefore is easily replicated in other devices such as Graphical Processing Units (GPUs) and clusters of Central Processing Units (CPUs).
abstract_zh: 脊椎动物的视网膜在处理琐碎的视觉任务（例如检测移动物体）时非常高效，但这对现代计算机来说是一个复杂的挑战。在脊椎动物中，物体运动的检测是由称为物体运动敏感神经节细胞（OMS-GC）的特殊视网膜细胞执行的。 OMS-GC 处理连续的视觉信号并生成由视觉皮层进行后处理的尖峰模式。我们之前的混合敏感运动检测器 (HSMD) 算法是第一个通过定制的 3 层尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 增强背景扣除 (BS) 算法的混合算法，该网络可生成类似 OMS-GC 尖峰的响应。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种神经形态混合敏感运动检测器 (NeuroHSMD) 算法，该算法使用现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 加速我们的 HSMD 算法。使用相同的 2012 年变更检测 (CDnet2012) 和 2014 年变更检测 (CDnet2014) 基准数据集，将 NeuroHSMD 与 HSMD 算法进行比较。当针对 CDnet2012 和 CDnet2014 数据集进行测试时，NeuroHSMD 分别以 720x480、28.06 帧每秒 (fps) 和 720x480、28.71 fps 执行对象运动检测，质量没有下降。此外，本文提出的 NeuroHSMD 完全用开放计算机语言（OpenCL）实现，因此很容易在图形处理单元（GPU）和中央处理单元（CPU）集群等其他设备中复制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于FPGA加速的神经形态混合脉冲运动检测算法NeuroHSMD，通过模仿生物视网膜的运动检测机制提升计算效率。
AI.motivation: 生物视网膜能高效完成运动检测等视觉任务，而传统计算机处理此类任务效率低下。此前提出的HSMD算法虽结合脉冲神经网络（SNN）改进了背景减除法，但计算速度仍需提升。
AI.method: 在HSMD算法基础上，利用FPGA硬件加速技术实现神经形态计算，并通过OpenCL语言实现算法跨平台移植，支持GPU和CPU集群部署。
AI.result: 在CDnet2012和CDnet2014数据集上，NeuroHSMD在720x480分辨率下分别达到28.06fps和28.71fps的实时检测速度，且检测质量无损失。
AI.conclusion: NeuroHSMD通过硬件加速有效提升了运动检测效率，同时保持算法精度，为神经形态计算在视觉处理领域的应用提供了可扩展的解决方案。

title: CHAMP: Coherent Hardware-Aware Magnitude Pruning of Integrated Photonic Neural Networks
title_zh: CHAMP：集成光子神经网络的相干硬件感知幅度修剪
comment: This paper has been accepted for oral presentation at the IEEE/OPTICA Optical Fiber Communication Conference (OFC) 2022 and will appear in OFC proceedings
comments: This paper has been accepted for oral presentation at the IEEE/OPTICA Optical Fiber Communication Conference (OFC) 2022 and will appear in OFC proceedings
abstract: We propose a novel hardware-aware magnitude pruning technique for coherent photonic neural networks. The proposed technique can prune 99.45% of network parameters and reduce the static power consumption by 98.23% with a negligible accuracy loss.
summary: We propose a novel hardware-aware magnitude pruning technique for coherent photonic neural networks. The proposed technique can prune 99.45% of network parameters and reduce the static power consumption by 98.23% with a negligible accuracy loss.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于相干光子神经网络的新型硬件感知幅度修剪技术。该技术可以修剪 99.45% 的网络参数，降低 98.23% 的静态功耗，且精度损失可以忽略不计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向硬件的相干光子神经网络幅度剪枝技术CHAMP，可大幅减少网络参数和功耗。
AI.motivation: 光子神经网络在硬件实现中面临高功耗和参数冗余问题，需开发高效剪枝方法以优化硬件资源。
AI.method: 设计硬件感知的幅度剪枝算法，在保持模型精度的前提下，通过剪枝去除冗余参数。
AI.result: 成功剪枝99.45%参数，静态功耗降低98.23%，精度损失可忽略。
AI.conclusion: CHAMP技术为光子神经网络的硬件优化提供了有效解决方案，显著提升能效比。

authors_text: Javad Pourmostafa Roshan Sharami,Dimitar Shterionov,Pieter Spronck
title: Selecting Parallel In-domain Sentences for Neural Machine Translation Using Monolingual Texts
title_zh: 使用单语文本为神经机器翻译选择并行的域内句子
comment: Accepted to the CLIN Journal on Dec 6, 2021 (Camera-ready Version)
comments: Accepted to the CLIN Journal on Dec 6, 2021 (Camera-ready Version)
abstract: Continuously-growing data volumes lead to larger generic models. Specific use-cases are usually left out, since generic models tend to perform poorly in domain-specific cases. Our work addresses this gap with a method for selecting in-domain data from generic-domain (parallel text) corpora, for the task of machine translation. The proposed method ranks sentences in parallel general-domain data according to their cosine similarity with a monolingual domain-specific data set. We then select the top K sentences with the highest similarity score to train a new machine translation system tuned to the specific in-domain data. Our experimental results show that models trained on this in-domain data outperform models trained on generic or a mixture of generic and domain data. That is, our method selects high-quality domain-specific training instances at low computational cost and data size.
summary: Continuously-growing data volumes lead to larger generic models. Specific use-cases are usually left out, since generic models tend to perform poorly in domain-specific cases. Our work addresses this gap with a method for selecting in-domain data from generic-domain (parallel text) corpora, for the task of machine translation. The proposed method ranks sentences in parallel general-domain data according to their cosine similarity with a monolingual domain-specific data set. We then select the top K sentences with the highest similarity score to train a new machine translation system tuned to the specific in-domain data. Our experimental results show that models trained on this in-domain data outperform models trained on generic or a mixture of generic and domain data. That is, our method selects high-quality domain-specific training instances at low computational cost and data size.
abstract_zh: 不断增长的数据量导致更大的通用模型。通常会忽略特定的用例，因为通用模型在特定领域的情况下往往表现不佳。我们的工作通过一种从通用域（并行文本）语料库中选择域内数据的方法来解决这一差距，以完成机器翻译任务。所提出的方法根据并行通用领域数据中的句子与单语言特定领域数据集的余弦相似度对句子进行排名。然后，我们选择相似度得分最高的前 K 个句子来训练一个针对特定域内数据调整的新机器翻译系统。我们的实验结果表明，在此域​​内数据上训练的模型优于在通用数据或通用数据和域数据的混合上训练的模型。也就是说，我们的方法以较低的计算成本和数据大小选择高质量的特定领域训练实例。

AI.motivation: 通用领域模型在特定应用场景中表现不佳，而领域内平行语料获取成本高，需高效筛选方法。

AI.result: 实验表明，基于筛选领域数据训练的模型在特定任务上优于通用模型或通用-领域混合数据训练模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法以低成本高效筛选高质量领域训练样本，有效提升领域自适应机器翻译性能。

search_text: Selecting Parallel In-domain Sentences for Neural Machine Translation Using Monolingual Texts 使用单语文本为神经机器翻译选择并行的域内句子 Continuously-growing data volumes lead to larger generic models. Specific use-cases are usually left out, since generic models tend to perform poorly in domain-specific cases. Our work addresses this gap with a method for selecting in-domain data from generic-domain (parallel text) corpora, for the task of machine translation. The proposed method ranks sentences in parallel general-domain data according to their cosine similarity with a monolingual domain-specific data set. We then select the top K sentences with the highest similarity score to train a new machine translation system tuned to the specific in-domain data. Our experimental results show that models trained on this in-domain data outperform models trained on generic or a mixture of generic and domain data. That is, our method selects high-quality domain-specific training instances at low computational cost and data size. 不断增长的数据量导致更大的通用模型。通常会忽略特定的用例，因为通用模型在特定领域的情况下往往表现不佳。我们的工作通过一种从通用域（并行文本）语料库中选择域内数据的方法来解决这一差距，以完成机器翻译任务。所提出的方法根据并行通用领域数据中的句子与单语言特定领域数据集的余弦相似度对句子进行排名。然后，我们选择相似度得分最高的前 K 个句子来训练一个针对特定域内数据调整的新机器翻译系统。我们的实验结果表明，在此域​​内数据上训练的模型优于在通用数据或通用数据和域数据的混合上训练的模型。也就是说，我们的方法以较低的计算成本和数据大小选择高质量的特定领域训练实例。 本文提出一种利用单语文本从通用平行语料中筛选领域内句子的方法，以提升神经机器翻译在特定领域的性能。 Javad Pourmostafa Roshan Sharami,Dimitar Shterionov,Pieter Spronck cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Convergence of Generalized Belief Propagation Algorithm on Graphs with Motifs
title_zh: 带基序图上广义置信传播算法的收敛性
abstract: Belief propagation is a fundamental message-passing algorithm for numerous applications in machine learning. It is known that belief propagation algorithm is exact on tree graphs. However, belief propagation is run on loopy graphs in most applications. So, understanding the behavior of belief propagation on loopy graphs has been a major topic for researchers in different areas. In this paper, we study the convergence behavior of generalized belief propagation algorithm on graphs with motifs (triangles, loops, etc.) We show under a certain initialization, generalized belief propagation converges to the global optimum of the Bethe free energy for ferromagnetic Ising models on graphs with motifs.
summary: Belief propagation is a fundamental message-passing algorithm for numerous applications in machine learning. It is known that belief propagation algorithm is exact on tree graphs. However, belief propagation is run on loopy graphs in most applications. So, understanding the behavior of belief propagation on loopy graphs has been a major topic for researchers in different areas. In this paper, we study the convergence behavior of generalized belief propagation algorithm on graphs with motifs (triangles, loops, etc.) We show under a certain initialization, generalized belief propagation converges to the global optimum of the Bethe free energy for ferromagnetic Ising models on graphs with motifs.
abstract_zh: 置信传播是机器学习中众多应用的基本消息传递算法。众所周知，置信传播算法在树形图上是精确的。然而，在大多数应用中，置信传播是在循环图上运行的。因此，理解循环图上的信念传播行为一直是不同领域研究人员的主要课题。在本文中，我们研究了具有基序（三角形、循环等）的图上的广义置信传播算法的收敛行为。我们表明，在一定的初始化下，具有基序的铁磁伊辛模型的广义置信传播在一定的初始化下收敛到 Bethe 自由能的全局最优。

AI.tldr: 本文研究广义信念传播算法在存在motif（如三角形、环等）的图上的收敛性。
AI.motivation: 信念传播算法在树状图中精确有效，但实际应用多涉及含环的复杂图结构，理解其收敛行为对算法应用至关重要。
AI.method: 通过理论分析与数学证明，研究特定初始化条件下广义信念传播算法在含motif图中的收敛性。
AI.result: 证明在特定初始化下，广义信念传播算法可收敛至铁磁伊辛模型的Bethe自由能全局最优解。
AI.conclusion: 该结果为复杂网络中使用广义信念传播算法提供了理论保障，推动其在实际问题中的应用。

authors_text: Shaoyu Chen,Fabio Miranda,Nivan Ferreira,Marcos Lage,Harish Doraiswamy,Corinne Brenner,Connor Defanti,Michael Koutsoubis,Luc Wilson,Ken Perlin,Claudio Silva
title: UrbanRama: Navigating Cities in Virtual Reality
title_zh: UrbanRama：在虚拟现实中导航城市
abstract: Exploring large virtual environments, such as cities, is a central task in several domains, such as gaming and urban planning. VR systems can greatly help this task by providing an immersive experience; however, a common issue with viewing and navigating a city in the traditional sense is that users can either obtain a local or a global view, but not both at the same time, requiring them to continuously switch between perspectives, losing context and distracting them from their analysis. In this paper, our goal is to allow users to navigate to points of interest without changing perspectives. To accomplish this, we design an intuitive navigation interface that takes advantage of the strong sense of spatial presence provided by VR. We supplement this interface with a perspective that warps the environment, called UrbanRama, based on a cylindrical projection, providing a mix of local and global views. The design of this interface was performed as an iterative process in collaboration with architects and urban planners. We conducted a qualitative and a quantitative pilot user study to evaluate UrbanRama and the results indicate the effectiveness of our system in reducing perspective changes, while ensuring that the warping doesn't affect distance and orientation perception.
summary: Exploring large virtual environments, such as cities, is a central task in several domains, such as gaming and urban planning. VR systems can greatly help this task by providing an immersive experience; however, a common issue with viewing and navigating a city in the traditional sense is that users can either obtain a local or a global view, but not both at the same time, requiring them to continuously switch between perspectives, losing context and distracting them from their analysis. In this paper, our goal is to allow users to navigate to points of interest without changing perspectives. To accomplish this, we design an intuitive navigation interface that takes advantage of the strong sense of spatial presence provided by VR. We supplement this interface with a perspective that warps the environment, called UrbanRama, based on a cylindrical projection, providing a mix of local and global views. The design of this interface was performed as an iterative process in collaboration with architects and urban planners. We conducted a qualitative and a quantitative pilot user study to evaluate UrbanRama and the results indicate the effectiveness of our system in reducing perspective changes, while ensuring that the warping doesn't affect distance and orientation perception.
abstract_zh: 探索大型虚拟环境（例如城市）是游戏和城市规划等多个领域的核心任务。 VR 系统可以通过提供身临其境的体验来极大地帮助完成这项任务；然而，传统意义上的城市观察和导航的一个常见问题是，用户只能获得局部视图或全局视图，但不能同时获得这两种视图，这要求他们不断地在视角之间切换，从而失去背景并分散他们的分析注意力。在本文中，我们的目标是允许用户在不改变视角的情况下导航到兴趣点。为了实现这一目标，我们设计了一个直观的导航界面，利用 VR 提供的强烈空间临场感。我们用一种扭曲环境的视角来补充这个界面，称为 UrbanRama，基于圆柱投影，提供本地和全球视图的混合。该界面的设计是与建筑师和城市规划师合作的迭代过程。我们进行了定性和定量试点用户研究来评估 UrbanRama，结果表明我们的系统在减少视角变化方面的有效性，同时确保扭曲不会影响距离和方向感知。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UrbanRama系统，通过虚拟现实技术实现城市环境中的无缝导航，使用户无需切换视角即可同时获取局部与全局视野。
AI.motivation: 传统VR系统在城市探索中存在局部与全局视角切换的问题，导致用户失去空间上下文并分散注意力，影响分析效率。
AI.method: 设计基于柱面投影的UrbanRama界面，结合建筑师与城市规划师的迭代反馈，通过定性和定量用户研究验证系统有效性。
AI.result: 用户研究显示UrbanRama显著减少视角切换需求，且环境变形未影响距离与方向感知，证明系统在导航效率与空间认知上的平衡。
AI.conclusion: UrbanRama通过创新视角融合机制，为虚拟城市探索提供了更自然、高效的导航方案，为VR城市应用奠定基础。

We conducted a qualitative and a quantitative pilot user study to evaluate UrbanRama and the results indicate the effectiveness of our system in reducing perspective changes, while ensuring that the warping doesn't affect distance and orientation perception. 探索大型虚拟环境（例如城市）是游戏和城市规划等多个领域的核心任务。 VR 系统可以通过提供身临其境的体验来极大地帮助完成这项任务；然而，传统意义上的城市观察和导航的一个常见问题是，用户只能获得局部视图或全局视图，但不能同时获得这两种视图，这要求他们不断地在视角之间切换，从而失去背景并分散他们的分析注意力。在本文中，我们的目标是允许用户在不改变视角的情况下导航到兴趣点。为了实现这一目标，我们设计了一个直观的导航界面，利用 VR 提供的强烈空间临场感。我们用一种扭曲环境的视角来补充这个界面，称为 UrbanRama，基于圆柱投影，提供本地和全球视图的混合。该界面的设计是与建筑师和城市规划师合作的迭代过程。我们进行了定性和定量试点用户研究来评估 UrbanRama，结果表明我们的系统在减少视角变化方面的有效性，同时确保扭曲不会影响距离和方向感知。 本文提出UrbanRama系统，通过虚拟现实技术实现城市环境中的无缝导航，使用户无需切换视角即可同时获取局部与全局视野。 Shaoyu Chen,Fabio Miranda,Nivan Ferreira,Marcos Lage,Harish Doraiswamy,Corinne Brenner,Connor Defanti,Michael Koutsoubis,Luc Wilson,Ken Perlin,Claudio Silva cs.HC,cs.GR

authors_text: Ipek Baris Schlicht,Angel Felipe Magnossão de Paula,Paolo Rosso
title: UPV at TREC Health Misinformation Track 2021 Ranking with SBERT and Quality Estimators
title_zh: UPV 在 TREC Health Misinformation Track 2021 中与 SBERT 和质量估算器进行排名
abstract: Health misinformation on search engines is a significant problem that could negatively affect individuals or public health. To mitigate the problem, TREC organizes a health misinformation track. This paper presents our submissions to this track. We use a BM25 and a domain-specific semantic search engine for retrieving initial documents. Later, we examine a health news schema for quality assessment and apply it to re-rank documents. We merge the scores from the different components by using reciprocal rank fusion. Finally, we discuss the results and conclude with future works.
summary: Health misinformation on search engines is a significant problem that could negatively affect individuals or public health. To mitigate the problem, TREC organizes a health misinformation track. This paper presents our submissions to this track. We use a BM25 and a domain-specific semantic search engine for retrieving initial documents. Later, we examine a health news schema for quality assessment and apply it to re-rank documents. We merge the scores from the different components by using reciprocal rank fusion. Finally, we discuss the results and conclude with future works.
abstract_zh: 搜索引擎上的健康错误信息是一个重大问题，可能会对个人或公共健康产生负面影响。为了缓解这个问题，TREC 组织了一个健康错误信息跟踪。本文介绍了我们对此轨道的提交内容。我们使用 BM25 和特定领域语义搜索引擎来检索初始文档。随后，我们检查健康新闻模式以进行质量评估，并将其应用于对文档进行重新排序。我们通过使用倒数排名融合来合并来自不同组件的分数。最后，我们讨论结果并总结未来的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了UPV团队在TREC健康错误信息跟踪2021中的排名方法，结合BM25、语义搜索和质量评估模型进行文档检索与重排序。
AI.motivation: 健康错误信息可能危害个人及公共健康，TREC通过组织健康错误信息跟踪任务推动相关技术研究。
AI.method: 采用BM25和领域语义搜索引擎进行初步检索，基于健康新闻模式评估文档质量并重排序，通过互惠排名融合整合多模型得分。
AI.result: 实验结果验证了多阶段检索与质量评估结合的有效性，但具体指标未明确说明。
AI.conclusion: 方法在健康错误信息识别中展现潜力，未来需优化质量评估模型并探索更多数据特征。

authors_text: Hengkang Wang,Taihui Li,Zhong Zhuang,Tiancong Chen,Hengyue Liang,Ju Sun
title: Early Stopping for Deep Image Prior
title_zh: 深度图像先验的提前停止
abstract: Deep image prior (DIP) and its variants have showed remarkable potential for solving inverse problems in computer vision, without any extra training data. Practical DIP models are often substantially overparameterized. During the fitting process, these models learn mostly the desired visual content first, and then pick up the potential modeling and observational noise, i.e., overfitting. Thus, the practicality of DIP often depends critically on good early stopping (ES) that captures the transition period. In this regard, the majority of DIP works for vision tasks only demonstrates the potential of the models -- reporting the peak performance against the ground truth, but provides no clue about how to operationally obtain near-peak performance without access to the groundtruth. In this paper, we set to break this practicality barrier of DIP, and propose an efficient ES strategy, which consistently detects near-peak performance across several vision tasks and DIP variants. Based on a simple measure of dispersion of consecutive DIP reconstructions, our ES method not only outpaces the existing ones -- which only work in very narrow domains, but also remains effective when combined with a number of methods that try to mitigate the overfitting. The code is available at https://github.com/sun-umn/Early_Stopping_for_DIP.
summary: Deep image prior (DIP) and its variants have showed remarkable potential for solving inverse problems in computer vision, without any extra training data. Practical DIP models are often substantially overparameterized. During the fitting process, these models learn mostly the desired visual content first, and then pick up the potential modeling and observational noise, i.e., overfitting. Thus, the practicality of DIP often depends critically on good early stopping (ES) that captures the transition period. In this regard, the majority of DIP works for vision tasks only demonstrates the potential of the models -- reporting the peak performance against the ground truth, but provides no clue about how to operationally obtain near-peak performance without access to the groundtruth. In this paper, we set to break this practicality barrier of DIP, and propose an efficient ES strategy, which consistently detects near-peak performance across several vision tasks and DIP variants. Based on a simple measure of dispersion of consecutive DIP reconstructions, our ES method not only outpaces the existing ones -- which only work in very narrow domains, but also remains effective when combined with a number of methods that try to mitigate the overfitting. The code is available at https://github.com/sun-umn/Early_Stopping_for_DIP.
abstract_zh: 深度图像先验（DIP）及其变体在解决计算机视觉中的逆问题方面表现出了巨大的潜力，无需任何额外的训练数据。实际的 DIP 模型通常参数化严重。在拟合过程中，这些模型首先主要学习所需的视觉内容，然后拾取潜在的建模和观察噪声，即过度拟合。因此，DIP 的实用性通常关键取决于捕获过渡期的良好提前停止 (ES)。在这方面，大多数用于视觉任务的 DIP 仅展示了模型的潜力——根据真实情况报告峰值性能，但没有提供有关如何在不接触真实情况的情况下在操作上获得接近峰值性能的线索。在本文中，我们将打破 DIP 的实用性障碍，并提出一种有效的 ES 策略，该策略能够一致地检测多个视觉任务和 DIP 变体的接近峰值性能。基于连续 DIP 重建离散度的简单测量，我们的 ES 方法不仅超过了现有的方法（仅适用于非常狭窄的领域），而且在与许多试图减轻过度拟合的方法结合使用时仍然有效。该代码位于 https://github.com/sun-umn/Early_Stopping_for_DIP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的早停策略，用于改进深度图像先验（DIP）模型在计算机视觉逆问题中的实用性。
AI.motivation: 现有DIP方法虽展示潜力，但缺乏无需真实标签即可实现近峰值性能的操作性早停方案，限制了其实际应用。
AI.method: 通过测量连续DIP重建结果的离散度，提出简单且通用的早停指标，该方法兼容多种过拟合缓解技术。
AI.result: 该策略在多个视觉任务和DIP变体中均优于现有方法，且代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的早停策略有效解决了DIP模型在无真实标签场景下的性能优化问题，提升了其实际可用性。

Thus, the practicality of DIP often depends critically on good early stopping (ES) that captures the transition period. In this regard, the majority of DIP works for vision tasks only demonstrates the potential of the models -- reporting the peak performance against the ground truth, but provides no clue about how to operationally obtain near-peak performance without access to the groundtruth. Based on a simple measure of dispersion of consecutive DIP reconstructions, our ES method not only outpaces the existing ones -- which only work in very narrow domains, but also remains effective when combined with a number of methods that try to mitigate the overfitting. title: A tight bound for the clique query problem in two rounds
title_zh: 两轮派系查询问题的紧界
abstract: We consider a problem introduced by Feige, Gamarnik, Neeman, Rácz and Tetali [2020], that of finding a large clique in a random graph $G\sim G(n,\frac{1}{2})$, where the graph $G$ is accessible by queries to entries of its adjacency matrix. The query model allows some limited adaptivity, with a constant number of rounds of queries, and $n^δ$ queries in each round. With high probability, the maximum clique in $G$ is of size roughly $2\log n$, and the goal is to find cliques of size $α\log n$, for $α$ as large as possible. We prove that no two-rounds algorithm is likely to find a clique larger than $\frac{4}{3}δ\log n$, which is a tight upper bound when $1\leqδ\leq \frac{6}{5}$. For other ranges of parameters, namely, two-rounds with $\frac{6}{5}<δ<2$, and three-rounds with $1\leqδ<2$, we improve over the previously known upper bounds on $α$, but our upper bounds are not tight. If early rounds are restricted to have fewer queries than the last round, then for some such restrictions we do prove tight upper bounds.
summary: We consider a problem introduced by Feige, Gamarnik, Neeman, Rácz and Tetali [2020], that of finding a large clique in a random graph $G\sim G(n,\frac{1}{2})$, where the graph $G$ is accessible by queries to entries of its adjacency matrix. The query model allows some limited adaptivity, with a constant number of rounds of queries, and $n^δ$ queries in each round. With high probability, the maximum clique in $G$ is of size roughly $2\log n$, and the goal is to find cliques of size $α\log n$, for $α$ as large as possible. We prove that no two-rounds algorithm is likely to find a clique larger than $\frac{4}{3}δ\log n$, which is a tight upper bound when $1\leqδ\leq \frac{6}{5}$. For other ranges of parameters, namely, two-rounds with $\frac{6}{5}<δ<2$, and three-rounds with $1\leqδ<2$, we improve over the previously known upper bounds on $α$, but our upper bounds are not tight. If early rounds are restricted to have fewer queries than the last round, then for some such restrictions we do prove tight upper bounds.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑 Feige、Gamarnik、Neeman、Rácz 和 Tetali [2020] 提出的一个问题，即在随机图 $G\sim G(n,\frac{1}{2})$ 中找到一个大派系，其中图 $G$ 可以通过查询其邻接矩阵的条目来访问。查询模型允许一些有限的适应性，查询轮数恒定，每轮有 $n^δ$ 次查询。很有可能，$G$ 中的最大团的大小约为 $2\log n$，目标是找到大小为 $α\log n$ 的团，其中 $α$ 尽可能大。我们证明，没有两轮算法可能找到大于 $\frac{4}{3}δ\log n$ 的团，当 $1\leqδ\leq \frac{6}{5}$ 时，这是一个严格的上限。对于其他参数范围，即 $\frac{6}{5}<δ<2$ 的两轮和 $1\leqδ<2$ 的三轮，我们改进了先前已知的 $α$ 上限，但我们的上限并不严格。如果早期轮次被限制为比上轮次有更少的查询，那么对于某些此类限制，我们确实证明了严格的上限。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在两轮查询限制下，随机图中寻找最大团问题的理论上限。
AI.motivation: 确定在有限查询次数和轮次约束下，能从随机图中找到的最大团规模的理论极限，改进现有结果。
AI.method: 通过概率分析与上界证明方法，结合不同轮次查询次数分配策略进行推导。
AI.result: 证明两轮算法无法找到超过4/3δ log n规模的团（当1≤δ≤6/5时为紧界），并改进了其他参数范围的上界。
AI.conclusion: 为两轮查询模型建立了紧致上界，部分场景下验证了查询轮次分配对结果的影响，深化了团查询问题的复杂性理解。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究在两轮查询限制下，随机图中寻找最大团问题的理论上限。
ai_content.motivation: 确定在有限查询次数和轮次约束下，能从随机图中找到的最大团规模的理论极限，改进现有结果。

search_text: A tight bound for the clique query problem in two rounds 两轮派系查询问题的紧界 We consider a problem introduced by Feige, Gamarnik, Neeman, Rácz and Tetali [2020], that of finding a large clique in a random graph $G\sim G(n,\frac{1}{2})$, where the graph $G$ is accessible by queries to entries of its adjacency matrix. The query model allows some limited adaptivity, with a constant number of rounds of queries, and $n^δ$ queries in each round. With high probability, the maximum clique in $G$ is of size roughly $2\log n$, and the goal is to find cliques of size $α\log n$, for $α$ as large as possible. We prove that no two-rounds algorithm is likely to find a clique larger than $\frac{4}{3}δ\log n$, which is a tight upper bound when $1\leqδ\leq \frac{6}{5}$. For other ranges of parameters, namely, two-rounds with $\frac{6}{5}<δ<2$, and three-rounds with $1\leqδ<2$, we improve over the previously known upper bounds on $α$, but our upper bounds are not tight. If early rounds are restricted to have fewer queries than the last round, then for some such restrictions we do prove tight upper bounds. 我们考虑 Feige、Gamarnik、Neeman、Rácz 和 Tetali [2020] 提出的一个问题，即在随机图 $G\sim G(n,\frac{1}{2})$ 中找到一个大派系，其中图 $G$ 可以通过查询其邻接矩阵的条目来访问。查询模型允许一些有限的适应性，查询轮数恒定，每轮有 $n^δ$ 次查询。很有可能，$G$ 中的最大团的大小约为 $2\log n$，目标是找到大小为 $α\log n$ 的团，其中 $α$ 尽可能大。我们证明，没有两轮算法可能找到大于 $\frac{4}{3}δ\log n$ 的团，当 $1\leqδ\leq \frac{6}{5}$ 时，这是一个严格的上限。对于其他参数范围，即 $\frac{6}{5}<δ<2$ 的两轮和 $1\leqδ<2$ 的三轮，我们改进了先前已知的 $α$ 上限，但我们的上限并不严格。如果早期轮次被限制为比上轮次有更少的查询，那么对于某些此类限制，我们确实证明了严格的上限。 本文研究在两轮查询限制下，随机图中寻找最大团问题的理论上限。 Uriel Feige,Tom Ferster cs.DS

title: Perceptual Loss with Recognition Model for Single-Channel Enhancement and Robust ASR
title_zh: 用于单通道增强和鲁棒 ASR 的识别模型的感知损失
abstract: Single-channel speech enhancement approaches do not always improve automatic recognition rates in the presence of noise, because they can introduce distortions unhelpful for recognition. Following a trend towards end-to-end training of sequential neural network models, several research groups have addressed this problem with joint training of front-end enhancement module with back-end recognition module. While this approach ensures enhancement outputs are helpful for recognition, the enhancement model can overfit to the training data, weakening the recognition model in the presence of unseen noise. To address this, we used a pre-trained acoustic model to generate a perceptual loss that makes speech enhancement more aware of the phonetic properties of the signal. This approach keeps some benefits of joint training, while alleviating the overfitting problem. Experiments on Voicebank + DEMAND dataset for enhancement show that this approach achieves a new state of the art for some objective enhancement scores. In combination with distortion-independent training, our approach gets a WER of 2.80\% on the test set, which is more than 20\% relative better recognition performance than joint training, and 14\% relative better than distortion-independent mask training.
summary: Single-channel speech enhancement approaches do not always improve automatic recognition rates in the presence of noise, because they can introduce distortions unhelpful for recognition. Following a trend towards end-to-end training of sequential neural network models, several research groups have addressed this problem with joint training of front-end enhancement module with back-end recognition module. While this approach ensures enhancement outputs are helpful for recognition, the enhancement model can overfit to the training data, weakening the recognition model in the presence of unseen noise. To address this, we used a pre-trained acoustic model to generate a perceptual loss that makes speech enhancement more aware of the phonetic properties of the signal. This approach keeps some benefits of joint training, while alleviating the overfitting problem. Experiments on Voicebank + DEMAND dataset for enhancement show that this approach achieves a new state of the art for some objective enhancement scores. In combination with distortion-independent training, our approach gets a WER of 2.80\% on the test set, which is more than 20\% relative better recognition performance than joint training, and 14\% relative better than distortion-independent mask training.
abstract_zh: 单通道语音增强方法并不总能提高存在噪声的情况下的自动识别率，因为它们可能会引入对识别无益的失真。顺应序列神经网络模型端到端训练的趋势，多个研究小组通过前端增强模块与后端识别模块的联合训练来解决这个问题。虽然这种方法确保增强输出有助于识别，但增强模型可能会过度拟合训练数据，从而在存在看不见的噪声的情况下削弱识别模型。为了解决这个问题，我们使用预先训练的声学模型来生成感知损失，使语音增强更加了解信号的语音属性。这种方法保留了联合训练的一些好处，同时缓解了过度拟合问题。在 Voicebank + DEMAND 数据集上进行的增强实验表明，该方法在某些客观增强分数方面达到了新的最先进水平。与失真无关训练相结合，我们的方法在测试集上获得了 2.80% 的 WER，比联合训练的识别性能相对好 20% 以上，比失真无关掩模训练相对好 14%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合感知损失和识别模型的单通道语音增强方法，以提高自动语音识别（ASR）的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统的单通道语音增强方法在存在噪声时可能无法提高ASR的识别率，因为它们可能会引入对识别无益的失真。联合训练前端增强模块与后端识别模块虽然能确保增强输出对识别有帮助，但可能导致增强模型过度拟合训练数据，从而在面对未见过的噪声时削弱识别模型的性能。
AI.method: 本文使用预训练的声学模型生成感知损失，使语音增强更加关注信号的音素特性。该方法在保留联合训练一些优势的同时，缓解了过度拟合问题。
AI.result: 在Voicebank + DEMAND数据集上的实验表明，该方法在某些客观增强指标上达到了新的最先进水平。结合无失真训练，该方法在测试集上的词错误率（WER）为2.80%，比联合训练提高了20%以上，比无失真掩码训练提高了14%。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法通过引入感知损失，有效提升了语音增强的鲁棒性，从而显著提高了ASR的识别性能。

authors_text: Muchao Ye,Junyu Luo,Guanjie Zheng,Cao Xiao,Ting Wang,Fenglong Ma
title: MedAttacker: Exploring Black-Box Adversarial Attacks on Risk Prediction Models in Healthcare
title_zh: MedAttacker：探索医疗保健风险预测模型的黑盒对抗性攻击
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have been broadly adopted in health risk prediction to provide healthcare diagnoses and treatments. To evaluate their robustness, existing research conducts adversarial attacks in the white/gray-box setting where model parameters are accessible. However, a more realistic black-box adversarial attack is ignored even though most real-world models are trained with private data and released as black-box services on the cloud. To fill this gap, we propose the first black-box adversarial attack method against health risk prediction models named MedAttacker to investigate their vulnerability. MedAttacker addresses the challenges brought by EHR data via two steps: hierarchical position selection which selects the attacked positions in a reinforcement learning (RL) framework and substitute selection which identifies substitute with a score-based principle. Particularly, by considering the temporal context inside EHRs, it initializes its RL position selection policy by using the contribution score of each visit and the saliency score of each code, which can be well integrated with the deterministic substitute selection process decided by the score changes. In experiments, MedAttacker consistently achieves the highest average success rate and even outperforms a recent white-box EHR adversarial attack technique in certain cases when attacking three advanced health risk prediction models in the black-box setting across multiple real-world datasets. In addition, based on the experiment results we include a discussion on defending EHR adversarial attacks.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have been broadly adopted in health risk prediction to provide healthcare diagnoses and treatments. To evaluate their robustness, existing research conducts adversarial attacks in the white/gray-box setting where model parameters are accessible. However, a more realistic black-box adversarial attack is ignored even though most real-world models are trained with private data and released as black-box services on the cloud. To fill this gap, we propose the first black-box adversarial attack method against health risk prediction models named MedAttacker to investigate their vulnerability. MedAttacker addresses the challenges brought by EHR data via two steps: hierarchical position selection which selects the attacked positions in a reinforcement learning (RL) framework and substitute selection which identifies substitute with a score-based principle. Particularly, by considering the temporal context inside EHRs, it initializes its RL position selection policy by using the contribution score of each visit and the saliency score of each code, which can be well integrated with the deterministic substitute selection process decided by the score changes. In experiments, MedAttacker consistently achieves the highest average success rate and even outperforms a recent white-box EHR adversarial attack technique in certain cases when attacking three advanced health risk prediction models in the black-box setting across multiple real-world datasets. In addition, based on the experiment results we include a discussion on defending EHR adversarial attacks.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）已广泛应用于健康风险预测，以提供医疗保健诊断和治疗。为了评估其稳健性，现有研究在可访问模型参数的白/灰盒设置中进行对抗性攻击。然而，尽管大多数现实世界的模型都是使用私有数据进行训练并作为云上的黑盒服务发布的，但更现实的黑盒对抗攻击却被忽略了。为了填补这一空白，我们提出了第一个针对健康风险预测模型的黑盒对抗攻击方法，名为 MedAttacker，以调查其漏洞。 MedAttacker 通过两个步骤解决 EHR 数据带来的挑战：分层位置选择，在强化学习 (RL) 框架中选择受攻击的位置，以及替代选择，根据基于分数的原则识别替代。特别是，通过考虑 EHR 内部的时间上下文，它使用每次访问的贡献分数和每个代码的显着性分数来初始化其 RL 位置选择策略，这可以与分数变化决定的确定性替代选择过程很好地集成。在实验中，当在多个真实世界数据集的黑盒设置中攻击三个先进的健康风险预测模型时，MedAttacker 始终实现了最高的平均成功率，甚至在某些情况下优于最近的白盒 EHR 对抗攻击技术。此外，根据实验结果，我们还讨论了防御 EHR 对抗性攻击的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对医疗健康风险预测模型的黑盒对抗攻击方法MedAttacker，用于评估其在现实场景中的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注白盒/灰盒对抗攻击，但实际医疗模型多以黑盒形式部署，缺乏针对真实场景的黑盒攻击方法。
AI.method: 通过分层位置选择（基于强化学习框架）和替代选择（基于评分原则）两步策略，结合电子健康记录（EHR）的时序上下文信息初始化攻击策略。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集上，MedAttacker在黑盒设置下对三种先进医疗模型的攻击成功率均最高，部分场景下优于白盒攻击技术。
AI.conclusion: MedAttacker验证了医疗预测模型在黑盒场景下的脆弱性，并为防御对抗攻击提供了实验依据。

motivation: 现有研究多关注白盒/灰盒对抗攻击，但实际医疗模型多以黑盒形式部署，缺乏针对真实场景的黑盒攻击方法。
method: 通过分层位置选择（基于强化学习框架）和替代选择（基于评分原则）两步策略，结合电子健康记录（EHR）的时序上下文信息初始化攻击策略。
result: 在多个真实数据集上，MedAttacker在黑盒设置下对三种先进医疗模型的攻击成功率均最高，部分场景下优于白盒攻击技术。
conclusion: MedAttacker验证了医疗预测模型在黑盒场景下的脆弱性，并为防御对抗攻击提供了实验依据。
search_text: MedAttacker: Exploring Black-Box Adversarial Attacks on Risk Prediction Models in Healthcare MedAttacker：探索医疗保健风险预测模型的黑盒对抗性攻击 Deep neural networks (DNNs) have been broadly adopted in health risk prediction to provide healthcare diagnoses and treatments. To evaluate their robustness, existing research conducts adversarial attacks in the white/gray-box setting where model parameters are accessible. However, a more realistic black-box adversarial attack is ignored even though most real-world models are trained with private data and released as black-box services on the cloud. To fill this gap, we propose the first black-box adversarial attack method against health risk prediction models named MedAttacker to investigate their vulnerability. MedAttacker addresses the challenges brought by EHR data via two steps: hierarchical position selection which selects the attacked positions in a reinforcement learning (RL) framework and substitute selection which identifies substitute with a score-based principle. Particularly, by considering the temporal context inside EHRs, it initializes its RL position selection policy by using the contribution score of each visit and the saliency score of each code, which can be well integrated with the deterministic substitute selection process decided by the score changes. In experiments, MedAttacker consistently achieves the highest average success rate and even outperforms a recent white-box EHR adversarial attack technique in certain cases when attacking three advanced health risk prediction models in the black-box setting across multiple real-world datasets. In addition, based on the experiment results we include a discussion on defending EHR adversarial attacks. 深度神经网络（DNN）已广泛应用于健康风险预测，以提供医疗保健诊断和治疗。为了评估其稳健性，现有研究在可访问模型参数的白/灰盒设置中进行对抗性攻击。然而，尽管大多数现实世界的模型都是使用私有数据进行训练并作为云上的黑盒服务发布的，但更现实的黑盒对抗攻击却被忽略了。为了填补这一空白，我们提出了第一个针对健康风险预测模型的黑盒对抗攻击方法，名为 MedAttacker，以调查其漏洞。 MedAttacker 通过两个步骤解决 EHR 数据带来的挑战：分层位置选择，在强化学习 (RL) 框架中选择受攻击的位置，以及替代选择，根据基于分数的原则识别替代。特别是，通过考虑 EHR 内部的时间上下文，它使用每次访问的贡献分数和每个代码的显着性分数来初始化其 RL 位置选择策略，这可以与分数变化决定的确定性替代选择过程很好地集成。在实验中，当在多个真实世界数据集的黑盒设置中攻击三个先进的健康风险预测模型时，MedAttacker 始终实现了最高的平均成功率，甚至在某些情况下优于最近的白盒 EHR 对抗攻击技术。此外，根据实验结果，我们还讨论了防御 EHR 对抗性攻击的问题。 本文提出一种针对医疗健康风险预测模型的黑盒对抗攻击方法MedAttacker，用于评估其在现实场景中的鲁棒性。 Muchao Ye,Junyu Luo,Guanjie Zheng,Cao Xiao,Ting Wang,Fenglong Ma cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Vittorio La Barbera,Fabio Pardo,Yuval Tassa,Monica Daley,Christopher Richards,Petar Kormushev,John Hutchinson
title: OstrichRL: A Musculoskeletal Ostrich Simulation to Study Bio-mechanical Locomotion
title_zh: OstrichRL：用于研究生物机械运动的肌肉骨骼鸵鸟模拟
abstract: Muscle-actuated control is a research topic that spans multiple domains, including biomechanics, neuroscience, reinforcement learning, robotics, and graphics. This type of control is particularly challenging as bodies are often overactuated and dynamics are delayed and non-linear. It is however a very well tested and tuned actuation mechanism that has undergone millions of years of evolution with interesting properties exploiting passive forces and efficient energy storage of muscle-tendon units. To facilitate research on muscle-actuated simulation, we release a 3D musculoskeletal simulation of an ostrich based on the MuJoCo physics engine. The ostrich is one of the fastest bipeds on earth and therefore makes an excellent model for studying muscle-actuated bipedal locomotion. The model is based on CT scans and dissections used to collect actual muscle data, such as insertion sites, lengths, and pennation angles. Along with this model, we also provide a set of reinforcement learning tasks, including reference motion tracking, running, and neck control, used to infer muscle actuation patterns. The reference motion data is based on motion capture clips of various behaviors that we preprocessed and adapted to our model. This paper describes how the model was built and iteratively improved using the tasks. We also evaluate the accuracy of the muscle actuation patterns by comparing them to experimentally collected electromyographic data from locomoting birds. The results demonstrate the need for rich reward signals or regularization techniques to constrain muscle excitations and produce realistic movements. Overall, we believe that this work can provide a useful bridge between fields of research interested in muscle actuation.

This type of control is particularly challenging as bodies are often overactuated and dynamics are delayed and non-linear. It is however a very well tested and tuned actuation mechanism that has undergone millions of years of evolution with interesting properties exploiting passive forces and efficient energy storage of muscle-tendon units. To facilitate research on muscle-actuated simulation, we release a 3D musculoskeletal simulation of an ostrich based on the MuJoCo physics engine. The ostrich is one of the fastest bipeds on earth and therefore makes an excellent model for studying muscle-actuated bipedal locomotion. The model is based on CT scans and dissections used to collect actual muscle data, such as insertion sites, lengths, and pennation angles. Along with this model, we also provide a set of reinforcement learning tasks, including reference motion tracking, running, and neck control, used to infer muscle actuation patterns. The reference motion data is based on motion capture clips of various behaviors that we preprocessed and adapted to our model. This paper describes how the model was built and iteratively improved using the tasks. We also evaluate the accuracy of the muscle actuation patterns by comparing them to experimentally collected electromyographic data from locomoting birds. The results demonstrate the need for rich reward signals or regularization techniques to constrain muscle excitations and produce realistic movements. Overall, we believe that this work can provide a useful bridge between fields of research interested in muscle actuation.
abstract_zh: 肌肉驱动控制是一个跨越多个领域的研究主题，包括生物力学、神经科学、强化学习、机器人和图形学。这种类型的控制特别具有挑战性，因为物体经常被过度驱动并且动态被延迟和非线性。然而，它是一种经过充分测试和调整的驱动机制，经历了数百万年的进化，具有利用被动力和肌肉肌腱单元的高效能量存储的有趣特性。为了促进肌肉驱动模拟的研究，我们发布了基于 MuJoCo 物理引擎的鸵鸟 3D 肌肉骨骼模拟。鸵鸟是地球上最快的两足动物之一，因此成为研究肌肉驱动的双足运动的绝佳模型。该模型基于 CT 扫描和解剖，用于收集实际肌肉数据，例如插入部位、长度和羽状角度。除了这个模型之外，我们还提供了一组强化学习任务，包括参考运动跟踪、跑步和颈部控制，用于推断肌肉驱动模式。参考运动数据基于我们预处理并适应我们模型的各种行为的运动捕捉剪辑。本文描述了如何使用任务构建和迭代改进模型。我们还通过将肌肉驱动模式与实验收集的运动鸟类肌电图数据进行比较来评估肌肉驱动模式的准确性。结果表明需要丰富的奖励信号或正则化技术来限制肌肉兴奋并产生逼真的运动。总的来说，我们相信这项工作可以在对肌肉驱动感兴趣的研究领域之间架起一座有用的桥梁。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OstrichRL，一个基于穆乔科物理引擎的3D鸵鸟肌肉骨骼仿真模型，用于研究肌肉驱动的双足运动机制。
AI.motivation: 肌肉驱动控制在生物力学等领域具有重要研究价值，但面临系统过度驱动、动力学延迟非线性等挑战。鸵鸟作为地球上最快的双足动物，其肌肉骨骼结构能为研究提供理想模型。
AI.method: 基于CT扫描和解剖数据构建肌肉骨骼模型，结合强化学习任务（运动跟踪、奔跑控制等）优化仿真，通过实验采集的肌电信号验证肌肉激活模式准确性。
AI.result: 实验表明需要丰富的奖励信号或正则化技术约束肌肉兴奋度才能生成真实运动，仿真结果与实际鸟类运动数据具有较高一致性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为生物力学、神经科学、机器人等跨领域研究提供了肌肉驱动仿真的有效工具和研究桥梁。

authors_text: Juan Jose Garau-Luis,Skylar Eiskowitz,Nils Pachler,Edward Crawley,Bruce Cameron
title: Towards Autonomous Satellite Communications: An AI-based Framework to Address System-level Challenges
title_zh: 迈向自主卫星通信：解决系统级挑战的基于人工智能的框架
comment: AAAI Workshop on AI to Accelerate Science and Engineering, at AAAI Conference 2022
comments: AAAI Workshop on AI to Accelerate Science and Engineering, at AAAI Conference 2022
abstract: The next generation of satellite constellations is designed to better address the future needs of our connected society: highly-variable data demand, mobile connectivity, and reaching more under-served regions. Artificial Intelligence (AI) and learning-based methods are expected to become key players in the industry, given the poor scalability and slow reaction time of current resource allocation mechanisms. While AI frameworks have been validated for isolated communication tasks or subproblems, there is still not a clear path to achieve fully-autonomous satellite systems. Part of this issue results from the focus on subproblems when designing models, instead of the necessary system-level perspective. In this paper we try to bridge this gap by characterizing the system-level needs that must be met to increase satellite autonomy, and introduce three AI-based components (Demand Estimator, Offline Planner, and Real Time Engine) that jointly address them. We first do a broad literature review on the different subproblems and identify the missing links to the system-level goals. In response to these gaps, we outline the three necessary components and highlight their interactions. We also discuss how current models can be incorporated into the framework and possible directions of future work.
summary: The next generation of satellite constellations is designed to better address the future needs of our connected society: highly-variable data demand, mobile connectivity, and reaching more under-served regions. Artificial Intelligence (AI) and learning-based methods are expected to become key players in the industry, given the poor scalability and slow reaction time of current resource allocation mechanisms. While AI frameworks have been validated for isolated communication tasks or subproblems, there is still not a clear path to achieve fully-autonomous satellite systems. Part of this issue results from the focus on subproblems when designing models, instead of the necessary system-level perspective. In this paper we try to bridge this gap by characterizing the system-level needs that must be met to increase satellite autonomy, and introduce three AI-based components (Demand Estimator, Offline Planner, and Real Time Engine) that jointly address them. We first do a broad literature review on the different subproblems and identify the missing links to the system-level goals. In response to these gaps, we outline the three necessary components and highlight their interactions. We also discuss how current models can be incorporated into the framework and possible directions of future work.
abstract_zh: 下一代卫星星座旨在更好地满足互联社会的未来需求：高度变化的数据需求、移动连接以及覆盖更多服务不足的地区。鉴于当前资源分配机制的可扩展性差和反应时间慢，人工智能（AI）和基于学习的方法预计将成为该行业的关键参与者。虽然人工智能框架已经针对孤立的通信任务或子问题进行了验证，但仍然没有实现完全自主卫星系统的明确路径。这个问题的部分原因是设计模型时关注子问题，而不是必要的系统级视角。在本文中，我们试图通过描述提高卫星自主性必须满足的系统级需求来弥补这一差距，并引入三个基于人工智能的组件（需求估计器、离线规划器和实时引擎）来共同解决这些问题。我们首先对不同的子问题进行广泛的文献综述，并找出系统级目标缺失的环节。针对这些差距，我们概述了三个必要的组成部分并强调了它们的相互作用。我们还讨论了如何将当前模型纳入框架以及未来工作的可能方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于人工智能的框架，旨在解决卫星通信系统级挑战，以实现更自主的卫星通信系统。
AI.motivation: 下一代卫星星座需应对高度可变的数据需求、移动连接性和覆盖不足地区的需求，而现有资源分配机制存在扩展性差和响应速度慢的问题，亟需系统级AI解决方案。
AI.method: 通过文献综述识别子问题与系统级目标之间的差距，设计三个AI组件（需求估计器、离线规划器和实时引擎），并阐述其协同工作机制及与现有模型的整合方式。
AI.result: 明确了系统级自主性需求，提出了三组件协同框架，指出现有模型的整合路径及未来研究方向，为构建自主卫星系统提供理论基础。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过系统级AI组件设计填补了子问题研究与整体自主性目标之间的空白，为未来卫星通信的智能化发展提供了可行路径。

search_text: Towards Autonomous Satellite Communications: An AI-based Framework to Address System-level Challenges 迈向自主卫星通信：解决系统级挑战的基于人工智能的框架 The next generation of satellite constellations is designed to better address the future needs of our connected society: highly-variable data demand, mobile connectivity, and reaching more under-served regions. Artificial Intelligence (AI) and learning-based methods are expected to become key players in the industry, given the poor scalability and slow reaction time of current resource allocation mechanisms. While AI frameworks have been validated for isolated communication tasks or subproblems, there is still not a clear path to achieve fully-autonomous satellite systems. Part of this issue results from the focus on subproblems when designing models, instead of the necessary system-level perspective. In this paper we try to bridge this gap by characterizing the system-level needs that must be met to increase satellite autonomy, and introduce three AI-based components (Demand Estimator, Offline Planner, and Real Time Engine) that jointly address them. We first do a broad literature review on the different subproblems and identify the missing links to the system-level goals. In response to these gaps, we outline the three necessary components and highlight their interactions. We also discuss how current models can be incorporated into the framework and possible directions of future work. 下一代卫星星座旨在更好地满足互联社会的未来需求：高度变化的数据需求、移动连接以及覆盖更多服务不足的地区。鉴于当前资源分配机制的可扩展性差和反应时间慢，人工智能（AI）和基于学习的方法预计将成为该行业的关键参与者。虽然人工智能框架已经针对孤立的通信任务或子问题进行了验证，但仍然没有实现完全自主卫星系统的明确路径。这个问题的部分原因是设计模型时关注子问题，而不是必要的系统级视角。在本文中，我们试图通过描述提高卫星自主性必须满足的系统级需求来弥补这一差距，并引入三个基于人工智能的组件（需求估计器、离线规划器和实时引擎）来共同解决这些问题。我们首先对不同的子问题进行广泛的文献综述，并找出系统级目标缺失的环节。针对这些差距，我们概述了三个必要的组成部分并强调了它们的相互作用。我们还讨论了如何将当前模型纳入框架以及未来工作的可能方向。 本文提出一个基于人工智能的框架，旨在解决卫星通信系统级挑战，以实现更自主的卫星通信系统。 Juan Jose Garau-Luis,Skylar Eiskowitz,Nils Pachler,Edward Crawley,Bruce Cameron cs.AI

title: U-shaped Transformer with Frequency-Band Aware Attention for Speech Enhancement
title_zh: U 形变压器，具有频段感知注意力，可增强语音
comment: ef:IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio, Speech, and Language Processing ( Volume: 31), 2023
comments: ef:IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio, Speech, and Language Processing ( Volume: 31), 2023
abstract: The state-of-the-art speech enhancement has limited performance in speech estimation accuracy. Recently, in deep learning, the Transformer shows the potential to exploit the long-range dependency in speech by self-attention. Therefore, it is introduced in speech enhancement to improve the speech estimation accuracy from a noise mixture. However, to address the computational cost issue in Transformer with self-attention, the axial attention is the option i.e., to split a 2D attention into two 1D attentions. Inspired by the axial attention, in the proposed method we calculate the attention map along both time- and frequency-axis to generate time and frequency sub-attention maps. Moreover, different from the axial attention, the proposed method provides two parallel multi-head attentions for time- and frequency-axis. Furthermore, it is proven in the literature that the lower frequency-band in speech, generally, contains more desired information than the higher frequency-band, in a noise mixture. Therefore, the frequency-band aware attention is proposed i.e., high frequency-band attention (HFA), and low frequency-band attention (LFA). The U-shaped Transformer is also first time introduced in the proposed method to further improve the speech estimation accuracy. The extensive evaluations over four public datasets, confirm the efficacy of the proposed method.
summary: The state-of-the-art speech enhancement has limited performance in speech estimation accuracy. Recently, in deep learning, the Transformer shows the potential to exploit the long-range dependency in speech by self-attention. Therefore, it is introduced in speech enhancement to improve the speech estimation accuracy from a noise mixture. However, to address the computational cost issue in Transformer with self-attention, the axial attention is the option i.e., to split a 2D attention into two 1D attentions. Inspired by the axial attention, in the proposed method we calculate the attention map along both time- and frequency-axis to generate time and frequency sub-attention maps. Moreover, different from the axial attention, the proposed method provides two parallel multi-head attentions for time- and frequency-axis. Furthermore, it is proven in the literature that the lower frequency-band in speech, generally, contains more desired information than the higher frequency-band, in a noise mixture. Therefore, the frequency-band aware attention is proposed i.e., high frequency-band attention (HFA), and low frequency-band attention (LFA). The U-shaped Transformer is also first time introduced in the proposed method to further improve the speech estimation accuracy. The extensive evaluations over four public datasets, confirm the efficacy of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 最先进的语音增强在语音估计精度方面的性能有限。最近，在深度学习中，Transformer 显示了通过自注意力来利用语音中的远程依赖性的潜力。因此，将其引入语音增强中以提高噪声混合中的语音估计精度。然而，为了解决 Transformer 中自注意力的计算成本问题，可以选择轴向注意力，即将 2D 注意力分成两个 1D 注意力。受轴向注意力的启发，在所提出的方法中，我们沿时间轴和频率轴计算注意力图，以生成时间和频率子注意力图。此外，与轴向注意力不同，该方法为时间轴和频率轴提供了两个并行的多头注意力。此外，文献证明，在噪声混合中，语音中的较低频带通常比较高频带包含更多所需信息。因此，提出了频段感知注意力，即高频段注意力（HFA）和低频段注意力（LFA）。该方法还首次引入了U形变压器，以进一步提高语音估计的准确性。对四个公共数据集的广泛评估证实了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合U型结构和频率带感知注意力机制的Transformer模型，用于提升语音增强效果。
AI.motivation: 现有语音增强方法在噪声混合场景下估计精度有限，传统Transformer因计算成本高难以直接应用，且未充分考虑语音频带信息的重要性差异。
AI.method: 通过将二维注意力拆分为时间轴和频率轴的子注意力映射，采用并行多头注意力机制；提出高低频带感知注意力（HFA/LFA）以区分不同频带信息价值，并首次引入U型Transformer结构增强特征提取能力。
AI.result: 在四个公开数据集上的实验验证了所提方法在语音估计精度上的有效性，优于现有主流方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过时间-频率双轴注意力分解与频带感知机制的结合，U型Transformer有效提升了语音增强性能，为复杂噪声环境下的语音处理提供了新思路。

title: Real-Time Detection of Crowded Buses via Mobile Phones
title_zh: 通过手机实时检测公交车拥挤情况
comment: ef:Poster Session, The Transportation Research Board (TRB) 98th Annual Meeting, 2019
comments: ef:Poster Session, The Transportation Research Board (TRB) 98th Annual Meeting, 2019
abstract: Automated passenger counting (APC) technology is central to many aspects of the public transit experience. APC information informs public transit planners about utilization in a public transit system and operations about dynamic fluctuations in demand. Perhaps most importantly, APC information provides one metric to the rider experience - standing during a long ride because of a crowded vehicle is an unpleasant experience. Several technologies have been successfully used for APC including light beam sensing and video image analysis. However, these technologies are expensive and must be installed in buses. In this paper, we analyze a new source of data using statistical models: rider smartphone accelerometers. Smartphones are ubiquitous in society and accelerometers have been shown to accurately model user states such as walking and sitting. We extend these models to use accelerometers to detect if the rider is standing or sitting on a bus. Standing riders are a signal that the bus is crowded. This paper provides evidence that user smartphones are a valid source of participatory sensing and thus a new source of automated passenger counting data.
summary: Automated passenger counting (APC) technology is central to many aspects of the public transit experience. APC information informs public transit planners about utilization in a public transit system and operations about dynamic fluctuations in demand. Perhaps most importantly, APC information provides one metric to the rider experience - standing during a long ride because of a crowded vehicle is an unpleasant experience. Several technologies have been successfully used for APC including light beam sensing and video image analysis. However, these technologies are expensive and must be installed in buses. In this paper, we analyze a new source of data using statistical models: rider smartphone accelerometers. Smartphones are ubiquitous in society and accelerometers have been shown to accurately model user states such as walking and sitting. We extend these models to use accelerometers to detect if the rider is standing or sitting on a bus. Standing riders are a signal that the bus is crowded. This paper provides evidence that user smartphones are a valid source of participatory sensing and thus a new source of automated passenger counting data.
abstract_zh: 自动乘客计数 (APC) 技术对于公共交通体验的许多方面都至关重要。 APC 信息向公共交通规划者通报公共交通系统的利用率以及需求动态波动的运营情况。也许最重要的是，APC 信息提供了一个衡量骑手体验的指标——在长途骑行中由于车辆拥挤而站立是一种不愉快的体验。多项技术已成功应用于 APC，包括光束传感和视频图像分析。然而，这些技术价格昂贵，并且必须安装在公交车上。在本文中，我们使用统计模型分析新的数据源：骑手智能手机加速度计。智能手机在社会中无处不在，加速计已被证明可以准确地模拟用户状态，例如行走和坐着。我们扩展这些模型，使用加速度计来检测乘客是站立还是坐在公交车上。站立的乘客表明公交车很拥挤。本文提供的证据表明，用户智能手机是参与式感知的有效来源，因此是自动乘客计数数据的新来源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用智能手机加速度计数据实时检测公交车拥挤状态，作为传统自动乘客计数技术的低成本替代方案。
AI.motivation: 现有公交乘客计数技术依赖昂贵的车载设备，而智能手机普及率高且内置加速度计可准确感知用户状态，具有成为新型参与式传感数据源的潜力。
AI.method: 通过统计模型分析智能手机加速度计数据，区分乘客站立与坐姿状态，将站立人数作为公交拥挤程度的指标。
AI.result: 实验验证了智能手机加速度数据能有效反映乘客状态，证明其作为参与式传感技术可提供可靠的自动乘客计数数据。
AI.conclusion: 智能手机加速度计可作为低成本、高覆盖的新型数据源，为公共交通拥挤度监测提供可行的参与式传感解决方案。

search_text: Real-Time Detection of Crowded Buses via Mobile Phones 通过手机实时检测公交车拥挤情况 Automated passenger counting (APC) technology is central to many aspects of the public transit experience. APC information informs public transit planners about utilization in a public transit system and operations about dynamic fluctuations in demand. Perhaps most importantly, APC information provides one metric to the rider experience - standing during a long ride because of a crowded vehicle is an unpleasant experience. Several technologies have been successfully used for APC including light beam sensing and video image analysis. However, these technologies are expensive and must be installed in buses. In this paper, we analyze a new source of data using statistical models: rider smartphone accelerometers. Smartphones are ubiquitous in society and accelerometers have been shown to accurately model user states such as walking and sitting. We extend these models to use accelerometers to detect if the rider is standing or sitting on a bus. Standing riders are a signal that the bus is crowded. This paper provides evidence that user smartphones are a valid source of participatory sensing and thus a new source of automated passenger counting data. 自动乘客计数 (APC) 技术对于公共交通体验的许多方面都至关重要。 APC 信息向公共交通规划者通报公共交通系统的利用率以及需求动态波动的运营情况。也许最重要的是，APC 信息提供了一个衡量骑手体验的指标——在长途骑行中由于车辆拥挤而站立是一种不愉快的体验。多项技术已成功应用于 APC，包括光束传感和视频图像分析。然而，这些技术价格昂贵，并且必须安装在公交车上。在本文中，我们使用统计模型分析新的数据源：骑手智能手机加速度计。智能手机在社会中无处不在，加速计已被证明可以准确地模拟用户状态，例如行走和坐着。我们扩展这些模型，使用加速度计来检测乘客是站立还是坐在公交车上。站立的乘客表明公交车很拥挤。本文提供的证据表明，用户智能手机是参与式感知的有效来源，因此是自动乘客计数数据的新来源。 本文提出利用智能手机加速度计数据实时检测公交车拥挤状态，作为传统自动乘客计数技术的低成本替代方案。 Alex Haig,Shirley Anugrah Hayati,Anthony Tomasic cs.HC

title: Behavior measures are predicted by how information is encoded in an individual's brain
title_zh: 行为测量是通过信息在个体大脑中的编码方式来预测的
abstract: Similar to how differences in the proficiency of the cardiovascular and musculoskeletal system predict an individual's athletic ability, differences in how the same brain region encodes information across individuals may explain their behavior. However, when studying how the brain encodes information, researchers choose different neuroimaging tasks (e.g., language or motor tasks), which can rely on processing different types of information and can modulate different brain regions. We hypothesize that individual differences in how information is encoded in the brain are task-specific and predict different behavior measures. We propose a framework using encoding-models to identify individual differences in brain encoding and test if these differences can predict behavior. We evaluate our framework using task functional magnetic resonance imaging data. Our results indicate that individual differences revealed by encoding-models are a powerful tool for predicting behavior, and that researchers should optimize their choice of task and encoding-model for their behavior of interest.
summary: Similar to how differences in the proficiency of the cardiovascular and musculoskeletal system predict an individual's athletic ability, differences in how the same brain region encodes information across individuals may explain their behavior. However, when studying how the brain encodes information, researchers choose different neuroimaging tasks (e.g., language or motor tasks), which can rely on processing different types of information and can modulate different brain regions. We hypothesize that individual differences in how information is encoded in the brain are task-specific and predict different behavior measures. We propose a framework using encoding-models to identify individual differences in brain encoding and test if these differences can predict behavior. We evaluate our framework using task functional magnetic resonance imaging data. Our results indicate that individual differences revealed by encoding-models are a powerful tool for predicting behavior, and that researchers should optimize their choice of task and encoding-model for their behavior of interest.
abstract_zh: 与心血管和肌肉骨骼系统熟练程度的差异如何预测个体的运动能力类似，个体之间同一大脑区域编码信息的差异可以解释他们的行为。然而，在研究大脑如何编码信息时，研究人员选择不同的神经影像任务（例如语言或运动任务），这些任务可以依赖于处理不同类型的信息并可以调节不同的大脑区域。我们假设大脑中信息编码方式的个体差异是特定于任务的，并预测不同的行为指标。我们提出了一个使用编码模型的框架来识别大脑编码的个体差异，并测试这些差异是否可以预测行为。我们使用任务功能磁共振成像数据评估我们的框架。我们的结果表明，编码模型揭示的个体差异是预测行为的强大工具，研究人员应该针对他们感兴趣的行为优化任务和编码模型的选择。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于编码模型的框架，用于识别个体大脑信息编码差异并预测其行为表现。
AI.motivation: 不同个体大脑区域对信息的编码差异可能解释行为差异，但现有研究因任务类型不同导致脑区激活差异，需明确任务特异性编码差异对行为预测的作用。
AI.method: 通过任务功能磁共振成像数据，构建编码模型分析个体大脑信息编码差异，并验证其对行为指标的预测能力。
AI.result: 编码模型揭示的个体编码差异能有效预测行为，且不同任务与编码模型的组合对特定行为预测效果存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 应根据目标行为优化任务设计与编码模型选择，以提升行为预测的准确性。

title: Paradigms of Computational Agency
title_zh: 计算代理范式
comment: Earlier version of this paper was published as a book chapter in the book titled Novel Approaches to Information Systems Design
comments: Earlier version of this paper was published as a book chapter in the book titled Novel Approaches to Information Systems Design
abstract: Agent-based models have emerged as a promising paradigm for addressing ever increasing complexity of information systems. In its initial days in the 1990s when object-oriented modeling was at its peak, an agent was treated as a special kind of "object" that had a persistent state and its own independent thread of execution. Since then, agent-based models have diversified enormously to even open new conceptual insights about the nature of systems in general. This paper presents a perspective on the disparate ways in which our understanding of agency, as well as computational models of agency have evolved. Advances in hardware like GPUs, that brought neural networks back to life, may also similarly infuse new life into agent-based models, as well as pave the way for advancements in research on Artificial General Intelligence (AGI).
summary: Agent-based models have emerged as a promising paradigm for addressing ever increasing complexity of information systems. In its initial days in the 1990s when object-oriented modeling was at its peak, an agent was treated as a special kind of "object" that had a persistent state and its own independent thread of execution. Since then, agent-based models have diversified enormously to even open new conceptual insights about the nature of systems in general. This paper presents a perspective on the disparate ways in which our understanding of agency, as well as computational models of agency have evolved. Advances in hardware like GPUs, that brought neural networks back to life, may also similarly infuse new life into agent-based models, as well as pave the way for advancements in research on Artificial General Intelligence (AGI).
abstract_zh: 基于代理的模型已成为解决日益复杂的信息系统的有前途的范例。在 20 世纪 90 年代初期，面向对象建模处于鼎盛时期，代理被视为一种特殊的“对象”，它具有持久状态和自己独立的执行线程。从那时起，基于主体的模型已经发生了极大的多样化，甚至开辟了关于系统本质的新概念见解。本文提出了我们对代理的理解以及代理计算模型演变的不同方式的视角。 GPU 等硬件的进步使神经网络重新焕发活力，也可能同样为基于代理的模型注入新的活力，并为通用人工智能 (AGI) 研究的进步铺平道路。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了计算代理范式的演变及其在复杂系统建模中的应用，分析了硬件进步对代理模型和通用人工智能研究的潜在影响。
AI.motivation: 随着信息系统复杂性增加，传统建模方法面临挑战，需通过回顾代理模型发展历史并探索新技术机遇来推动研究进展。
AI.method: 采用文献综述与历史分析方法，梳理代理概念的演化过程，并结合当前计算硬件发展进行前瞻性讨论。
AI.result: 明确了代理模型从对象导向到复杂系统概念的转变，指出GPU等硬件可能为模型复兴和AGI研究提供新路径。
AI.conclusion: 代理模型作为复杂系统分析工具具有持续价值，未来技术进步或将推动其与人工智能研究的深度融合。

authors_text: Herman van der Kooij,Simone S. Fricke,Ronald C. van 't Veld,Ander Vallinas Prieto,Arvid Q. L. Keemink,Alfred C. Schouten,Edwin H. F. van Asseldonk
title: Identification of Hip and Knee Joint Impedance During the Swing Phase of Walking
title_zh: 步行摆动阶段髋关节和膝关节阻抗的识别
abstract: Knowledge on joint impedance during walking in various conditions is relevant for clinical decision-making and the development of robotic gait trainers, leg prostheses, leg orthotics and wearable exoskeletons. Whereas ankle impedance during walking has been experimentally assessed, knee and hip joint impedance during walking have not been identified yet. Here we developed and evaluated a lower limb perturbator to identify hip, knee and ankle joint impedance during treadmill walking. The lower limb perturbator (LOPER) consists of an actuator connected to the thigh via rods. The LOPER allows to apply force perturbations to a free-hanging leg, while standing on the contralateral leg, with a bandwidth of up to 39 Hz. While walking in minimal impedance mode, the interaction forces between LOPER and the thigh were low (<5 N) and the effect on the walking pattern was smaller than the within-subject variability during normal walking. Using a non-linear multibody dynamical model of swing leg dynamics, the hip, knee and ankle joint impedance were estimated at three time points during the swing phase for nine subjects walking at a speed of 0.5 m/s. The identified model was well able to predict the experimental responses for the hip and knee, since the mean variance accounted (VAF) for was 99% and 96%, respectively. The ankle lacked a consistent response and the mean VAF of the model fit was only 77%, and therefore the estimated ankle impedance was not reliable. The averaged across-subjects stiffness varied between the three time points within 34-66 and 0-3.5 Nm/rad for the hip and knee joint respectively. The damping varied between 1.9-4.6 and 0.02-0.14 Nms/rad for hip and knee respectively. The developed LOPER has a negligible effect on the unperturbed walking pattern and allows to identify hip and knee impedance during the swing phase.

The damping varied between 1.9-4.6 and 0.02-0.14 Nms/rad for hip and knee respectively. The developed LOPER has a negligible effect on the unperturbed walking pattern and allows to identify hip and knee impedance during the swing phase.
abstract_zh: 有关各种条件下行走时关节阻抗的知识与临床决策以及机器人步态训练器、腿部假肢、腿部矫形器和可穿戴外骨骼的开发相关。虽然步行期间的踝关节阻抗已通过实验评估，但步行期间的膝关节和髋关节阻抗尚未确定。在这里，我们开发并评估了下肢扰动器，以识别跑步机行走期间的髋关节、膝关节和踝关节阻抗。下肢扰动器 (LOPER) 由通过杆连接到大腿的执行器组成。 LOPER 允许在站在对侧腿上时对自由悬挂的腿施加力扰动，带宽高达 39 Hz。当以最小阻抗模式行走时，LOPER 和大腿之间的相互作用力较低（<5 N），并且对行走模式的影响小于正常行走期间受试者内的变异性。使用摆动腿动力学的非线性多体动力学模型，对 9 名以 0.5 m/s 的速度行走的受试者在摆动阶段的三个时间点的髋关节、膝关节和踝关节阻抗进行了估计。所确定的模型能够很好地预测髋部和膝部的实验反应，因为平均方差（VAF）分别为 99% 和 96%。踝关节缺乏一致的响应，模型拟合的平均 VAF 仅 77%，因此估计的踝关节阻抗不可靠。三个时间点之间髋关节和膝关节的平均跨受试者刚度分别在 34-66 和 0-3.5 Nm/rad 范围内变化。髋部和膝部的阻尼分别在 1.9-4.6 和 0.02-0.14 Nms/rad 之间变化。开发的 LOPER 对不受干扰的行走模式的影响可以忽略不计，并且可以识别摆动阶段的臀部和膝盖阻抗。

AI.tldr: 开发并评估一种下肢扰动装置（LOPER），用于识别行走摆动阶段髋关节和膝关节的阻抗特性。
AI.motivation: 了解行走中关节阻抗对临床决策和康复设备开发至关重要，但此前膝关节和髋关节阻抗尚未被系统研究。
AI.method: 设计LOPER装置通过杆件连接大腿施加力扰动，结合非线性多体动力学模型，分析九名受试者0.5m/s速度行走时的摆动阶段关节阻抗。
AI.result: 模型对髋关节（VAF 99%）和膝关节（VAF 96%）预测准确，踝关节仅77%。髋关节刚度34-66 Nm/rad，阻尼1.9-4.6 Nms/rad；膝关节刚度0-3.5 Nm/rad，阻尼0.02-0.14 Nms/rad。
AI.conclusion: LOPER能有效识别髋膝关节阻抗，但踝关节结果不可靠，为康复设备设计提供了关键参数支持。

search_text: Identification of Hip and Knee Joint Impedance During the Swing Phase of Walking 步行摆动阶段髋关节和膝关节阻抗的识别 Knowledge on joint impedance during walking in various conditions is relevant for clinical decision-making and the development of robotic gait trainers, leg prostheses, leg orthotics and wearable exoskeletons. Whereas ankle impedance during walking has been experimentally assessed, knee and hip joint impedance during walking have not been identified yet. Here we developed and evaluated a lower limb perturbator to identify hip, knee and ankle joint impedance during treadmill walking. The lower limb perturbator (LOPER) consists of an actuator connected to the thigh via rods. The LOPER allows to apply force perturbations to a free-hanging leg, while standing on the contralateral leg, with a bandwidth of up to 39 Hz. While walking in minimal impedance mode, the interaction forces between LOPER and the thigh were low (<5 N) and the effect on the walking pattern was smaller than the within-subject variability during normal walking. Using a non-linear multibody dynamical model of swing leg dynamics, the hip, knee and ankle joint impedance were estimated at three time points during the swing phase for nine subjects walking at a speed of 0.5 m/s. The identified model was well able to predict the experimental responses for the hip and knee, since the mean variance accounted (VAF) for was 99% and 96%, respectively. The ankle lacked a consistent response and the mean VAF of the model fit was only 77%, and therefore the estimated ankle impedance was not reliable. The averaged across-subjects stiffness varied between the three time points within 34-66 and 0-3.5 Nm/rad for the hip and knee joint respectively. The damping varied between 1.9-4.6 and 0.02-0.14 Nms/rad for hip and knee respectively. The developed LOPER has a negligible effect on the unperturbed walking pattern and allows to identify hip and knee impedance during the swing phase. 有关各种条件下行走时关节阻抗的知识与临床决策以及机器人步态训练器、腿部假肢、腿部矫形器和可穿戴外骨骼的开发相关。虽然步行期间的踝关节阻抗已通过实验评估，但步行期间的膝关节和髋关节阻抗尚未确定。在这里，我们开发并评估了下肢扰动器，以识别跑步机行走期间的髋关节、膝关节和踝关节阻抗。下肢扰动器 (LOPER) 由通过杆连接到大腿的执行器组成。 LOPER 允许在站在对侧腿上时对自由悬挂的腿施加力扰动，带宽高达 39 Hz。当以最小阻抗模式行走时，LOPER 和大腿之间的相互作用力较低（<5 N），并且对行走模式的影响小于正常行走期间受试者内的变异性。使用摆动腿动力学的非线性多体动力学模型，对 9 名以 0.5 m/s 的速度行走的受试者在摆动阶段的三个时间点的髋关节、膝关节和踝关节阻抗进行了估计。所确定的模型能够很好地预测髋部和膝部的实验反应，因为平均方差（VAF）分别为 99% 和 96%。踝关节缺乏一致的响应，模型拟合的平均 VAF 仅 77%，因此估计的踝关节阻抗不可靠。三个时间点之间髋关节和膝关节的平均跨受试者刚度分别在 34-66 和 0-3.5 Nm/rad 范围内变化。髋部和膝部的阻尼分别在 1.9-4.6 和 0.02-0.14 Nms/rad 之间变化。开发的 LOPER 对不受干扰的行走模式的影响可以忽略不计，并且可以识别摆动阶段的臀部和膝盖阻抗。 开发并评估一种下肢扰动装置（LOPER），用于识别行走摆动阶段髋关节和膝关节的阻抗特性。 Herman van der Kooij,Simone S. title: D*+: A Risk Aware Platform Agnostic Heterogeneous Path Planner
title_zh: D*+：风险感知平台无关的异构路径规划器
comment: 35 pages, 24 figures, submitted to Expert System With Application
comments: 35 pages, 24 figures, submitted to Expert System With Application
abstract: This article establishes the novel D$^*_+$, a risk-aware and platform-agnostic heterogeneous global path planner for robotic navigation in complex environments. The proposed planner addresses a fundamental bottleneck of occupancy-based path planners related to their dependency on accurate and dense maps. More specifically, their performance is highly affected by poorly reconstructed or sparse areas (e.g. holes in the walls or ceilings) leading to faulty generated paths outside the physical boundaries of the 3-dimensional space. As it will be presented, D$^*_+$ addresses this challenge with three novel contributions, integrated into one solution, namely: a) the proximity risk, b) the modeling of the unknown space, and c) the map updates. By adding a risk layer to spaces that are closer to the occupied ones, some holes are filled, and thus the problematic short-cutting through them to the final goal is prevented. The novel established D$^*_+$ also provides safety marginals to the walls and other obstacles, a property that results in paths that do not cut the corners that could potentially disrupt the platform operation. D$^*_+$ has also the capability to model the unknown space as risk-free areas that should keep the paths inside, e.g in a tunnel environment, and thus heavily reducing the risk of larger shortcuts through openings in the walls. D$^*_+$ is also introducing a dynamic map handling capability that continuously updates with the latest information acquired during the map building process, allowing the planner to use constant map growth and resolve cases of planning over outdated sparser map reconstructions...
summary: This article establishes the novel D$^*_+$, a risk-aware and platform-agnostic heterogeneous global path planner for robotic navigation in complex environments. The proposed planner addresses a fundamental bottleneck of occupancy-based path planners related to their dependency on accurate and dense maps. More specifically, their performance is highly affected by poorly reconstructed or sparse areas (e.g. holes in the walls or ceilings) leading to faulty generated paths outside the physical boundaries of the 3-dimensional space. As it will be presented, D$^*_+$ addresses this challenge with three novel contributions, integrated into one solution, namely: a) the proximity risk, b) the modeling of the unknown space, and c) the map updates. By adding a risk layer to spaces that are closer to the occupied ones, some holes are filled, and thus the problematic short-cutting through them to the final goal is prevented. The novel established D$^*_+$ also provides safety marginals to the walls and other obstacles, a property that results in paths that do not cut the corners that could potentially disrupt the platform operation. D$^*_+$ has also the capability to model the unknown space as risk-free areas that should keep the paths inside, e.g in a tunnel environment, and thus heavily reducing the risk of larger shortcuts through openings in the walls. D$^*_+$ is also introducing a dynamic map handling capability that continuously updates with the latest information acquired during the map building process, allowing the planner to use constant map growth and resolve cases of planning over outdated sparser map reconstructions...
abstract_zh: 本文建立了新颖的 D$^*_+$，一种具有风险意识且与平台无关的异构全局路径规划器，用于复杂环境中的机器人导航。所提出的规划器解决了基于占用的路径规划器的一个基本瓶颈，该瓶颈与其对准确和密集地图的依赖有关。更具体地说，它们的性能受到重建不良或稀疏区域（例如墙壁或天花板上的孔）的严重影响，导致在 3 维空间的物理边界之外生成错误的路径。正如将要介绍的那样，D$^*_+$ 通过三个新颖的贡献解决了这一挑战，并将其集成到一个解决方案中，即：a) 邻近风险，b) 未知空间建模，以及 c) 地图更新。通过在靠近占用空间的空间中添加风险层，可以填补一些漏洞，从而防止通过它们到达最终目标的有问题的捷径。新颖的 D$^*_+$ 还为墙壁和其他障碍物提供了安全边际，这种特性导致路径不会走捷径，从而可能破坏平台的运行。 D$^*_+$ 还能够将未知空间建模为无风险区域，该区域应将路径保留在内部，例如在隧道环境中，从而大大降低通过墙壁开口形成较大捷径的风险。 D$^*_+$ 还引入了动态地图处理功能，该功能可以使用地图构建过程中获取的最新信息不断更新，从而允许规划者使用持续的地图增长并解决过时的稀疏地图重建规划的情况...

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为D*+的新型风险感知、平台无关的异构全局路径规划器，旨在解决传统基于占用地图的路径规划器在复杂环境中依赖高精度密集地图的瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 传统路径规划器因依赖精确地图，在稀疏或重建不良区域（如墙体/天花板孔洞）易生成超出物理边界的错误路径，存在安全隐患。
AI.method: 通过三项创新整合解决方案：1) 接近风险层填补地图漏洞；2) 对未知空间建模为安全区域；3) 动态地图更新机制，结合安全边界约束与实时环境信息。
AI.result: D*+在隧道等复杂场景中有效避免危险捷径，通过动态地图持续优化路径规划，提升异构平台在未知环境中的导航安全性与适应性。
AI.conclusion: D*+通过风险感知机制与动态地图更新，解决了传统规划器对高精度地图的依赖问题，为复杂环境下的机器人导航提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

search_text: D*+: A Risk Aware Platform Agnostic Heterogeneous Path Planner D*+：风险感知平台无关的异构路径规划器 This article establishes the novel D$^*_+$, a risk-aware and platform-agnostic heterogeneous global path planner for robotic navigation in complex environments. The proposed planner addresses a fundamental bottleneck of occupancy-based path planners related to their dependency on accurate and dense maps. More specifically, their performance is highly affected by poorly reconstructed or sparse areas (e.g. holes in the walls or ceilings) leading to faulty generated paths outside the physical boundaries of the 3-dimensional space. As it will be presented, D$^*_+$ addresses this challenge with three novel contributions, integrated into one solution, namely: a) the proximity risk, b) the modeling of the unknown space, and c) the map updates. By adding a risk layer to spaces that are closer to the occupied ones, some holes are filled, and thus the problematic short-cutting through them to the final goal is prevented. The novel established D$^*_+$ also provides safety marginals to the walls and other obstacles, a property that results in paths that do not cut the corners that could potentially disrupt the platform operation. D$^*_+$ has also the capability to model the unknown space as risk-free areas that should keep the paths inside, e.g in a tunnel environment, and thus heavily reducing the risk of larger shortcuts through openings in the walls. D$^*_+$ is also introducing a dynamic map handling capability that continuously updates with the latest information acquired during the map building process, allowing the planner to use constant map growth and resolve cases of planning over outdated sparser map reconstructions... 本文建立了新颖的 D$^*_+$，一种具有风险意识且与平台无关的异构全局路径规划器，用于复杂环境中的机器人导航。所提出的规划器解决了基于占用的路径规划器的一个基本瓶颈，该瓶颈与其对准确和密集地图的依赖有关。更具体地说，它们的性能受到重建不良或稀疏区域（例如墙壁或天花板上的孔）的严重影响，导致在 3 维空间的物理边界之外生成错误的路径。正如将要介绍的那样，D$^*_+$ 通过三个新颖的贡献解决了这一挑战，并将其集成到一个解决方案中，即：a) 邻近风险，b) 未知空间建模，以及 c) 地图更新。通过在靠近占用空间的空间中添加风险层，可以填补一些漏洞，从而防止通过它们到达最终目标的有问题的捷径。新颖的 D$^*_+$ 还为墙壁和其他障碍物提供了安全边际，这种特性导致路径不会走捷径，从而可能破坏平台的运行。 D$^*_+$ 还能够将未知空间建模为无风险区域，该区域应将路径保留在内部，例如在隧道环境中，从而大大降低通过墙壁开口形成较大捷径的风险。 D$^*_+$ 还引入了动态地图处理功能，该功能可以使用地图构建过程中获取的最新信息不断更新，从而允许规划者使用持续的地图增长并解决过时的稀疏地图重建规划的情况... 本文提出了一种名为D*+的新型风险感知、平台无关的异构全局路径规划器，旨在解决传统基于占用地图的路径规划器在复杂环境中依赖高精度密集地图的瓶颈问题。 Samuel Karlsson,Anton Koval,Christoforos Kanellakis,George Nikolakopoulos cs.RO

title: Global Attention Mechanism: Retain Information to Enhance Channel-Spatial Interactions
title_zh: 全局注意力机制：保留信息以增强通道空间交互
abstract: A variety of attention mechanisms have been studied to improve the performance of various computer vision tasks. However, the prior methods overlooked the significance of retaining the information on both channel and spatial aspects to enhance the cross-dimension interactions. Therefore, we propose a global attention mechanism that boosts the performance of deep neural networks by reducing information reduction and magnifying the global interactive representations. We introduce 3D-permutation with multilayer-perceptron for channel attention alongside a convolutional spatial attention submodule. The evaluation of the proposed mechanism for the image classification task on CIFAR-100 and ImageNet-1K indicates that our method stably outperforms several recent attention mechanisms with both ResNet and lightweight MobileNet.
summary: A variety of attention mechanisms have been studied to improve the performance of various computer vision tasks. However, the prior methods overlooked the significance of retaining the information on both channel and spatial aspects to enhance the cross-dimension interactions. Therefore, we propose a global attention mechanism that boosts the performance of deep neural networks by reducing information reduction and magnifying the global interactive representations. We introduce 3D-permutation with multilayer-perceptron for channel attention alongside a convolutional spatial attention submodule. The evaluation of the proposed mechanism for the image classification task on CIFAR-100 and ImageNet-1K indicates that our method stably outperforms several recent attention mechanisms with both ResNet and lightweight MobileNet.
abstract_zh: 人们已经研究了各种注意力机制来提高各种计算机视觉任务的性能。然而，现有方法忽视了保留通道和空间方面的信息以增强跨维度交互的重要性。因此，我们提出了一种全局注意力机制，通过减少信息减少和放大全局交互表示来提高深度神经网络的性能。我们引入了具有多层感知器的 3D 排列，用于通道注意以及卷积空间注意子模块。在 CIFAR-100 和 ImageNet-1K 上对所提出的图像分类任务机制的评估表明，我们的方法稳定优于最近使用 ResNet 和轻量级 MobileNet 的几种注意力机制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种全局注意力机制，通过保留通道和空间信息增强跨维度交互，提升深度神经网络在图像分类任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有注意力机制未充分重视保留通道与空间信息，导致跨维度交互不足，限制了模型性能提升。
AI.method: 设计包含3D排列与多层感知机的通道注意力模块，结合卷积空间注意力子模块，形成全局注意力机制。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100和ImageNet-1K数据集上，该方法在ResNet和MobileNet架构下均稳定优于近期多种注意力机制。
AI.conclusion: 全局注意力机制通过有效保留信息并增强通道-空间交互，在多个基准测试中验证了其优越性与广泛适用性。
