title: Universal computation using localized limit-cycle attractors in neural networks
title_zh: 在神经网络中使用局部极限环吸引子的通用计算
abstract: Neural networks are dynamical systems that compute with their dynamics. One example is the Hopfield model, forming an associative memory which stores patterns as global attractors of the network dynamics. From studies of dynamical networks it is well known that localized attractors also exist. Yet, they have not been used in computing paradigms. Here we show that interacting localized attractors in threshold networks can result in universal computation. We develop a rewiring algorithm that builds universal Boolean gates in a biologically inspired two-dimensional threshold network with randomly placed and connected nodes using collision-based computing. We aim at demonstrating the computational capabilities and the ability to control local limit cycle attractors in such networks by creating simple Boolean gates by means of these local activations. The gates use glider guns, i.e., localized activity that periodically generates "gliders" of activity that propagate through space. Several such gliders are made to collide, and the result of their interaction is used as the output of a Boolean gate. We show that these gates can be used to build a universal computer.
summary: Neural networks are dynamical systems that compute with their dynamics. One example is the Hopfield model, forming an associative memory which stores patterns as global attractors of the network dynamics. From studies of dynamical networks it is well known that localized attractors also exist. Yet, they have not been used in computing paradigms. Here we show that interacting localized attractors in threshold networks can result in universal computation. We develop a rewiring algorithm that builds universal Boolean gates in a biologically inspired two-dimensional threshold network with randomly placed and connected nodes using collision-based computing. We aim at demonstrating the computational capabilities and the ability to control local limit cycle attractors in such networks by creating simple Boolean gates by means of these local activations. The gates use glider guns, i.e., localized activity that periodically generates "gliders" of activity that propagate through space. Several such gliders are made to collide, and the result of their interaction is used as the output of a Boolean gate. We show that these gates can be used to build a universal computer.
abstract_zh: 神经网络是利用其动态进行计算的动态系统。一个例子是 Hopfield 模型，它形成一种联想记忆，将模式存储为网络动态的全局吸引子。根据动态网络的研究，众所周知，局域吸引子也存在。然而，它们尚未用于计算范例。在这里，我们证明阈值网络中局部吸引子的相互作用可以导致通用计算。我们开发了一种重新布线算法，该算法在受生物学启发的二维阈值网络中构建通用布尔门，并使用基于碰撞的计算随机放置和连接节点。我们的目标是通过这些局部激活创建简单的布尔门来展示计算能力和控制此类网络中局部极限环吸引子的能力。大门使用滑翔机枪，即周期性产生通过空间传播的活动“滑翔机”的局部活动。使几个这样的滑翔机发生碰撞，它们相互作用的结果用作布尔门的输出。我们证明这些门可以用来构建通用计算机。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用神经网络中的局部极限环吸引子实现通用计算，通过构建布尔逻辑门展示其计算能力。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络计算依赖全局吸引子（如Hopfield模型），但局部吸引子的计算潜力尚未被开发，需探索其在通用计算中的应用。
AI.method: 设计重连算法，在二维阈值网络中创建生物启发的局部激活结构，利用滑行器枪生成的活动波碰撞实现布尔逻辑门。
AI.result: 成功构建通用布尔逻辑门，并证明其可组合为通用计算机，验证了局部吸引子动态的计算完备性。
AI.conclusion: 局部极限环吸引子能实现通用计算，为神经网络计算范式提供了新途径，展示了动态碰撞计算的潜力。

title: Shennong: a Python toolbox for audio speech features extraction
title_zh: Shennong：用于音频语音特征提取的 Python 工具箱
abstract: We introduce Shennong, a Python toolbox and command-line utility for speech features extraction. It implements a wide range of well-established state of art algorithms including spectro-temporal filters such as Mel-Frequency Cepstral Filterbanks or Predictive Linear Filters, pre-trained neural networks, pitch estimators as well as speaker normalization methods and post-processing algorithms. Shennong is an open source, easy-to-use, reliable and extensible framework. The use of Python makes the integration to others speech modeling and machine learning tools easy. It aims to replace or complement several heterogeneous software, such as Kaldi or Praat. After describing the Shennong software architecture, its core components and implemented algorithms, this paper illustrates its use on three applications: a comparison of speech features performances on a phones discrimination task, an analysis of a Vocal Tract Length Normalization model as a function of the speech duration used for training and a comparison of pitch estimation algorithms under various noise conditions.
summary: We introduce Shennong, a Python toolbox and command-line utility for speech features extraction. It implements a wide range of well-established state of art algorithms including spectro-temporal filters such as Mel-Frequency Cepstral Filterbanks or Predictive Linear Filters, pre-trained neural networks, pitch estimators as well as speaker normalization methods and post-processing algorithms. Shennong is an open source, easy-to-use, reliable and extensible framework. The use of Python makes the integration to others speech modeling and machine learning tools easy. It aims to replace or complement several heterogeneous software, such as Kaldi or Praat. After describing the Shennong software architecture, its core components and implemented algorithms, this paper illustrates its use on three applications: a comparison of speech features performances on a phones discrimination task, an analysis of a Vocal Tract Length Normalization model as a function of the speech duration used for training and a comparison of pitch estimation algorithms under various noise conditions.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍 Shennong，一个用于语音特征提取的 Python 工具箱和命令行实用程序。它实现了各种成熟的最先进算法，包括谱时滤波器（例如梅尔倒谱滤​​波器组或预测线性滤波器）、预训练神经网络、音调估计器以及说话者归一化方法和后处理算法。 Shennong是一个开源、易用、可靠、可扩展的框架。 Python 的使用使得与其他语音建模和机器学习工具的集成变得容易。它旨在替代或补充多种异构软件，例如 Kaldi 或 Praat。在描述了 Shennong 软件架构、其核心组件和实现的算法之后，本文阐述了其在三个应用中的使用：音素辨别任务中语音特征性能的比较、声带长度归一化模型作为用于训练的语音持续时间的函数的分析以及各种噪声条件下的基音估计算法的比较。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Shennong，一个用于语音特征提取的Python工具箱，旨在替代或补充现有软件如Kaldi或Praat。
AI.motivation: 现有语音处理工具存在异构性，需一个开源、易用、可扩展的框架以简化集成与开发。
AI.method: 基于Python开发，实现多种语音特征提取算法（如Mel滤波器组、预训练神经网络等），并提供命令行工具和模块化架构。
AI.result: 通过三个应用案例验证：语音特征在音素区分任务中的性能比较、VTLN模型训练时长分析、不同噪声条件下的基频估计对比。
AI.conclusion: Shennong证明了其作为可靠工具的有效性，能够灵活支持多种语音处理任务并提升研究效率。

ai_content.motivation: 现有语音处理工具存在异构性，需一个开源、易用、可扩展的框架以简化集成与开发。
ai_content.method: 基于Python开发，实现多种语音特征提取算法（如Mel滤波器组、预训练神经网络等），并提供命令行工具和模块化架构。
ai_content.result: 通过三个应用案例验证：语音特征在音素区分任务中的性能比较、VTLN模型训练时长分析、不同噪声条件下的基频估计对比。
ai_content.conclusion: Shennong证明了其作为可靠工具的有效性，能够灵活支持多种语音处理任务并提升研究效率。

search_text: Shennong: a Python toolbox for audio speech features extraction Shennong：用于音频语音特征提取的 Python 工具箱 We introduce Shennong, a Python toolbox and command-line utility for speech features extraction. It implements a wide range of well-established state of art algorithms including spectro-temporal filters such as Mel-Frequency Cepstral Filterbanks or Predictive Linear Filters, pre-trained neural networks, pitch estimators as well as speaker normalization methods and post-processing algorithms. Shennong is an open source, easy-to-use, reliable and extensible framework. The use of Python makes the integration to others speech modeling and machine learning tools easy. It aims to replace or complement several heterogeneous software, such as Kaldi or Praat. After describing the Shennong software architecture, its core components and implemented algorithms, this paper illustrates its use on three applications: a comparison of speech features performances on a phones discrimination task, an analysis of a Vocal Tract Length Normalization model as a function of the speech duration used for training and a comparison of pitch estimation algorithms under various noise conditions. 我们介绍 Shennong，一个用于语音特征提取的 Python 工具箱和命令行实用程序。它实现了各种成熟的最先进算法，包括谱时滤波器（例如梅尔倒谱滤​​波器组或预测线性滤波器）、预训练神经网络、音调估计器以及说话者归一化方法和后处理算法。 Shennong是一个开源、易用、可靠、可扩展的框架。 Python 的使用使得与其他语音建模和机器学习工具的集成变得容易。它旨在替代或补充多种异构软件，例如 Kaldi 或 Praat。在描述了 Shennong 软件架构、其核心组件和实现的算法之后，本文阐述了其在三个应用中的使用：音素辨别任务中语音特征性能的比较、声带长度归一化模型作为用于训练的语音持续时间的函数的分析以及各种噪声条件下的基音估计算法的比较。 本文介绍了Shennong，一个用于语音特征提取的Python工具箱，旨在替代或补充现有软件如Kaldi或Praat。 Mathieu Bernard,Maxime Poli,Julien Karadayi,Emmanuel Dupoux cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Rob B. N. Scharff,Dirk-Jan Boonstra,Laurence Willemet,Xi Lin,Michaël Wiertlewski
title: Rapid manufacturing of color-based hemispherical soft tactile fingertips
title_zh: 快速制造基于颜色的半球形软触感指尖
abstract: Tactile sensing can provide access to information about the contact (i.e. slippage, surface feature, friction), which is out of reach of vision but crucial for manipulation. To access this information, a dense measurement of the deformation of soft fingertips is necessary. Recently, tactile sensors that rely on a camera looking at a deformable membrane have demonstrated that a dense measurement of the contact is possible. However, their manufacturing can be time-consuming and labor-intensive. Here, we show a new design method that uses multi-color additive manufacturing and silicone casting to efficiently manufacture soft marker-based tactile sensors that are able to capture with high-resolution the three-dimensional deformation field at the interface. Each marker is composed of two superimposed color filters. The subtractive color mixing encodes the normal deformation of the membrane, and the lateral deformation is found by centroid detection. With this manufacturing method, we can reach a density of 400 markers on a 21 mm radius hemisphere, allowing for regular and dense measurement of the deformation. We calibrated and validated the approach by finding the curvature of objects with a threefold increase in accuracy as compared to previous implementations. The results demonstrate a simple yet effective approach to manufacturing artificial fingertips for capturing a rich image of the tactile interaction at the location of contact.
summary: Tactile sensing can provide access to information about the contact (i.e. slippage, surface feature, friction), which is out of reach of vision but crucial for manipulation. To access this information, a dense measurement of the deformation of soft fingertips is necessary. Recently, tactile sensors that rely on a camera looking at a deformable membrane have demonstrated that a dense measurement of the contact is possible. However, their manufacturing can be time-consuming and labor-intensive. Here, we show a new design method that uses multi-color additive manufacturing and silicone casting to efficiently manufacture soft marker-based tactile sensors that are able to capture with high-resolution the three-dimensional deformation field at the interface. Each marker is composed of two superimposed color filters. The subtractive color mixing encodes the normal deformation of the membrane, and the lateral deformation is found by centroid detection. With this manufacturing method, we can reach a density of 400 markers on a 21 mm radius hemisphere, allowing for regular and dense measurement of the deformation. We calibrated and validated the approach by finding the curvature of objects with a threefold increase in accuracy as compared to previous implementations. The results demonstrate a simple yet effective approach to manufacturing artificial fingertips for capturing a rich image of the tactile interaction at the location of contact.
abstract_zh: 触觉传感可以提供有关接触的信息（即滑动、表面特征、摩擦），这些信息在视觉范围之外，但对于操作至关重要。为了获取这些信息，需要对软指尖的变形进行密集测量。最近，依赖于观察可变形膜的相机的触觉传感器已经证明可以对接触进行密集测量。然而，它们的制造可能非常耗时且劳动密集型。在这里，我们展示了一种新的设计方法，该方法使用多色增材制造和硅胶铸造来高效制造基于软标记的触觉传感器，这些传感器能够以高分辨率捕获界面处的三维变形场。每个标记由两个叠加的滤色器组成。减色混合对膜的法向变形进行编码，并通过质心检测发现横向变形。通过这种制造方法，我们可以在半径为 21 毫米的半球上达到 400 个标记的密度，从而可以定期、密集地测量变形。我们通过查找物体的曲率来校准和验证该方法，与之前的实现相比，精度提高了三倍。结果展示了一种简单而有效的制造人造指尖的方法，用于捕获接触位置触觉交互的丰富图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多色增材制造和硅胶铸造的快速制造方法，用于制作能够高精度捕捉三维变形场的软体触觉指尖传感器。
AI.motivation: 现有基于相机观测变形膜的触觉传感器制造过程耗时且劳动密集，亟需一种高效且能实现高密度变形测量的制造方法。
AI.method: 通过多色3D打印与硅胶铸造结合，设计双层叠加色滤光片标记，利用减法混色编码法向变形，结合质心检测获取切向变形，实现21mm半径球面400个标记的高密度分布。
AI.result: 相比现有方法，该传感器在物体曲率测量精度上提升三倍，验证了其高分辨率触觉交互信息捕捉能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为制造具有丰富触觉交互图像的人工指尖提供了简单有效的解决方案，显著提升了触觉传感器的制造效率与测量精度。

title: An Embarrassingly Pragmatic Introduction to Vision-based Autonomous Robots
title_zh: 基于视觉的自主机器人的实用介绍
comment: CS Thesis. Lecture Notes in Computer Science
comments: CS Thesis. Lecture Notes in Computer Science
abstract: Autonomous robots are currently one of the most popular Artificial Intelligence problems, having experienced significant advances in the last decade, from Self-driving cars and humanoids to delivery robots and drones. Part of the problem is to get a robot to emulate the perception of human beings, our sense of sight, replacing the eyes with cameras and the brain with mathematical models such as Neural Networks. Developing an AI able to drive a car without human intervention and a small robot to deliver packages in the city may seem like different problems, nevertheless from the point of view of perception and vision, both problems have several similarities. The main solutions we currently find focus on the environment perception through visual information using Computer Vision techniques, Machine Learning, and various algorithms to make the robot understand the environment or scene, move, adapt its trajectory and perform its tasks (maintenance, exploration, etc.) without the need for human intervention. In this work, we develop a small-scale autonomous vehicle from scratch, capable of understanding the scene using only visual information, navigating through industrial environments, detecting people and obstacles, or performing simple maintenance tasks. We review the state-of-the-art of fundamental problems and demonstrate that many methods employed at small-scale are similar to the ones employed in real Self-driving cars from companies like Tesla or Lyft. Finally, we discuss the current state of Robotics and autonomous driving and the technological and ethical limitations that we can find in this field.
summary: Autonomous robots are currently one of the most popular Artificial Intelligence problems, having experienced significant advances in the last decade, from Self-driving cars and humanoids to delivery robots and drones. Part of the problem is to get a robot to emulate the perception of human beings, our sense of sight, replacing the eyes with cameras and the brain with mathematical models such as Neural Networks. Developing an AI able to drive a car without human intervention and a small robot to deliver packages in the city may seem like different problems, nevertheless from the point of view of perception and vision, both problems have several similarities. The main solutions we currently find focus on the environment perception through visual information using Computer Vision techniques, Machine Learning, and various algorithms to make the robot understand the environment or scene, move, adapt its trajectory and perform its tasks (maintenance, exploration, etc.) without the need for human intervention. In this work, we develop a small-scale autonomous vehicle from scratch, capable of understanding the scene using only visual information, navigating through industrial environments, detecting people and obstacles, or performing simple maintenance tasks. We review the state-of-the-art of fundamental problems and demonstrate that many methods employed at small-scale are similar to the ones employed in real Self-driving cars from companies like Tesla or Lyft. Finally, we discuss the current state of Robotics and autonomous driving and the technological and ethical limitations that we can find in this field.
abstract_zh: 自主机器人是目前最流行的人工智能问题之一，在过去十年中经历了重大进步，从自动驾驶汽车和人形机器人到送货机器人和无人机。部分问题是让机器人模仿人类的感知、视觉，用摄像头代替眼睛，用神经网络等数学模型代替大脑。开发能够在没有人工干预的情况下驾驶汽车的人工智能和开发在城市中运送包裹的小型机器人似乎是不同的问题，但从感知和视觉的角度来看，这两个问题有一些相似之处。目前我们发现的主要解决方案侧重于利用计算机视觉技术、机器学习和各种算法通过视觉信息感知环境，使机器人在不需要人工干预的情况下理解环境或场景、移动、调整其轨迹并执行其任务（维护、探索等）。在这项工作中，我们从头开始开发一种小型自动驾驶汽车，能够仅使用视觉信息来理解场景，在工业环境中导航，检测人员和障碍物，或执行简单的维护任务。我们回顾了基本问题的最新技术，并证明小规模采用的许多方法与 Tesla 或 Lyft 等公司的真正自动驾驶汽车中采用的方法相似。最后，我们讨论机器人和自动驾驶的现状以及我们在该领域可以找到的技术和道德限制。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种基于视觉的自主机器人开发，通过视觉信息实现环境感知、导航和简单任务执行，并与现实中的自动驾驶技术进行对比。
AI.motivation: 自主机器人是当前人工智能领域的热点问题，通过视觉感知替代人类感官成为关键挑战，需解决环境理解、路径规划等共性问题。
AI.method: 从零开始构建小型自主车辆，采用计算机视觉、机器学习和算法实现场景理解与导航，并回顾相关技术前沿进行对比分析。
AI.result: 成功开发出可工业环境导航、检测障碍物并执行简单维护任务的自主机器人，验证了小型化方案与特斯拉等企业技术的相似性。
AI.conclusion: 当前自主机器人技术已取得进展，但仍面临技术瓶颈与伦理挑战，需进一步研究以推动实际应用。

tldr: 本文介绍了一种基于视觉的自主机器人开发，通过视觉信息实现环境感知、导航和简单任务执行，并与现实中的自动驾驶技术进行对比。
motivation: 自主机器人是当前人工智能领域的热点问题，通过视觉感知替代人类感官成为关键挑战，需解决环境理解、路径规划等共性问题。
method: 从零开始构建小型自主车辆，采用计算机视觉、机器学习和算法实现场景理解与导航，并回顾相关技术前沿进行对比分析。
result: 成功开发出可工业环境导航、检测障碍物并执行简单维护任务的自主机器人，验证了小型化方案与特斯拉等企业技术的相似性。
conclusion: 当前自主机器人技术已取得进展，但仍面临技术瓶颈与伦理挑战，需进一步研究以推动实际应用。
search_text: An Embarrassingly Pragmatic Introduction to Vision-based Autonomous Robots 基于视觉的自主机器人的实用介绍 Autonomous robots are currently one of the most popular Artificial Intelligence problems, having experienced significant advances in the last decade, from Self-driving cars and humanoids to delivery robots and drones. Part of the problem is to get a robot to emulate the perception of human beings, our sense of sight, replacing the eyes with cameras and the brain with mathematical models such as Neural Networks. Developing an AI able to drive a car without human intervention and a small robot to deliver packages in the city may seem like different problems, nevertheless from the point of view of perception and vision, both problems have several similarities. The main solutions we currently find focus on the environment perception through visual information using Computer Vision techniques, Machine Learning, and various algorithms to make the robot understand the environment or scene, move, adapt its trajectory and perform its tasks (maintenance, exploration, etc.) without the need for human intervention. In this work, we develop a small-scale autonomous vehicle from scratch, capable of understanding the scene using only visual information, navigating through industrial environments, detecting people and obstacles, or performing simple maintenance tasks. We review the state-of-the-art of fundamental problems and demonstrate that many methods employed at small-scale are similar to the ones employed in real Self-driving cars from companies like Tesla or Lyft. Finally, we discuss the current state of Robotics and autonomous driving and the technological and ethical limitations that we can find in this field. 自主机器人是目前最流行的人工智能问题之一，在过去十年中经历了重大进步，从自动驾驶汽车和人形机器人到送货机器人和无人机。部分问题是让机器人模仿人类的感知、视觉，用摄像头代替眼睛，用神经网络等数学模型代替大脑。开发能够在没有人工干预的情况下驾驶汽车的人工智能和开发在城市中运送包裹的小型机器人似乎是不同的问题，但从感知和视觉的角度来看，这两个问题有一些相似之处。目前我们发现的主要解决方案侧重于利用计算机视觉技术、机器学习和各种算法通过视觉信息感知环境，使机器人在不需要人工干预的情况下理解环境或场景、移动、调整其轨迹并执行其任务（维护、探索等）。在这项工作中，我们从头开始开发一种小型自动驾驶汽车，能够仅使用视觉信息来理解场景，在工业环境中导航，检测人员和障碍物，或执行简单的维护任务。我们回顾了基本问题的最新技术，并证明小规模采用的许多方法与 Tesla 或 Lyft 等公司的真正自动驾驶汽车中采用的方法相似。最后，我们讨论机器人和自动驾驶的现状以及我们在该领域可以找到的技术和道德限制。 本文介绍了一种基于视觉的自主机器人开发，通过视觉信息实现环境感知、导航和简单任务执行，并与现实中的自动驾驶技术进行对比。 Marcos V. Conde cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Jagpreet Chawla,Nikhil Thakurdesai,Anuj Godase,Md Reza,David Crandall,Soon-Heung Jung
title: Error Diagnosis of Deep Monocular Depth Estimation Models
title_zh: 深度单目深度估计模型的错误诊断
abstract: Estimating depth from a monocular image is an ill-posed problem: when the camera projects a 3D scene onto a 2D plane, depth information is inherently and permanently lost. Nevertheless, recent work has shown impressive results in estimating 3D structure from 2D images using deep learning. In this paper, we put on an introspective hat and analyze state-of-the-art monocular depth estimation models in indoor scenes to understand these models' limitations and error patterns. To address errors in depth estimation, we introduce a novel Depth Error Detection Network (DEDN) that spatially identifies erroneous depth predictions in the monocular depth estimation models. By experimenting with multiple state-of-the-art monocular indoor depth estimation models on multiple datasets, we show that our proposed depth error detection network can identify a significant number of errors in the predicted depth maps. Our module is flexible and can be readily plugged into any monocular depth prediction network to help diagnose its results. Additionally, we propose a simple yet effective Depth Error Correction Network (DECN) that iteratively corrects errors based on our initial error diagnosis.
summary: Estimating depth from a monocular image is an ill-posed problem: when the camera projects a 3D scene onto a 2D plane, depth information is inherently and permanently lost. Nevertheless, recent work has shown impressive results in estimating 3D structure from 2D images using deep learning. In this paper, we put on an introspective hat and analyze state-of-the-art monocular depth estimation models in indoor scenes to understand these models' limitations and error patterns. To address errors in depth estimation, we introduce a novel Depth Error Detection Network (DEDN) that spatially identifies erroneous depth predictions in the monocular depth estimation models. By experimenting with multiple state-of-the-art monocular indoor depth estimation models on multiple datasets, we show that our proposed depth error detection network can identify a significant number of errors in the predicted depth maps. Our module is flexible and can be readily plugged into any monocular depth prediction network to help diagnose its results. Additionally, we propose a simple yet effective Depth Error Correction Network (DECN) that iteratively corrects errors based on our initial error diagnosis.
abstract_zh: 从单目图像估计深度是一个不适定问题：当相机将 3D 场景投影到 2D 平面上时，深度信息本质上会永久丢失。尽管如此，最近的工作在使用深度学习从 2D 图像估计 3D 结构方面取得了令人印象深刻的结果。在本文中，我们戴上内省的帽子，分析室内场景中最先进的单目深度估计模型，以了解这些模型的局限性和错误模式。为了解决深度估计中的错误，我们引入了一种新颖的深度误差检测网络（DEDN），它可以在空间上识别单目深度估计模型中的错误深度预测。通过在多个数据集上试验多个最先进的单目室内深度估计模型，我们表明我们提出的深度误差检测网络可以识别预测深度图中的大量误差。我们的模块非常灵活，可以轻松插入任何单目深度预测网络，以帮助诊断其结果。此外，我们提出了一个简单而有效的深度纠错网络（DECN），它根据我们最初的错误诊断迭代地纠正错误。

AI.tldr: 分析单目深度估计模型的错误模式，并提出检测与校正方法
AI.motivation: 单目深度估计存在固有挑战，现有模型存在局限性，需诊断错误以提高准确性
AI.method: 提出DEDN网络检测深度预测错误，并设计DECN网络迭代校正错误
AI.result: 实验表明DEDN能有效识别预测深度图中的错误，且模块具有通用性
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能有效诊断并修正深度估计错误，提升模型可靠性

title: Global convergence of ResNets: From finite to infinite width using linear parameterization
title_zh: ResNet 的全局收敛：使用线性参数化从有限宽度到无限宽度
abstract: Overparametrization is a key factor in the absence of convexity to explain global convergence of gradient descent (GD) for neural networks. Beside the well studied lazy regime, infinite width (mean field) analysis has been developed for shallow networks, using on convex optimization technics. To bridge the gap between the lazy and mean field regimes, we study Residual Networks (ResNets) in which the residual block has linear parametrization while still being nonlinear. Such ResNets admit both infinite depth and width limits, encoding residual blocks in a Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Space (RKHS). In this limit, we prove a local Polyak-Lojasiewicz inequality. Thus, every critical point is a global minimizer and a local convergence result of GD holds, retrieving the lazy regime. In contrast with other mean-field studies, it applies to both parametric and non-parametric cases under an expressivity condition on the residuals. Our analysis leads to a practical and quantified recipe: starting from a universal RKHS, Random Fourier Features are applied to obtain a finite dimensional parameterization satisfying with high-probability our expressivity condition.
summary: Overparametrization is a key factor in the absence of convexity to explain global convergence of gradient descent (GD) for neural networks. Beside the well studied lazy regime, infinite width (mean field) analysis has been developed for shallow networks, using on convex optimization technics. To bridge the gap between the lazy and mean field regimes, we study Residual Networks (ResNets) in which the residual block has linear parametrization while still being nonlinear. Such ResNets admit both infinite depth and width limits, encoding residual blocks in a Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Space (RKHS). In this limit, we prove a local Polyak-Lojasiewicz inequality. Thus, every critical point is a global minimizer and a local convergence result of GD holds, retrieving the lazy regime. In contrast with other mean-field studies, it applies to both parametric and non-parametric cases under an expressivity condition on the residuals. Our analysis leads to a practical and quantified recipe: starting from a universal RKHS, Random Fourier Features are applied to obtain a finite dimensional parameterization satisfying with high-probability our expressivity condition.
abstract_zh: 过度参数化是缺乏凸性来解释神经网络梯度下降（GD）全局收敛的关键因素。除了充分研究的惰性机制之外，还使用凸优化技术为浅层网络开发了无限宽度（平均场）分析。为了弥补惰性场和平均场机制之间的差距，我们研究了残差网络（ResNets），其中残差块具有线性参数化，同时仍然是非线性的。此类 ResNet 允许无限深度和宽度限制，在再现内核希尔伯特空间 (RKHS) 中对残差块进行编码。在此极限下，我们证明了局部 Polyak-Lojasiewicz 不等式。因此，每个临界点都是全局最小化点，并且 GD 的局部收敛结果成立，恢复惰性状态。与其他平均场研究相比，它适用于残差表达条件下的参数和非参数情况。我们的分析得出了一个实用且量化的方法：从通用 RKHS 开始，应用随机傅立叶特征来获得满足高概率表达条件的有限维参数化。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了具有线性参数化的残差网络（ResNets）在全球收敛性方面的理论，通过连接有限宽度与无限宽度的分析，证明梯度下降的收敛性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在梯度下降的全局收敛性分析中存在两种极端：懒惰regime（有限宽度）和平均场理论（无限宽度），但缺乏中间桥梁。同时，传统方法难以处理参数化与非参数化场景的统一分析。
AI.method: 通过线性参数化ResNets的残差块，将其嵌入再生核希尔伯特空间（RKHS），并证明局部Polyak-Lojasiewicz不等式；结合随机傅里叶特征实现有限维参数化以满足表达性条件。
AI.result: 证明所有临界点均为全局最小值，梯度下降局部收敛性成立；方法适用于参数化与非参数化场景，并提供基于RKHS的可量化实现方案。
AI.conclusion: 该工作通过线性参数化ResNets统一了懒惰与平均场理论，为深度学习的收敛性分析提供了新视角，并提出了可实际应用的参数化方法。

Thus, every critical point is a global minimizer and a local convergence result of GD holds, retrieving the lazy regime. In contrast with other mean-field studies, it applies to both parametric and non-parametric cases under an expressivity condition on the residuals. Our analysis leads to a practical and quantified recipe: starting from a universal RKHS, Random Fourier Features are applied to obtain a finite dimensional parameterization satisfying with high-probability our expressivity condition. 过度参数化是缺乏凸性来解释神经网络梯度下降（GD）全局收敛的关键因素。除了充分研究的惰性机制之外，还使用凸优化技术为浅层网络开发了无限宽度（平均场）分析。为了弥补惰性场和平均场机制之间的差距，我们研究了残差网络（ResNets），其中残差块具有线性参数化，同时仍然是非线性的。此类 ResNet 允许无限深度和宽度限制，在再现内核希尔伯特空间 (RKHS) 中对残差块进行编码。在此极限下，我们证明了局部 Polyak-Lojasiewicz 不等式。因此，每个临界点都是全局最小化点，并且 GD 的局部收敛结果成立，恢复惰性状态。与其他平均场研究相比，它适用于残差表达条件下的参数和非参数情况。我们的分析得出了一个实用且量化的方法：从通用 RKHS 开始，应用随机傅立叶特征来获得满足高概率表达条件的有限维参数化。 该论文研究了具有线性参数化的残差网络（ResNets）在全球收敛性方面的理论，通过连接有限宽度与无限宽度的分析，证明梯度下降的收敛性。 Raphaël Barboni,Gabriel Peyré,François-Xavier Vialard cs.NE

title: A Validation Tool for Designing Reinforcement Learning Environments
title_zh: 用于设计强化学习环境的验证工具
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has gained increasing attraction in the academia and tech industry with launches to a variety of impactful applications and products. Although research is being actively conducted on many fronts (e.g., offline RL, performance, etc.), many RL practitioners face a challenge that has been largely ignored: determine whether a designed Markov Decision Process (MDP) is valid and meaningful. This study proposes a heuristic-based feature analysis method to validate whether an MDP is well formulated. We believe an MDP suitable for applying RL should contain a set of state features that are both sensitive to actions and predictive in rewards. We tested our method in constructed environments showing that our approach can identify certain invalid environment formulations. As far as we know, performing validity analysis for RL problem formulation is a novel direction. We envision that our tool will serve as a motivational example to help practitioners apply RL in real-world problems more easily.
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has gained increasing attraction in the academia and tech industry with launches to a variety of impactful applications and products. Although research is being actively conducted on many fronts (e.g., offline RL, performance, etc.), many RL practitioners face a challenge that has been largely ignored: determine whether a designed Markov Decision Process (MDP) is valid and meaningful. This study proposes a heuristic-based feature analysis method to validate whether an MDP is well formulated. We believe an MDP suitable for applying RL should contain a set of state features that are both sensitive to actions and predictive in rewards. We tested our method in constructed environments showing that our approach can identify certain invalid environment formulations. As far as we know, performing validity analysis for RL problem formulation is a novel direction. We envision that our tool will serve as a motivational example to help practitioners apply RL in real-world problems more easily.
abstract_zh: 随着各种有影响力的应用程序和产品的推出，强化学习 (RL) 在学术界和科技行业中越来越有吸引力。尽管研究在许多方面（例如离线 RL、性能等）积极进行，但许多 RL 从业者面临着一个在很大程度上被忽视的挑战：确定设计的马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP) 是否有效且有意义。本研究提出了一种基于启发式的特征分析方法来验证 MDP 是否得到了很好的制定。我们认为，适合应用强化学习的 MDP 应该包含一组对动作敏感且对奖励具有预测性的状态特征。我们在构建的环境中测试了我们的方法，表明我们的方法可以识别某些无效的环境配方。据我们所知，对 RL 问题表述进行有效性分析是一个新颖的方向。我们设想我们的工具将作为一个激励示例，帮助从业者更轻松地将强化学习应用于现实世界的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于启发式特征分析的方法，用于验证强化学习环境中设计的马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）是否有效。
AI.motivation: 尽管强化学习应用广泛，但设计有效的MDP缺乏验证工具，导致从业者难以判断环境设计的合理性。
AI.method: 通过分析状态特征对动作的敏感性及对奖励的预测性，提出启发式特征分析方法验证MDP有效性。
AI.result: 在构建的测试环境中，该方法成功识别出部分无效的环境设计，验证了方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该工具为RL问题验证提供了新方向，可帮助从业者更高效地设计符合实际需求的强化学习环境。

title: Music demixing with the sliCQ transform
title_zh: 使用 sliCQ 变换进行音乐分离
comment: 2 pages, 3 figures. Published in the MDX21 workshop (satellite event of ISMIR 2021): https://mdx-workshop.github.io/proceedings/hanssian.pdf
comments: 2 pages, 3 figures. Published in the MDX21 workshop (satellite event of ISMIR 2021): https://mdx-workshop.github.io/proceedings/hanssian.pdf
abstract: Music source separation is the task of extracting an estimate of one or more isolated sources or instruments (for example, drums or vocals) from musical audio. The task of music demixing or unmixing considers the case where the musical audio is separated into an estimate of all of its constituent sources that can be summed back to the original mixture. The Music Demixing Challenge was created to inspire new demixing research. Open-Unmix (UMX), and the improved variant CrossNet-Open-Unmix (X-UMX), were included in the challenge as the baselines. Both models use the Short-Time Fourier Transform (STFT) as the representation of music signals. The time-frequency uncertainty principle states that the STFT of a signal cannot have maximal resolution in both time and frequency. The tradeoff in time-frequency resolution can significantly affect music demixing results. Our proposed adaptation of UMX replaced the STFT with the sliCQT, a time-frequency transform with varying time-frequency resolution. Unfortunately, our model xumx-sliCQ achieved lower demixing scores than UMX.
summary: Music source separation is the task of extracting an estimate of one or more isolated sources or instruments (for example, drums or vocals) from musical audio. The task of music demixing or unmixing considers the case where the musical audio is separated into an estimate of all of its constituent sources that can be summed back to the original mixture. The Music Demixing Challenge was created to inspire new demixing research. Open-Unmix (UMX), and the improved variant CrossNet-Open-Unmix (X-UMX), were included in the challenge as the baselines. Both models use the Short-Time Fourier Transform (STFT) as the representation of music signals. The time-frequency uncertainty principle states that the STFT of a signal cannot have maximal resolution in both time and frequency. The tradeoff in time-frequency resolution can significantly affect music demixing results. Our proposed adaptation of UMX replaced the STFT with the sliCQT, a time-frequency transform with varying time-frequency resolution. Unfortunately, our model xumx-sliCQ achieved lower demixing scores than UMX.
abstract_zh: 音乐源分离是从音乐音频中提取一个或多个孤立源或乐器（例如鼓或人声）的估计的任务。音乐解混或解混的任务考虑这样的情况：音乐音频被分成对其所有组成源的估计，这些源可以被总结回原始混合物。音乐解混挑战赛的创建是为了激发新的解混研究。 Open-Unmix (UMX) 和改进的 CrossNet-Open-Unmix (X-UMX) 变体作为基线包含在挑战中。两种模型都使用短时傅里叶变换（STFT）作为音乐信号的表示。时频不确定性原理指出信号的 STFT 在时间和频率上不能同时具有最大分辨率。时频分辨率的权衡会显着影响音乐解混结果。我们提出的 UMX 改编方案用 sliCQT 取代了 STFT，sliCQT 是一种具有不同时频分辨率的时频变换。不幸的是，我们的模型 xumx-sliCQ 获得的分层分数低于 UMX。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于sliCQ变换的音乐去混音方法，旨在改进传统STFT在时间-频率分辨率上的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统STFT因时间-频率不确定性原理无法同时兼顾时间与频率分辨率，导致音乐去混音效果受限，需探索更优的时频表示方法。
AI.method: 将基线模型UMX中的STFT替换为具有自适应时间-频率分辨率的sliCQT变换，构建xumx-sliCQ模型进行音乐源分离。
AI.result: 实验表明，xumx-sliCQ模型的去混音效果评分低于原始UMX模型，未达到预期改进效果。
AI.conclusion: sliCQ变换在理论分辨率上优于STFT，但实际应用中可能因实现细节或参数设置未充分优化，导致效果未达预期，需进一步研究改进。

title: DeepRLS: A Recurrent Network Architecture with Least Squares Implicit Layers for Non-blind Image Deconvolution
title_zh: DeepRLS：一种具有最小二乘隐式层的循环网络架构，用于非盲图像反卷积
abstract: In this work, we study the problem of non-blind image deconvolution and propose a novel recurrent network architecture that leads to very competitive restoration results of high image quality. Motivated by the computational efficiency and robustness of existing large scale linear solvers, we manage to express the solution to this problem as the solution of a series of adaptive non-negative least-squares problems. This gives rise to our proposed Recurrent Least Squares Deconvolution Network (RLSDN) architecture, which consists of an implicit layer that imposes a linear constraint between its input and output. By design, our network manages to serve two important purposes simultaneously. The first is that it implicitly models an effective image prior that can adequately characterize the set of natural images, while the second is that it recovers the corresponding maximum a posteriori (MAP) estimate. Experiments on publicly available datasets, comparing recent state-of-the-art methods, show that our proposed RLSDN approach achieves the best reported performance both for grayscale and color images for all tested scenarios. Furthermore, we introduce a novel training strategy that can be adopted by any network architecture that involves the solution of linear systems as part of its pipeline. Our strategy eliminates completely the need to unroll the iterations required by the linear solver and, thus, it reduces significantly the memory footprint during training. Consequently, this enables the training of deeper network architectures which can further improve the reconstruction results.
summary: In this work, we study the problem of non-blind image deconvolution and propose a novel recurrent network architecture that leads to very competitive restoration results of high image quality. Motivated by the computational efficiency and robustness of existing large scale linear solvers, we manage to express the solution to this problem as the solution of a series of adaptive non-negative least-squares problems. This gives rise to our proposed Recurrent Least Squares Deconvolution Network (RLSDN) architecture, which consists of an implicit layer that imposes a linear constraint between its input and output. By design, our network manages to serve two important purposes simultaneously. The first is that it implicitly models an effective image prior that can adequately characterize the set of natural images, while the second is that it recovers the corresponding maximum a posteriori (MAP) estimate. Experiments on publicly available datasets, comparing recent state-of-the-art methods, show that our proposed RLSDN approach achieves the best reported performance both for grayscale and color images for all tested scenarios. Furthermore, we introduce a novel training strategy that can be adopted by any network architecture that involves the solution of linear systems as part of its pipeline. Our strategy eliminates completely the need to unroll the iterations required by the linear solver and, thus, it reduces significantly the memory footprint during training. Consequently, this enables the training of deeper network architectures which can further improve the reconstruction results.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们研究了非盲图像反卷积问题，并提出了一种新颖的循环网络架构，该架构可以带来非常有竞争力的高图像质量恢复结果。受现有大规模线性求解器的计算效率和鲁棒性的启发，我们设法将该问题的解决方案表示为一系列自适应非负最小二乘问题的解决方案。这就产生了我们提出的循环最小二乘反卷积网络（RLSDN）架构，该架构由一个隐式层组成，在其输入和输出之间施加线性约束。通过设计，我们的网络设法同时服务于两个重要目的。第一个是它隐式地对有效图像先验进行建模，可以充分表征自然图像集，而第二个是它恢复相应的最大后验（MAP）估计。在公开数据集上进行的实验，比较了最新的最先进方法，表明我们提出的 RLSDN 方法在所有测试场景的灰度和彩色图像方面都实现了最佳的报告性能。此外，我们引入了一种新颖的训练策略，任何涉及线性系统解决方案作为其管道一部分的网络架构都可以采用该策略。我们的策略完全消除了展开线性求解器所需的迭代的需要，因此，它显着减少了训练期间的内存占用。因此，这使得能够训练更深的网络架构，从而进一步改善重建结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RLSDN的递归网络架构，用于非盲图像去卷积任务，通过结合最小二乘隐层和自适应非负最小二乘问题解决图像恢复问题。
AI.motivation: 受现有大规模线性求解器的计算效率和鲁棒性启发，旨在设计一种能同时建模有效图像先验并恢复最大后验估计的高效网络架构。
AI.method: 设计包含隐层线性约束的递归网络（RLSDN），将图像恢复转化为自适应非负最小二乘问题序列求解，并提出无需展开线性求解器迭代的训练策略以降低内存占用。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上，RLSDN在灰度和彩色图像的非盲去卷积任务中均取得最佳性能，且新训练策略使更深网络训练成为可能。
AI.conclusion: RLSDN通过结合隐层约束和优化策略，在图像恢复精度与训练效率上取得突破，其训练方法可推广至其他涉及线性系统求解的网络架构。

search_text: DeepRLS: A Recurrent Network Architecture with Least Squares Implicit Layers for Non-blind Image Deconvolution DeepRLS：一种具有最小二乘隐式层的循环网络架构，用于非盲图像反卷积 In this work, we study the problem of non-blind image deconvolution and propose a novel recurrent network architecture that leads to very competitive restoration results of high image quality. Motivated by the computational efficiency and robustness of existing large scale linear solvers, we manage to express the solution to this problem as the solution of a series of adaptive non-negative least-squares problems. This gives rise to our proposed Recurrent Least Squares Deconvolution Network (RLSDN) architecture, which consists of an implicit layer that imposes a linear constraint between its input and output. By design, our network manages to serve two important purposes simultaneously. The first is that it implicitly models an effective image prior that can adequately characterize the set of natural images, while the second is that it recovers the corresponding maximum a posteriori (MAP) estimate. Experiments on publicly available datasets, comparing recent state-of-the-art methods, show that our proposed RLSDN approach achieves the best reported performance both for grayscale and color images for all tested scenarios. Furthermore, we introduce a novel training strategy that can be adopted by any network architecture that involves the solution of linear systems as part of its pipeline. Our strategy eliminates completely the need to unroll the iterations required by the linear solver and, thus, it reduces significantly the memory footprint during training. Consequently, this enables the training of deeper network architectures which can further improve the reconstruction results. 在这项工作中，我们研究了非盲图像反卷积问题，并提出了一种新颖的循环网络架构，该架构可以带来非常有竞争力的高图像质量恢复结果。受现有大规模线性求解器的计算效率和鲁棒性的启发，我们设法将该问题的解决方案表示为一系列自适应非负最小二乘问题的解决方案。这就产生了我们提出的循环最小二乘反卷积网络（RLSDN）架构，该架构由一个隐式层组成，在其输入和输出之间施加线性约束。通过设计，我们的网络设法同时服务于两个重要目的。第一个是它隐式地对有效图像先验进行建模，可以充分表征自然图像集，而第二个是它恢复相应的最大后验（MAP）估计。在公开数据集上进行的实验，比较了最新的最先进方法，表明我们提出的 RLSDN 方法在所有测试场景的灰度和彩色图像方面都实现了最佳的报告性能。此外，我们引入了一种新颖的训练策略，任何涉及线性系统解决方案作为其管道一部分的网络架构都可以采用该策略。我们的策略完全消除了展开线性求解器所需的迭代的需要，因此，它显着减少了训练期间的内存占用。因此，这使得能够训练更深的网络架构，从而进一步改善重建结果。 本文提出了一种名为RLSDN的递归网络架构，用于非盲图像去卷积任务，通过结合最小二乘隐层和自适应非负最小二乘问题解决图像恢复问题。 Iaroslav Koshelev,Daniil Selikhanovych,Stamatios Lefkimmiatis eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Yuanbo Xiangli,Linning Xu,Xingang Pan,Nanxuan Zhao,Anyi Rao,Christian Theobalt,Bo Dai,Dahua Lin
title: BungeeNeRF: Progressive Neural Radiance Field for Extreme Multi-scale Scene Rendering
title_zh: BungeeNeRF：用于极端多尺度场景渲染的渐进式神经辐射场
comment: Accepted to ECCV22; Previous version: CityNeRF: Building NeRF at City Scale; Project page can be found in https://city-super.github.io/citynerf
comments: Accepted to ECCV22; Previous version: CityNeRF: Building NeRF at City Scale; Project page can be found in https://city-super.github.io/citynerf
abstract: Neural radiance fields (NeRF) has achieved outstanding performance in modeling 3D objects and controlled scenes, usually under a single scale. In this work, we focus on multi-scale cases where large changes in imagery are observed at drastically different scales. This scenario vastly exists in real-world 3D environments, such as city scenes, with views ranging from satellite level that captures the overview of a city, to ground level imagery showing complex details of an architecture; and can also be commonly identified in landscape and delicate minecraft 3D models. The wide span of viewing positions within these scenes yields multi-scale renderings with very different levels of detail, which poses great challenges to neural radiance field and biases it towards compromised results. To address these issues, we introduce BungeeNeRF, a progressive neural radiance field that achieves level-of-detail rendering across drastically varied scales. Starting from fitting distant views with a shallow base block, as training progresses, new blocks are appended to accommodate the emerging details in the increasingly closer views. The strategy progressively activates high-frequency channels in NeRF's positional encoding inputs and successively unfolds more complex details as the training proceeds. We demonstrate the superiority of BungeeNeRF in modeling diverse multi-scale scenes with drastically varying views on multiple data sources (city models, synthetic, and drone captured data) and its support for high-quality rendering in different levels of detail.
summary: Neural radiance fields (NeRF) has achieved outstanding performance in modeling 3D objects and controlled scenes, usually under a single scale. In this work, we focus on multi-scale cases where large changes in imagery are observed at drastically different scales. This scenario vastly exists in real-world 3D environments, such as city scenes, with views ranging from satellite level that captures the overview of a city, to ground level imagery showing complex details of an architecture; and can also be commonly identified in landscape and delicate minecraft 3D models. The wide span of viewing positions within these scenes yields multi-scale renderings with very different levels of detail, which poses great challenges to neural radiance field and biases it towards compromised results. To address these issues, we introduce BungeeNeRF, a progressive neural radiance field that achieves level-of-detail rendering across drastically varied scales. Starting from fitting distant views with a shallow base block, as training progresses, new blocks are appended to accommodate the emerging details in the increasingly closer views. The strategy progressively activates high-frequency channels in NeRF's positional encoding inputs and successively unfolds more complex details as the training proceeds. We demonstrate the superiority of BungeeNeRF in modeling diverse multi-scale scenes with drastically varying views on multiple data sources (city models, synthetic, and drone captured data) and its support for high-quality rendering in different levels of detail.
abstract_zh: 神经辐射场 (NeRF) 在 3D 对象和受控场景建模（通常在单一尺度下）方面取得了出色的性能。在这项工作中，我们关注多尺度情况，在这些情况下，在截然不同的尺度上观察到图像的巨大变化。这种场景广泛存在于现实世界的 3D 环境中，例如城市场景，其视图范围从捕捉城市概况的卫星水平到显示建筑复杂细节的地面图像；也可以在风景和精致的 Minecraft 3D 模型中常见。这些场景中观看位置的广泛跨度产生了具有不同细节水平的多尺度渲染，这对神经辐射场提出了巨大的挑战，并使其偏向于妥协的结果。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了 BungeeNeRF，这是一种渐进式神经辐射场，可以在各种不同的尺度上实现细节层次的渲染。从用浅基块拟合远景开始，随着训练的进行，会附加新的块以适应越来越近的视图中出现的细节。该策略逐步激活 NeRF 位置编码输入中的高频通道，并随着训练的进行逐渐展现更复杂的细节。我们展示了 BungeeNeRF 在对多个数据源（城市模型、合成数据和无人机捕获的数据）具有截然不同的视图的多样化多尺度场景建模方面的优越性，以及它对不同细节级别的高质量渲染的支持。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BungeeNeRF，一种渐进式神经辐射场方法，用于解决极端多尺度场景的渲染问题。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF在处理多尺度场景（如城市全景到建筑细节）时因尺度差异过大导致渲染质量妥协，需开发适应多尺度细节的新型神经辐射场。
AI.method: 通过渐进式网络结构，从远距离视角的浅层基础块开始训练，逐步追加模块以捕捉近距离细节，结合位置编码高频通道的渐进激活策略。
AI.result: 在城市模型、合成数据和无人机采集数据等多种数据源上验证了BungeeNeRF在多尺度场景建模和细节层次渲染中的优越性。
AI.conclusion: BungeeNeRF通过渐进式网络扩展和高频特征激活机制，有效解决了多尺度场景渲染中的细节层次冲突问题。

title: Sparse Depth Completion with Semantic Mesh Deformation Optimization
title_zh: 通过语义网格变形优化进行稀疏深度补全
abstract: Sparse depth measurements are widely available in many applications such as augmented reality, visual inertial odometry and robots equipped with low cost depth sensors. Although such sparse depth samples work well for certain applications like motion tracking, a complete depth map is usually preferred for broader applications, such as 3D object recognition, 3D reconstruction and autonomous driving. Despite the recent advancements in depth prediction from single RGB images with deeper neural networks, the existing approaches do not yield reliable results for practical use. In this work, we propose a neural network with post-optimization, which takes an RGB image and sparse depth samples as input and predicts the complete depth map. We make three major contributions to advance the state-of-the-art: an improved backbone network architecture named EDNet, a semantic edge-weighted loss function and a semantic mesh deformation optimization method. Our evaluation results outperform the existing work consistently on both indoor and outdoor datasets, and it significantly reduces the mean average error by up to 19.5% under the same settings of 200 sparse samples on NYU-Depth-V2 dataset.
summary: Sparse depth measurements are widely available in many applications such as augmented reality, visual inertial odometry and robots equipped with low cost depth sensors. Although such sparse depth samples work well for certain applications like motion tracking, a complete depth map is usually preferred for broader applications, such as 3D object recognition, 3D reconstruction and autonomous driving. Despite the recent advancements in depth prediction from single RGB images with deeper neural networks, the existing approaches do not yield reliable results for practical use. In this work, we propose a neural network with post-optimization, which takes an RGB image and sparse depth samples as input and predicts the complete depth map. We make three major contributions to advance the state-of-the-art: an improved backbone network architecture named EDNet, a semantic edge-weighted loss function and a semantic mesh deformation optimization method. Our evaluation results outperform the existing work consistently on both indoor and outdoor datasets, and it significantly reduces the mean average error by up to 19.5% under the same settings of 200 sparse samples on NYU-Depth-V2 dataset.
abstract_zh: 稀疏深度测量广泛应用于增强现实、视觉惯性里程计和配备低成本深度传感器的机器人等许多应用中。尽管这种稀疏深度样本对于运动跟踪等某些应用效果很好，但完整的深度图通常更适合更广泛的应用，例如 3D 对象识别、3D 重建和自动驾驶。尽管最近在使用更深的神经网络对单个 RGB 图像进行深度预测方面取得了进展，但现有的方法并不能产生可供实际使用的可靠结果。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种具有后优化功能的神经网络，它将 RGB 图像和稀疏深度样本作为输入并预测完整的深度图。我们为推进最先进的技术做出了三项主要贡献：一种名为 EDNet 的改进骨干网络架构、一种语义边缘加权损失函数和一种语义网格变形优化方法。我们的评估结果在室内和室外数据集上均优于现有工作，并且在 NYU-Depth-V2 数据集上 200 个稀疏样本的相同设置下，显着降低了平均误差高达 19.5%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合神经网络与语义网格变形优化的稀疏深度图补全方法，以生成高质量的完整深度图。
AI.motivation: 现有基于单张RGB图像的深度预测方法在实际应用中可靠性不足，而稀疏深度测量难以满足3D重建、自动驾驶等需要完整深度图的场景需求。
AI.method: 设计改进的EDNet主干网络，引入语义边缘加权损失函数，并提出基于语义网格变形的优化方法，联合优化深度预测与几何结构。
AI.result: 在NYU-Depth-V2等数据集上，相较现有方法将平均误差降低最高达19.5%，室内室外场景均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 通过网络架构改进与语义引导的几何优化，有效提升了稀疏深度补全的精度，为复杂场景下的深度感知提供新思路。

search_text: Sparse Depth Completion with Semantic Mesh Deformation Optimization 通过语义网格变形优化进行稀疏深度补全 Sparse depth measurements are widely available in many applications such as augmented reality, visual inertial odometry and robots equipped with low cost depth sensors. Although such sparse depth samples work well for certain applications like motion tracking, a complete depth map is usually preferred for broader applications, such as 3D object recognition, 3D reconstruction and autonomous driving. Despite the recent advancements in depth prediction from single RGB images with deeper neural networks, the existing approaches do not yield reliable results for practical use. In this work, we propose a neural network with post-optimization, which takes an RGB image and sparse depth samples as input and predicts the complete depth map. We make three major contributions to advance the state-of-the-art: an improved backbone network architecture named EDNet, a semantic edge-weighted loss function and a semantic mesh deformation optimization method. Our evaluation results outperform the existing work consistently on both indoor and outdoor datasets, and it significantly reduces the mean average error by up to 19.5% under the same settings of 200 sparse samples on NYU-Depth-V2 dataset. 稀疏深度测量广泛应用于增强现实、视觉惯性里程计和配备低成本深度传感器的机器人等许多应用中。尽管这种稀疏深度样本对于运动跟踪等某些应用效果很好，但完整的深度图通常更适合更广泛的应用，例如 3D 对象识别、3D 重建和自动驾驶。尽管最近在使用更深的神经网络对单个 RGB 图像进行深度预测方面取得了进展，但现有的方法并不能产生可供实际使用的可靠结果。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种具有后优化功能的神经网络，它将 RGB 图像和稀疏深度样本作为输入并预测完整的深度图。我们为推进最先进的技术做出了三项主要贡献：一种名为 EDNet 的改进骨干网络架构、一种语义边缘加权损失函数和一种语义网格变形优化方法。我们的评估结果在室内和室外数据集上均优于现有工作，并且在 NYU-Depth-V2 数据集上 200 个稀疏样本的相同设置下，显着降低了平均误差高达 19.5%。 本文提出一种结合神经网络与语义网格变形优化的稀疏深度图补全方法，以生成高质量的完整深度图。 Bing Zhou,Matias Aiskovich,Sinem Guven cs.CV

title: An Adaptive Observer for Uncertain Linear Time-Varying Systems with Unknown Additive Perturbations
title_zh: 具有未知加性扰动的不确定线性时变系统的自适应观测器
abstract: In this paper we are interested in the problem of adaptive state observation of linear time-varying (LTV) systems where the system and the input matrices depend on unknown time-varying parameters. It is assumed that these parameters satisfy some known LTV dynamics, but with unknown initial conditions. Moreover, the state equation is perturbed by an additive signal generated from an exosystem with uncertain constant parameters. Our main contribution is to propose a globally convergent state observer that requires only a weak excitation assumption on the system.
summary: In this paper we are interested in the problem of adaptive state observation of linear time-varying (LTV) systems where the system and the input matrices depend on unknown time-varying parameters. It is assumed that these parameters satisfy some known LTV dynamics, but with unknown initial conditions. Moreover, the state equation is perturbed by an additive signal generated from an exosystem with uncertain constant parameters. Our main contribution is to propose a globally convergent state observer that requires only a weak excitation assumption on the system.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们感兴趣的是线性时变（LTV）系统的自适应状态观测问题，其中系统和输入矩阵取决于未知的时变参数。假设这些参数满足一些已知的 LTV 动态，但初始条件未知。此外，状态方程受到具有不确定常数参数的外系统生成的加性信号的扰动。我们的主要贡献是提出了一种全局收敛的状态观察器，它只需要系统的弱激励假设。

AI.tldr: 设计一种适用于存在未知附加扰动的不确定线性时变系统的自适应状态观测器。
AI.motivation: 现有观测器方法在处理参数不确定性和初始条件未知的时变系统时存在局限性，需降低对系统假设的强度以提高鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出结合参数估计与状态观测的全局收敛观测器，利用弱激励假设处理时变参数和未知扰动的耦合问题。
AI.result: 观测器在无需精确初始条件且满足弱激励条件下实现全局收敛，仿真验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为不确定时变系统的状态观测提供了新思路，扩展了观测器在复杂动态环境中的应用范围。

authors_text: Nicola Dall'Asen,Yiming Wang,Hao Tang,Luca Zanella,Elisa Ricci
title: Graph-based Generative Face Anonymisation with Pose Preservation
title_zh: 基于图的生成人脸匿名化和姿势保留
comment: 21st International Conference on Image analysis and Processing
comments: 21st International Conference on Image analysis and Processing
abstract: We propose AnonyGAN, a GAN-based solution for face anonymisation which replaces the visual information corresponding to a source identity with a condition identity provided as any single image. With the goal to maintain the geometric attributes of the source face, i.e., the facial pose and expression, and to promote more natural face generation, we propose to exploit a Bipartite Graph to explicitly model the relations between the facial landmarks of the source identity and the ones of the condition identity through a deep model. We further propose a landmark attention model to relax the manual selection of facial landmarks, allowing the network to weight the landmarks for the best visual naturalness and pose preservation. Finally, to facilitate the appearance learning, we propose a hybrid training strategy to address the challenge caused by the lack of direct pixel-level supervision. We evaluate our method and its variants on two public datasets, CelebA and LFW, in terms of visual naturalness, facial pose preservation and of its impacts on face detection and re-identification. We prove that AnonyGAN significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in terms of visual naturalness, face detection and pose preservation.
summary: We propose AnonyGAN, a GAN-based solution for face anonymisation which replaces the visual information corresponding to a source identity with a condition identity provided as any single image. With the goal to maintain the geometric attributes of the source face, i.e., the facial pose and expression, and to promote more natural face generation, we propose to exploit a Bipartite Graph to explicitly model the relations between the facial landmarks of the source identity and the ones of the condition identity through a deep model. We further propose a landmark attention model to relax the manual selection of facial landmarks, allowing the network to weight the landmarks for the best visual naturalness and pose preservation. Finally, to facilitate the appearance learning, we propose a hybrid training strategy to address the challenge caused by the lack of direct pixel-level supervision. We evaluate our method and its variants on two public datasets, CelebA and LFW, in terms of visual naturalness, facial pose preservation and of its impacts on face detection and re-identification. We prove that AnonyGAN significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in terms of visual naturalness, face detection and pose preservation.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 AnonyGAN，这是一种基于 GAN 的人脸匿名化解决方案，它将与源身份对应的视觉信息替换为任何单个图像提供的条件身份。为了保持源人脸的几何属性，即面部姿势和表情，并促进更自然的人脸生成，我们建议利用二分图通过深度模型显式建模源身份的面部标志与条件身份的面部标志之间的关系。我们进一步提出了一个地标注意力模型来放松面部地标的手动选择，允许网络对地标进行加权以获得最佳的视觉自然度和姿势保留。最后，为了促进外观学习，我们提出了一种混合训练策略来解决由于缺乏直接像素级监督而带来的挑战。我们在两个公共数据集 CelebA 和 LFW 上评估我们的方法及其变体，包括视觉自然度、面部姿势保留及其对面部检测和重新识别的影响。我们证明 AnonyGAN 在视觉自然度、人脸检测和姿势保存方面明显优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AnonyGAN，一种基于图结构的生成对抗网络（GAN）方法，用于在保持面部姿势和表情的前提下实现人脸匿名化。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在替换人脸身份时难以同时保持源人脸的几何属性（如姿势和表情）及生成自然的视觉效果，需设计更高效的模型解决这一矛盾。
AI.method: 通过构建二分图建模源身份与条件身份的面部关键点关系，并引入关键点注意力机制自动优化关键点权重；采用混合训练策略应对缺乏像素级监督的挑战。
AI.result: 在CelebA和LFW数据集上，AnonyGAN在视觉自然度、面部姿势保持及人脸识别干扰效果上均显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: AnonyGAN通过图结构建模和注意力机制有效实现了身份替换与姿势保持的平衡，为隐私保护提供了更优的生成方案。

We prove that AnonyGAN significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in terms of visual naturalness, face detection and pose preservation. 我们提出了 AnonyGAN，这是一种基于 GAN 的人脸匿名化解决方案，它将与源身份对应的视觉信息替换为任何单个图像提供的条件身份。为了保持源人脸的几何属性，即面部姿势和表情，并促进更自然的人脸生成，我们建议利用二分图通过深度模型显式建模源身份的面部标志与条件身份的面部标志之间的关系。我们进一步提出了一个地标注意力模型来放松面部地标的手动选择，允许网络对地标进行加权以获得最佳的视觉自然度和姿势保留。最后，为了促进外观学习，我们提出了一种混合训练策略来解决由于缺乏直接像素级监督而带来的挑战。我们在两个公共数据集 CelebA 和 LFW 上评估我们的方法及其变体，包括视觉自然度、面部姿势保留及其对面部检测和重新识别的影响。我们证明 AnonyGAN 在视觉自然度、人脸检测和姿势保存方面明显优于最先进的方法。 本文提出AnonyGAN，一种基于图结构的生成对抗网络（GAN）方法，用于在保持面部姿势和表情的前提下实现人脸匿名化。 Nicola Dall'Asen,Yiming Wang,Hao Tang,Luca Zanella,Elisa Ricci cs.CV

authors_text: Kritika Prakash,Fiza Husain,Praveen Paruchuri,Sujit P. Gujar
title: How Private Is Your RL Policy? An Inverse RL Based Analysis Framework
title_zh: 您的 RL 政策的私密性如何？基于逆强化学习的分析框架
comment: 15 pages, 7 figures, 5 tables, version accepted at AAAI 2022
comments: 15 pages, 7 figures, 5 tables, version accepted at AAAI 2022
abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) enables agents to learn how to perform various tasks from scratch. In domains like autonomous driving, recommendation systems, and more, optimal RL policies learned could cause a privacy breach if the policies memorize any part of the private reward. We study the set of existing differentially-private RL policies derived from various RL algorithms such as Value Iteration, Deep Q Networks, and Vanilla Proximal Policy Optimization. We propose a new Privacy-Aware Inverse RL (PRIL) analysis framework, that performs reward reconstruction as an adversarial attack on private policies that the agents may deploy. For this, we introduce the reward reconstruction attack, wherein we seek to reconstruct the original reward from a privacy-preserving policy using an Inverse RL algorithm. An adversary must do poorly at reconstructing the original reward function if the agent uses a tightly private policy. Using this framework, we empirically test the effectiveness of the privacy guarantee offered by the private algorithms on multiple instances of the FrozenLake domain of varying complexities. Based on the analysis performed, we infer a gap between the current standard of privacy offered and the standard of privacy needed to protect reward functions in RL. We do so by quantifying the extent to which each private policy protects the reward function by measuring distances between the original and reconstructed rewards.
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) enables agents to learn how to perform various tasks from scratch. In domains like autonomous driving, recommendation systems, and more, optimal RL policies learned could cause a privacy breach if the policies memorize any part of the private reward. We study the set of existing differentially-private RL policies derived from various RL algorithms such as Value Iteration, Deep Q Networks, and Vanilla Proximal Policy Optimization. We propose a new Privacy-Aware Inverse RL (PRIL) analysis framework, that performs reward reconstruction as an adversarial attack on private policies that the agents may deploy. For this, we introduce the reward reconstruction attack, wherein we seek to reconstruct the original reward from a privacy-preserving policy using an Inverse RL algorithm. An adversary must do poorly at reconstructing the original reward function if the agent uses a tightly private policy. Using this framework, we empirically test the effectiveness of the privacy guarantee offered by the private algorithms on multiple instances of the FrozenLake domain of varying complexities. Based on the analysis performed, we infer a gap between the current standard of privacy offered and the standard of privacy needed to protect reward functions in RL. We do so by quantifying the extent to which each private policy protects the reward function by measuring distances between the original and reconstructed rewards.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）使智能体能够从头开始学习如何执行各种任务。在自动驾驶、推荐系统等领域，如果学习到的最优强化学习策略记住了私人奖励的任何部分，那么这些策略可能会导致隐私泄露。我们研究了源自各种 RL 算法（例如值迭代、深度 Q 网络和普通近端策略优化）的现有差分隐私 RL 策略集。我们提出了一种新的隐私感知逆强化学习（PRIL）分析框架，该框架执行奖励重建，作为对代理可能部署的私人策略的对抗性攻击。为此，我们引入了奖励重建攻击，其中我们寻求使用逆 RL 算法从隐私保护策略重建原始奖励。如果代理使用严格的私有策略，那么对手在重建原始奖励函数方面肯定表现不佳。使用该框架，我们在不同复杂度的 FrozenLake 域的多个实例上凭经验测试私有算法提供的隐私保证的有效性。根据所进行的分析，我们推断当前提供的隐私标准与保护强化学习中奖励函数所需的隐私标准之间存在差距。我们通过测量原始奖励和重构奖励之间的距离来量化每项私人政策保护奖励函数的程度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于逆强化学习的隐私分析框架PRIL，用于评估强化学习策略对奖励函数的隐私保护能力。
AI.motivation: 现有差分隐私RL策略可能无法有效防止奖励函数泄露，导致隐私风险。
AI.method: 通过奖励重构攻击，利用逆RL算法从隐私策略中还原原始奖励函数，量化隐私保护效果。
AI.result: 实验表明当前隐私算法在FrozenLake环境中未能有效保护奖励函数，存在隐私保障缺口。
AI.conclusion: 现有差分隐私RL方法的隐私标准不足以满足奖励函数保护需求，需进一步改进隐私机制。

For this, we introduce the reward reconstruction attack, wherein we seek to reconstruct the original reward from a privacy-preserving policy using an Inverse RL algorithm. An adversary must do poorly at reconstructing the original reward function if the agent uses a tightly private policy. Using this framework, we empirically test the effectiveness of the privacy guarantee offered by the private algorithms on multiple instances of the FrozenLake domain of varying complexities. Based on the analysis performed, we infer a gap between the current standard of privacy offered and the standard of privacy needed to protect reward functions in RL. We do so by quantifying the extent to which each private policy protects the reward function by measuring distances between the original and reconstructed rewards. 强化学习（RL）使智能体能够从头开始学习如何执行各种任务。在自动驾驶、推荐系统等领域，如果学习到的最优强化学习策略记住了私人奖励的任何部分，那么这些策略可能会导致隐私泄露。我们研究了源自各种 RL 算法（例如值迭代、深度 Q 网络和普通近端策略优化）的现有差分隐私 RL 策略集。我们提出了一种新的隐私感知逆强化学习（PRIL）分析框架，该框架执行奖励重建，作为对代理可能部署的私人策略的对抗性攻击。为此，我们引入了奖励重建攻击，其中我们寻求使用逆 RL 算法从隐私保护策略重建原始奖励。如果代理使用严格的私有策略，那么对手在重建原始奖励函数方面肯定表现不佳。使用该框架，我们在不同复杂度的 FrozenLake 域的多个实例上凭经验测试私有算法提供的隐私保证的有效性。根据所进行的分析，我们推断当前提供的隐私标准与保护强化学习中奖励函数所需的隐私标准之间存在差距。我们通过测量原始奖励和重构奖励之间的距离来量化每项私人政策保护奖励函数的程度。 本文提出一种基于逆强化学习的隐私分析框架PRIL，用于评估强化学习策略对奖励函数的隐私保护能力。 Kritika Prakash,Fiza Husain,Praveen Paruchuri,Sujit P. authors_text: Yuanzhi Duan,Xiaofang Hu,Yue Zhou,Qiang Liu,Shukai Duan
title: Network Compression via Central Filter
title_zh: 通过中央过滤器进行网络压缩
abstract: Neural network pruning has remarkable performance for reducing the complexity of deep network models. Recent network pruning methods usually focused on removing unimportant or redundant filters in the network. In this paper, by exploring the similarities between feature maps, we propose a novel filter pruning method, Central Filter (CF), which suggests that a filter is approximately equal to a set of other filters after appropriate adjustments. Our method is based on the discovery that the average similarity between feature maps changes very little, regardless of the number of input images. Based on this finding, we establish similarity graphs on feature maps and calculate the closeness centrality of each node to select the Central Filter. Moreover, we design a method to directly adjust weights in the next layer corresponding to the Central Filter, effectively minimizing the error caused by pruning. Through experiments on various benchmark networks and datasets, CF yields state-of-the-art performance. For example, with ResNet-56, CF reduces approximately 39.7% of FLOPs by removing 47.1% of the parameters, with even 0.33% accuracy improvement on CIFAR-10. With GoogLeNet, CF reduces approximately 63.2% of FLOPs by removing 55.6% of the parameters, with only a small loss of 0.35% in top-1 accuracy on CIFAR-10. With ResNet-50, CF reduces approximately 47.9% of FLOPs by removing 36.9% of the parameters, with only a small loss of 1.07% in top-1 accuracy on ImageNet. The codes can be available at https://github.com/8ubpshLR23/Central-Filter.
summary: Neural network pruning has remarkable performance for reducing the complexity of deep network models. Recent network pruning methods usually focused on removing unimportant or redundant filters in the network. In this paper, by exploring the similarities between feature maps, we propose a novel filter pruning method, Central Filter (CF), which suggests that a filter is approximately equal to a set of other filters after appropriate adjustments. Our method is based on the discovery that the average similarity between feature maps changes very little, regardless of the number of input images. Based on this finding, we establish similarity graphs on feature maps and calculate the closeness centrality of each node to select the Central Filter. Moreover, we design a method to directly adjust weights in the next layer corresponding to the Central Filter, effectively minimizing the error caused by pruning. Through experiments on various benchmark networks and datasets, CF yields state-of-the-art performance. For example, with ResNet-56, CF reduces approximately 39.7% of FLOPs by removing 47.1% of the parameters, with even 0.33% accuracy improvement on CIFAR-10. With GoogLeNet, CF reduces approximately 63.2% of FLOPs by removing 55.6% of the parameters, with only a small loss of 0.35% in top-1 accuracy on CIFAR-10. With ResNet-50, CF reduces approximately 47.9% of FLOPs by removing 36.9% of the parameters, with only a small loss of 1.07% in top-1 accuracy on ImageNet. The codes can be available at https://github.com/8ubpshLR23/Central-Filter.
abstract_zh: 神经网络剪枝对于降低深度网络模型的复杂性具有显着的性能。最近的网络修剪方法通常侧重于删除网络中不重要或冗余的过滤器。在本文中，通过探索特征图之间的相似性，我们提出了一种新颖的滤波器剪枝方法——中央滤波器（CF），该方法表明一个滤波器在适当调整后近似等于一组其他滤波器。我们的方法基于这样的发现：无论输入图像的数量如何，特征图之间的平均相似度变化很小。基于这一发现，我们在特征图上建立相似图并计算每个节点的接近中心性以选择中央过滤器。此外，我们设计了一种直接调整中央滤波器对应的下一层权重的方法，有效地最小化了剪枝带来的误差。通过对各种基准网络和数据集的实验，CF 产生了最先进的性能。例如，使用 ResNet-56，CF 通过删除 47.1% 的参数，减少了大约 39.7% 的 FLOP，甚至比 CIFAR-10 的精度提高了 0.33%。借助 GoogLeNet，CF 通过删除 55.6% 的参数，减少了约 63.2% 的 FLOP，而 CIFAR-10 上的 top-1 精度仅损失了 0.35%。使用 ResNet-50，CF 通过删除 36.9% 的参数，减少了约 47.9% 的 FLOP，而 ImageNet 上的 top-1 精度仅损失了 1.07%。这些代码可以在 https://github.com/8ubpshLR23/Central-Filter 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于特征图相似性的新型滤波器剪枝方法Central Filter（CF），通过识别并保留关键滤波器实现网络压缩。
AI.motivation: 现有剪枝方法主要依赖滤波器重要性评估，未能充分挖掘特征图间的相似性关系，导致压缩效率与精度难以兼顾。
AI.method: 构建特征图相似性图谱，通过节点接近中心性计算确定中心滤波器，并设计权重调整机制补偿剪枝误差。
AI.result: 在ResNet-56/GoogLeNet/ResNet-50上分别实现39.7%/63.2%/47.9% FLOPs缩减，CIFAR-10准确率提升0.33%/下降0.35%，ImageNet准确率下降1.07%。
AI.conclusion: CF方法通过特征图相似性分析实现高效网络压缩，在保持模型精度的同时显著降低计算量，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Stirling Scholes,Alice Ruget,German Mora-Martin,Feng Zhu,Istvan Gyongy,Jonathan Leach
title: DronePose: The identification, segmentation, and orientation detection of drones via neural networks
title_zh: DronePose：通过神经网络识别、分割和检测无人机的方向
abstract: The growing ubiquity of drones has raised concerns over the ability of traditional air-space monitoring technologies to accurately characterise such vehicles. Here, we present a CNN using a decision tree and ensemble structure to fully characterise drones in flight. Our system determines the drone type, orientation (in terms of pitch, roll, and yaw), and performs segmentation to classify different body parts (engines, body, and camera). We also provide a computer model for the rapid generation of large quantities of accurately labelled photo-realistic training data and demonstrate that this data is of sufficient fidelity to allow the system to accurately characterise real drones in flight. Our network will provide a valuable tool in the image processing chain where it may build upon existing drone detection technologies to provide complete drone characterisation over wide areas.
summary: The growing ubiquity of drones has raised concerns over the ability of traditional air-space monitoring technologies to accurately characterise such vehicles. Here, we present a CNN using a decision tree and ensemble structure to fully characterise drones in flight. Our system determines the drone type, orientation (in terms of pitch, roll, and yaw), and performs segmentation to classify different body parts (engines, body, and camera). We also provide a computer model for the rapid generation of large quantities of accurately labelled photo-realistic training data and demonstrate that this data is of sufficient fidelity to allow the system to accurately characterise real drones in flight. Our network will provide a valuable tool in the image processing chain where it may build upon existing drone detection technologies to provide complete drone characterisation over wide areas.
abstract_zh: 无人机的日益普及引起了人们对传统空域监测技术准确描述此类车辆特征的能力的担忧。在这里，我们提出了一个使用决策树和集成结构的 CNN 来全面表征飞行中的无人机。我们的系统确定无人机的类型、方向（俯仰、滚动和偏航），并执行分割以对不同的身体部位（发动机、机身和摄像头）进行分类。我们还提供了一个计算机模型，用于快速生成大量精确标记的逼真训练数据，并证明该数据具有足够的保真度，使系统能够准确地表征飞行中的真实无人机。我们的网络将在图像处理链中提供一个有价值的工具，它可以建立在现有的无人机检测技术的基础上，在广泛的区域提供完整的无人机特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的系统，用于识别、分割和检测无人机的飞行姿态（俯仰、滚转、偏航），并生成高质量的训练数据。
AI.motivation: 传统空域监控技术难以准确表征无人机，需开发更高效的无人机特征识别与姿态检测方法以应对无人机普及带来的挑战。
AI.method: 设计结合决策树与集成结构的CNN模型，实现无人机类型识别、部件分割及姿态检测；构建计算机生成的高保真训练数据模型以支持系统训练。
AI.result: 系统可准确识别无人机类型、检测三维姿态并分割机身部件，生成的训练数据具备足够真实性，能有效表征实际飞行中的无人机。
AI.conclusion: 该网络可作为现有无人机检测技术的补充，实现大范围无人机的完整特征表征，为图像处理链提供关键工具。

authors_text: Vacit Oguz Yazici,Joost van de Weijer,Longlong Yu
title: Visual Transformers with Primal Object Queries for Multi-Label Image Classification
title_zh: 具有用于多标签图像分类的原始对象查询的视觉转换器
abstract: Multi-label image classification is about predicting a set of class labels that can be considered as orderless sequential data. Transformers process the sequential data as a whole, therefore they are inherently good at set prediction. The first vision-based transformer model, which was proposed for the object detection task introduced the concept of object queries. Object queries are learnable positional encodings that are used by attention modules in decoder layers to decode the object classes or bounding boxes using the region of interests in an image. However, inputting the same set of object queries to different decoder layers hinders the training: it results in lower performance and delays convergence. In this paper, we propose the usage of primal object queries that are only provided at the start of the transformer decoder stack. In addition, we improve the mixup technique proposed for multi-label classification. The proposed transformer model with primal object queries improves the state-of-the-art class wise F1 metric by 2.1% and 1.8%; and speeds up the convergence by 79.0% and 38.6% on MS-COCO and NUS-WIDE datasets respectively.
summary: Multi-label image classification is about predicting a set of class labels that can be considered as orderless sequential data. Transformers process the sequential data as a whole, therefore they are inherently good at set prediction. The first vision-based transformer model, which was proposed for the object detection task introduced the concept of object queries. Object queries are learnable positional encodings that are used by attention modules in decoder layers to decode the object classes or bounding boxes using the region of interests in an image. However, inputting the same set of object queries to different decoder layers hinders the training: it results in lower performance and delays convergence. In this paper, we propose the usage of primal object queries that are only provided at the start of the transformer decoder stack. In addition, we improve the mixup technique proposed for multi-label classification. The proposed transformer model with primal object queries improves the state-of-the-art class wise F1 metric by 2.1% and 1.8%; and speeds up the convergence by 79.0% and 38.6% on MS-COCO and NUS-WIDE datasets respectively.
abstract_zh: 多标签图像分类是关于预测一组可被视为无序序列数据的类标签。 Transformer 将顺序数据作为一个整体进行处理，因此它们本质上擅长集合预测。第一个基于视觉的 Transformer 模型是为对象检测任务提出的，引入了对象查询的概念。对象查询是可学习的位置编码，解码器层中的注意模块使用它来使用图像中的感兴趣区域来解码对象类或边界框。然而，将同一组对象查询输入到不同的解码器层会阻碍训练：它会导致性能降低并延迟收敛。在本文中，我们建议使用仅在转换器解码器堆栈的开头提供的原始对象查询。此外，我们改进了为多标签分类提出的混合技术。所提出的带有原始对象查询的 Transformer 模型将最先进的类 F1 指标提高了 2.1% 和 1.8%；在 MS-COCO 和 NUS-WIDE 数据集上分别将收敛速度加快了 79.0% 和 38.6%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于原始目标查询的视觉Transformer模型，用于多标签图像分类任务。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉Transformer在解码器层重复使用相同对象查询会导致训练效率低下，且现有mixup技术难以适应多标签分类需求。
AI.method: 在Transformer解码器堆栈起始位置引入原始对象查询，并改进多标签分类的mixup技术以增强特征学习。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO和NUS-WIDE数据集上分别提升F1指标2.1%和1.8%，收敛速度加快79.0%和38.6%。
AI.conclusion: 原始对象查询机制有效提升了多标签分类性能，同时改进的mixup技术进一步加速了模型收敛。

title: Critical configurations for three projective views
title_zh: 三个投影视图的关键配置
comment: 40 pages, 9 figures. This is a companion paper to arXiv:2112.05074. Accepted manuscript published in Mathematica Scandinavica
comments: 40 pages, 9 figures. This is a companion paper to arXiv:2112.05074. Accepted manuscript published in Mathematica Scandinavica
abstract: The problem of structure from motion is concerned with recovering the 3-dimensional structure of an object from a set of 2-dimensional images taken by unknown cameras. Generally, all information can be uniquely recovered if enough images and point correspondences are provided, yet there are certain cases where unique recovery is impossible; these are called critical configurations. We use an algebraic approach to study the critical configurations for three projective cameras. We show that all critical configurations lie on the intersection of quadric surfaces, and classify exactly which intersections constitute a critical configuration.
summary: The problem of structure from motion is concerned with recovering the 3-dimensional structure of an object from a set of 2-dimensional images taken by unknown cameras. Generally, all information can be uniquely recovered if enough images and point correspondences are provided, yet there are certain cases where unique recovery is impossible; these are called critical configurations. We use an algebraic approach to study the critical configurations for three projective cameras. We show that all critical configurations lie on the intersection of quadric surfaces, and classify exactly which intersections constitute a critical configuration.
abstract_zh: 运动结构问题涉及从未知相机拍摄的一组 2 维图像中恢复物体的 3 维结构。一般来说，如果提供足够的图像和点对应关系，所有信息都可以唯一恢复，但也有一些情况是不可能唯一恢复的；这些称为关键配置。我们使用代数方法来研究三个投影相机的关键配置。我们证明所有关键配置都位于二次曲面的交点上，并准确分类哪些交点构成关键配置。

AI.tldr: 研究三个投影相机的关键配置问题，分析其几何特性并进行分类
AI.motivation: 结构从运动问题中存在无法唯一恢复的情况（关键配置），需明确其几何特性以确保重建的可靠性
AI.method: 采用代数方法分析二次曲面的交集，确定关键配置的几何条件
AI.result: 证明所有关键配置位于二次曲面交集，并准确分类这些交集
AI.conclusion: 通过代数方法明确关键配置的几何结构，为三维重建中的唯一性分析提供理论支持

ai_content.conclusion: 通过代数方法明确关键配置的几何结构，为三维重建中的唯一性分析提供理论支持

tldr: 研究三个投影相机的关键配置问题，分析其几何特性并进行分类
motivation: 结构从运动问题中存在无法唯一恢复的情况（关键配置），需明确其几何特性以确保重建的可靠性
method: 采用代数方法分析二次曲面的交集，确定关键配置的几何条件
result: 证明所有关键配置位于二次曲面交集，并准确分类这些交集

search_text: Critical configurations for three projective views 三个投影视图的关键配置 The problem of structure from motion is concerned with recovering the 3-dimensional structure of an object from a set of 2-dimensional images taken by unknown cameras. Generally, all information can be uniquely recovered if enough images and point correspondences are provided, yet there are certain cases where unique recovery is impossible; these are called critical configurations. We use an algebraic approach to study the critical configurations for three projective cameras. We show that all critical configurations lie on the intersection of quadric surfaces, and classify exactly which intersections constitute a critical configuration. 运动结构问题涉及从未知相机拍摄的一组 2 维图像中恢复物体的 3 维结构。一般来说，如果提供足够的图像和点对应关系，所有信息都可以唯一恢复，但也有一些情况是不可能唯一恢复的；这些称为关键配置。我们使用代数方法来研究三个投影相机的关键配置。我们证明所有关键配置都位于二次曲面的交点上，并准确分类哪些交点构成关键配置。 研究三个投影相机的关键配置问题，分析其几何特性并进行分类 Martin Bråtelund math.AG,cs.CV

authors_text: Alejandro Rodriguez-Ramos,Adrian Alvarez-Fernandez Hriday Bavle,Javier Rodriguez-Vazquez,Liang Lu Miguel Fernandez-Cortizas,Ramon A. Suarez Fernandez,Alberto Rodelgo,Carlos Santos,Martin Molina,Luis Merino,Fernando Caballero,Pascual Campoy
title: Autonomous Aerial Robot for High-Speed Search and Intercept Applications
title_zh: 用于高速搜索和拦截应用的自主空中机器人
abstract: In recent years, high-speed navigation and environment interaction in the context of aerial robotics has become a field of interest for several academic and industrial research studies. In particular, Search and Intercept (SaI) applications for aerial robots pose a compelling research area due to their potential usability in several environments. Nevertheless, SaI tasks involve a challenging development regarding sensory weight, on-board computation resources, actuation design and algorithms for perception and control, among others. In this work, a fully-autonomous aerial robot for high-speed object grasping has been proposed. As an additional sub-task, our system is able to autonomously pierce balloons located in poles close to the surface. Our first contribution is the design of the aerial robot at an actuation and sensory level consisting of a novel gripper design with additional sensors enabling the robot to grasp objects at high speeds. The second contribution is a complete software framework consisting of perception, state estimation, motion planning, motion control and mission control in order to rapid- and robustly perform the autonomous grasping mission. Our approach has been validated in a challenging international competition and has shown outstanding results, being able to autonomously search, follow and grasp a moving object at 6 m/s in an outdoor environment

The second contribution is a complete software framework consisting of perception, state estimation, motion planning, motion control and mission control in order to rapid- and robustly perform the autonomous grasping mission. Our approach has been validated in a challenging international competition and has shown outstanding results, being able to autonomously search, follow and grasp a moving object at 6 m/s in an outdoor environment
abstract_zh: 近年来，空中机器人背景下的高速导航和环境交互已成为一些学术和工业研究的兴趣领域。特别是，空中机器人的搜索和拦截（SaI）应用因其在多种环境中的潜在可用性而成为一个引人注目的研究领域。然而，SaI 任务涉及到在感官重量、机载计算资源、驱动设计以及感知和控制算法等方面的挑战性开发。在这项工作中，提出了一种用于高速物体抓取的全自动空中机器人。作为一项额外的子任务，我们的系统能够自动刺穿位于靠近地表的两极的气球。我们的第一个贡献是空中机器人在驱动和感官层面的设计，包括新颖的夹具设计和附加传感器，使机器人能够高速抓取物体。第二个贡献是一个完整的软件框架，包括感知、状态估计、运动规划、运动控制和任务控制，以便快速、稳健地执行自主抓取任务。我们的方法已在具有挑战性的国际比赛中得到验证，并显示出出色的结果，能够在室外环境中以 6 m/s 的速度自主搜索、跟踪和抓取移动物体

AI.tldr: 设计一种用于高速搜索和拦截的自主空中机器人，具备高速物体抓取和刺破气球的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有空中机器人在高速搜索与拦截任务中面临传感器负载、计算资源、执行器设计及控制算法等多方面的技术挑战，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出新型轻量化夹持器与多传感器集成设计，并开发包含感知、状态估计、运动规划、控制及任务管理的全流程软件框架。
AI.result: 在国际竞赛中验证系统性能，成功实现6米/秒速度下户外环境移动目标的自主搜索、跟踪与抓取。
AI.conclusion: 该系统验证了高速搜索拦截任务的技术可行性，为复杂环境下的自主空中机器人应用提供了有效方案。

title: Monitoring and Adapting the Physical State of a Camera for Autonomous Vehicles
title_zh: 监控和调整自动驾驶车辆摄像头的物理状态
abstract: Autonomous vehicles and robots require increasingly more robustness and reliability to meet the demands of modern tasks. These requirements specially apply to cameras onboard such vehicles because they are the predominant sensors to acquire information about the environment and support actions. Cameras must maintain proper functionality and take automatic countermeasures if necessary. Existing solutions are typically tailored to specific problems or detached from the downstream computer vision tasks of the machines, which, however, determine the requirements on the quality of the produced camera images. We propose a generic and task-oriented self-health-maintenance framework for cameras based on data- and physically-grounded models. To this end, we determine two reliable, real-time capable estimators for typical image effects of a camera in poor condition (blur, noise phenomena and most common combinations) by evaluating traditional and customized machine learning-based approaches in extensive experiments. Furthermore, we implement the framework on a real-world ground vehicle and demonstrate how a camera can adjust its parameters to counter an identified poor condition to achieve optimal application capability based on experimental (non-linear and non-monotonic) input-output performance curves. Object detection is chosen as target application, and the image effects motion blur and sensor noise as conditioning examples. Our framework not only provides a practical ready-to-use solution to monitor and maintain the health of cameras, but can also serve as a basis for extensions to tackle more sophisticated problems that combine additional data sources (e.g., sensor or environment parameters) empirically in order to attain fully reliable and robust machines. Code: https://github.com/MaikWischow/Camera-Condition-Monitoring

Object detection is chosen as target application, and the image effects motion blur and sensor noise as conditioning examples. Code: https://github.com/MaikWischow/Camera-Condition-Monitoring
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶车辆和机器人需要越来越多的稳健性和可靠性来满足现代任务的需求。这些要求特别适用于此类车辆上的摄像头，因为它们是获取环境信息和支持行动的主要传感器。相机必须保持正常的功能，并在必要时采取自动对策。现有的解决方案通常是针对特定问题量身定制的，或者与机器的下游计算机视觉任务无关，然而，这决定了对所生成的相机图像的质量要求。我们提出了一个基于数据和物理基础模型的通用且面向任务的相机自我健康维护框架。为此，我们通过在广泛的实验中评估传统和定制的基于机器学习的方法，确定了两个可靠、实时的估计器，用于评估恶劣条件下相机的典型图像效果（模糊、噪声现象和最常见的组合）。此外，我们在现实世界的地面车辆上实现了该框架，并演示了相机如何调整其参数以应对已识别的不良条件，从而根据实验（非线性和非单调）输入输出性能曲线实现最佳应用能力。选择对象检测作为目标应用，并以图像效果运动模糊和传感器噪声作为条件示例。我们的框架不仅提供了一个实用的即用型解决方案来监控和维护相机的健康状况，而且还可以作为扩展的基础来解决更复杂的问题，这些问题根据经验结合其他数据源（例如传感器或环境参数）以获得完全可靠和强大的机器。代码：https://github.com/MaikWischow/Camera-Condition-Monitoring

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于数据和物理模型的通用相机自维护框架，用于实时监测和调整自动驾驶车辆相机的物理状态，以确保图像质量满足下游视觉任务需求。
AI.motivation: 现有相机健康监测方案多针对特定问题且与下游视觉任务脱节，无法动态适应复杂环境变化，导致图像质量无法满足自动驾驶系统的可靠性要求。
AI.method: 通过对比实验确定两种实时估计器（传统方法与定制机器学习模型），量化相机失真效应（如模糊、噪声）；基于非线性输入输出曲线，在真实地面车辆上实现参数自适应调整，以对象检测为验证场景。
AI.result: 框架成功部署于实际车辆，通过动态调整相机参数有效缓解运动模糊和传感器噪声问题，提升目标检测性能，并为多数据源融合的扩展应用提供基础。
AI.conclusion: 该方案为相机健康维护提供可复用解决方案，通过结合物理模型与数据驱动方法，可进一步扩展至多模态传感器融合场景，推动自动驾驶系统可靠性提升。
